text.en: Fajr TaqeebatRecited after the obligatory Fajr salat.
Before Fajr
Taqeeb 1
3 Duas
Taqeeb 3
Duas more
Q Ayat
Common/Res

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ علَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَٱهْدِنِي لِمَا ٱخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahdini lima ukhtulifa fihi mina alhaqqi bi-idhnika

translation.en: and guide me, by Your permission, to the right about which discrepancies have taken place.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ تَهْدي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
segments.transliteration: innaka tahdi man tasha'u ila siratin mustaqimin

translation.en: Verily, You guide him whom You wish to a straight path.

text.en: 3.Repeat the following invocation ten times:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: al-awsya'i alrradina almardiyyina

translation.en: the consenting and pleased Successors,

segments.transliteration: bi-afdali salawatika

translation.en: with the best of Your blessings,

segments.transliteration: wa barik ʿalayhim bi-afdali barakatika

translation.en: and confer upon them the best of your favors.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu ʿalayhim

translation.en: Peace be upon them

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala arwahihim wa ajsadihim

translation.en: and their souls and bodies.

segments.transliteration: wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Allah's mercy and blessings be upon them.

text.en: 4.Ask for living on conduct of Imam Ali(as):

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أَحْيِنِي عَلى ما أَحْيَيْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طالِبٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ahyini ʿala ma ahiyayta ʿalayhi ʿaliyya bna abi talibin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me live carrying the conducts on which You made `Ali the son of Abu-Talib live

segments.arabic: وَأَمِتْنِي عَلى ما ماتَ عَلَيْهِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طالِبٍ عليه‌السلام
segments.transliteration: wa amitni ʿala ma mata ʿalayhi ʿaliyyu bnu abi talibin ʿalayhi alssalamu

translation.en: and make me die on the principles for which `Ali the son of Abu-Talib—peace be upon him—died.

text.en: 5.Repeat each of the following statements (i- x )10 times(100 times also mentioned):

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: (i)I pray the forgiveness of Allah and I repent before Him.

segments.transliteration: as'alu allaha alʿafiyata

translation.en: (ii)I beseech Allah for good health.

segments.transliteration: astajiru billahi mina alnnari

translation.en: (iii)I seek Allah's protection against Hellfire.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu aljannata

translation.en: (iv)I ask Him for Paradise.

segments.transliteration: as'alu allaha alhura alʿina

translation.en: (v)I ask Allah for the Paradisiacal Women.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ٱلْمُبينُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu almaliku alhaqqu almubinu

translation.en: (vi)There is no god save Allah the King and evident Truth.

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (viii)May Allah send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِوَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِوَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُوَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi walhamdu lillahi wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbarwa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: (ix)All glory be to Allah,all praise be to Allah,there is no god save Allah Allah is the Greatestand there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ كَانَ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu kana wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: (x)Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass and there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: 6.In Tahdhib al-Ahkam (by Shaykh al-Tusi), it is reported that whoever repeats the followingtentimesafter the Dawn Prayers, Almighty Allah will save him from blindness, insanity, leprosy, poverty, and (house) demolition or dotage:

segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alʿazimi wa bihamdihi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah, the All-great and in praise of Him;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: and there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: 7.Shaykh al-Kulayni reports Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) as saying: Whoever repeats the followingseven timesafter the Dawn and Sunset Prayers, Almighty Allah will save him from seventy kinds of misfortune the least of which are , leprosy, and insanity; and his name will be erased from the list of the condemned ones, if it was listed there

segments.transliteration: bismi allahi alrrahmani alrrahimi

translation.en: In the Name of Allah the All-compassionate, the All-merciful;

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: 8.Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him)is also reported to have said that one who desires to enjoy both the worldly life and the Next World, and one who has eye ache, should say the following prayer after the Dawn and Sunset Prayers:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ʿalayka

translation.en: O Allah, I do beseech You, in the name of the right of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad that is incumbent upon You

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wajʿal alnnura fi basari

translation.en: and to give light to my insight,

segments.transliteration: walbasirata fi dini

translation.en: make me discerning in my religion,

segments.transliteration: wal-yaqina fi qalbi

translation.en: have conviction in my heart,

segments.transliteration: wal-ikhlasa fi ʿamali

translation.en: sincerity in my deeds,

segments.transliteration: walssalamata fi nafsi

translation.en: safety in my self,

segments.transliteration: walssaʿata fi rizqi

translation.en: vastness in my sustenance,

segments.transliteration: walshshukra laka abadan ma abqaytani

translation.en: and perpetual thankfulness for You as long as you keep me alive.

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ .

translation.en: "O' Lord of Mohammad and his Holy Progeny, send mercy upon Mohammad and his Holy Progeny, and show haste in the relief of Mohammad and his Holy Progeny."

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَأَعْتِقْ رَقَبَتي مِنَ النَّارِ.

segments.transliteration: YAA A’ZEEZO.

translation.en: O Mighty.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّٰهِ الْعَظيْمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّٰهَ وَاَسْئَلُهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ۔
اِسْتَمْسَكْتُ بِعُرْوَةِ اللهِ الْوُثْقٰى الَّتِيْ لَا انْفِصَامَ لَهَا وَ اسْتَعْصَمْتُ بِحَبْلِ اللهِ الْمَتِيْنِ.
segments.transliteration: istamsakto be-u’rwatil laahil wusqal latee lan fesaama lahaa was ta’samto be-hablil laahil mateen

translation.en: I have laid hold of the firmest handle of Allah which shall not break off and I have clung to the strong rope of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ مِنْ فَوْرَةِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ مِنْ شَرِّ شَيَاطِيْنِ الْاِنْسِ وَ الْجِنِّ.
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo billaahe min fawratil a’rabe wal a’jame wa a-o’ozo billaahe min sharre shayaateenil inse wal ji

translation.en: I seek refuge with Allah from the outbursts of the Arab and the non-Arab, and I seek refuge with Allah from the evil of the devils from the man and jinn.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ طَلَبْتُ حَاجَتِيْ مِنَ اللهِ حَسْبِيَ اللهُ وَ نِعْمَ الْوَكِيْلُ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ.
segments.transliteration: tawakkalto a’lal laahe talabto haajatee menal laahe hasbeyal laaho wa ne’mal wakeelo laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a’liyyil a’zeeme.

translation.en: I trust in Allah. I seek the fulfillment of my needs from Allah. Allah is enough for me and He is the best Procurator, there is no power or might but by (the will of) Allah the Sublime, the Mighty.

segments.transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ اِنْ کَانَتْ قَطِيْعَۃً
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inna dhunoobi wa in kanat qatee'atan

translation.en: O Allah, even though my sins may be numerous,

segments.arabic: فَاِنِّيْ مَا اَرَدْتُ بِهٖ قَطِيْعَۃً وَ لَا اَقُوْلُ لَکَ الْعُتْبٰي
segments.transliteration: Fa-innee ma aradtu bihi qatee'atan wa la aqoolu laka al-'utba

translation.en: I never intended separation from You, nor do I claim innocence before You.

segments.arabic: لَا اَعُوْدُ بِمَا اَعْلَمُهٗ مِنْ خَلَّتِيْ وَ لَا اسْتَتِمُّ التَّوْبَۃَ لِمَا اَعْلَمُهٗ مِنْ ضَعُفِيْ
segments.transliteration: La a'oodu bima a'lamuhu min khallatee wa la astatimmu al-tawbata lima a'lamuhu min du'afi

translation.en: I do not deny my flaws, and I am unable to complete my repentance due to my weakness.

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ جِئْتُ اَطْلُبُ عَفْوَکَ وَ وَسِيْلَتِيْ اِلَيْکَ کَرَمُکَ
segments.transliteration: Wa qad ji'tu atlubu 'afwaka wa waseelatee ilayka karamuka

translation.en: And I have come seeking Your forgiveness, with Your generosity as my means to You.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اَکْرِمْنِيْ بِمَغْفِرَتِکَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Fa salli 'ala Muhammad wa aali Muhammad wa akrimnee bimaghfiratika ya arhamar-raahimeen

translation.en: So bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, and honor me with Your forgiveness, O Most Merciful of the merciful

segments.transliteration: Astamsiku bi-ʿurwat Allāh al-wuthqā,

translation.en: I hold firmly to the trustworthy handhold of Allah,

segments.transliteration: Allatī lā infiṣām lahā,

translation.en: That will never break,

segments.transliteration: Wa-ʿtaṣamtu bi-ḥabl Allāh al-matīn,

translation.en: And I seek refuge with the strong rope of Allah,

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ شَيَاطِينِ الْإِنْسِ وَالْجِنِّ ،
segments.transliteration: Aʿūdhu bi-llāh min sharri shayāṭīn al-insi wa al-jinn,

translation.en: I seek refuge with Allah from the evil of the devils among humans and jinn,

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ ،
segments.transliteration: Aʿūdhu bi-llāh min sharri fasaqah al-ʿarab wa al-ʿajam,

translation.en: I seek refuge with Allah from the evil of the immoral among Arabs and non-Arabs,

segments.transliteration: Ḥasbiy Allāh,

translation.en: Allah is sufficient for me,

segments.transliteration: Tawakkaltu ʿalā Allāh,

translation.en: I rely on Allah,

segments.transliteration: Alja’tu ẓahrī ilā Allāh,

translation.en: I place my back towards Allah,

segments.transliteration: Ṭalabtu ḥājatī min Allāh,

translation.en: I seek my need from Allah,

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ.
segments.transliteration: Lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā bi-llāh.

translation.en: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي نُوراً فِي قَلْبِي ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ajʿal lī nūran fī qalbī,

translation.en: O Allah, place light in my heart,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī baṣarī,

translation.en: And light in my sight,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī samʿī,

translation.en: And light in my hearing,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī lisānī,

translation.en: And light on my tongue,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī basharī,

translation.en: And light in my skin,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī shaʿrī,

translation.en: And light in my hair,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī laḥmī,

translation.en: And light in my flesh,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī damī,

translation.en: And light in my blood,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī ʿiẓāmī,

translation.en: And light in my bones,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran fī ʿaṣabī,

translation.en: And light in my nerves,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran bayna yadayya,

translation.en: And light before me,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran min khalfī,

translation.en: And light behind me,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran ʿan yamīnī,

translation.en: And light to my right,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran ʿan shimālī,

translation.en: And light to my left,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran min fawqī,

translation.en: And light above me,

segments.transliteration: Wa nūran min taḥtī,

translation.en: And light beneath me,

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma aʿẓim lī nūran.

translation.en: O Allah, make my light great.

segments.transliteration: Inna fī khalq as-samāwāt wa al-arḍ,

translation.en: Indeed, in the creation of the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَاخْتِلَافِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ ﴿١٩٠﴾ ،
segments.transliteration: Wakhtilāf al-layl wa an-nahār la-āyāt li-ulī al-albāb (190),

translation.en: And the alternation of the night and the day are signs for those of understanding (190),

segments.transliteration: Alladhīna yadhkurūna Allāh qiyāman wa quʿūdan,

translation.en: Who remember Allah while standing or sitting,

segments.transliteration: Wa ʿalā junūbihim,

translation.en: And [lying] on their sides,

segments.transliteration: Wa yatafakkarūna fī khalq as-samāwāt wa al-arḍ,

translation.en: And give thought to the creation of the heavens and the earth,

segments.transliteration: Rabbana mā khalaqta hādhā bāṭilan,

translation.en: [Saying], "Our Lord, You did not create this aimlessly;

segments.transliteration: Subḥānak faqinā ʿadhāb an-nār (191),

translation.en: Exalted are You [above such a thing]; protect us from the punishment of the Fire (191),

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ مَن تُدْخِلِ النَّارَ فَقَدْ أَخْزَيْتَهُ ،
segments.transliteration: Rabbana innaka man tudkhil an-nār faqad akhzaytah,

translation.en: Our Lord, indeed whoever You admit to the Fire - You have disgraced him,

segments.transliteration: Wa mā li-ẓẓālimīn min anṣār (192),

translation.en: And for the wrongdoers there are no helpers (192),

segments.arabic: رَّبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًا يُنَادِي لِلْإِيمَانِ أَنْ آمِنُوا بِرَبِّكُمْ ،
segments.transliteration: Rabbana innanā samiʿnā munādiyan yunādī lil-īmān an āminū bi-rabbikum,

translation.en: Our Lord, indeed we have heard a caller calling to faith, [saying], 'Believe in your Lord,'

segments.transliteration: Fa-āmannā, rabbana fa-aghfir lanā dhunūbanā,

translation.en: And we have believed, so forgive us our sins,

segments.transliteration: Wa kaffir ʿannā sayyiʾātinā,

translation.en: And remove from us our misdeeds,

segments.transliteration: Wa tawaffanā maʿa al-abrār (193),

translation.en: And cause us to die with the righteous (193),

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدتَّنَا عَلَىٰ رُسُلِكَ ،
segments.transliteration: Rabbana wa ātinā mā waʿadttanā ʿalā rusulik,

translation.en: Our Lord, and grant us what You promised us through Your messengers,

segments.transliteration: Wa lā tukhzinā yawm al-qiyāmah,

translation.en: And do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection,

segments.transliteration: Innaka lā tukhlif al-mīʿād (194).

translation.en: Indeed, You do not fail in [Your] promise (194).

segments.transliteration: Subḥān rabbi aṣ-ṣabāḥ,

translation.en: Glory be to the Lord of the morning,

segments.transliteration: Fāliqi al-iṣbāḥ,

translation.en: The Cleaver of the dawn,

segments.transliteration: Wa jāʿili al-layl sakanan,

translation.en: And the Maker of the night for rest,

segments.transliteration: Wa ash-shamsi wa al-qamar ḥusbānā.

translation.en: And the sun and the moon for reckoning.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ أَوَّلَ يَوْمِي هَذَا صَلَاحاً ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ajʿal awwal yawmī hādhā ṣalāḥā,

translation.en: O Allah, make the beginning of my day righteous,

segments.transliteration: Wa awsaṭahu najāḥā,

translation.en: And its middle successful,

segments.transliteration: Wa ākhirahu falāḥā.

translation.en: And its end prosperous.

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa man aṣbaḥa wa ḥājatuhu,

translation.en: O Allah, whoever begins their day seeking their need,

segments.transliteration: Wa ṭalibatuhu ilā makhlūq,

translation.en: And directs their request to a creature,

segments.transliteration: Fa-inna ḥājatī wa ṭalibatī ilayka waḥdaka,

translation.en: Then indeed, my need and my request are directed to You alone,

segments.transliteration: Lā sharīk laka.

translation.en: You have no partner.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ.

segments.transliteration: Ya fattahu

translation.en: O Opener

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاََّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: tawakkaltu ʿala alhayyi alladhi la yamutu

translation.en: I put my trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah, Who has not taken a wife or a son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: and Who has not have a partner in the kingdom,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun min aldhdhulli

translation.en: and Who has not have a helper to save Him from disgrace;

segments.transliteration: wa kabbirhu takbiran

translation.en: and magnify Him with all magnificence.

segments.transliteration: bismillahi

translation.en: In the Name of Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Household.

segments.transliteration: wa ufawwidu amri ila allahi

translation.en: "I confide my cause unto Allah.

segments.transliteration: inna allaha basirun bilʿibadi

translation.en: Surely, Allah is Seer of His slaves.

segments.transliteration: fawaqahu allahu sayyi'ati ma makaru

translation.en: So, Allah warded off from him the evils which they plotted."

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta subhanaka

translation.en: "There is no god save You. Be You Glorified!

segments.transliteration: inni kuntu mina alzzalimina

translation.en: Lo! I have been a wrongdoer.

segments.transliteration: fastajabna lahu wa najjaynahu mina alghammi

translation.en: Then, We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish.

segments.transliteration: wa kadhalika nunji almu'minina

translation.en: Thus do We save the believers."

segments.transliteration: hasbuna allahu wa niʿma alwakilu

translation.en: "Allah is Sufficient for us! Most Excellent is He in Whom we trust.

segments.transliteration: fanqalabu biniʿmatin mina allahi wa fadlin

translation.en: So, they returned with grace and favor from Allah,

segments.transliteration: lam yamsas-hum su'un

translation.en: and no harm touched them."

segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu

translation.en: Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither strength nor power save with Allah.

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ مَا شَاءَ ٱلنَّاسُ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu la ma sha'a alnnasu

translation.en: Only that which Allah, but not people, wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنْ كَرِهَ ٱلنَّاسُ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu wa in kariha alnnasu

translation.en: Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass even if people detest it.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya alrrabbu mina almarbubina

translation.en: Sufficient for me is the Lord against the lorded.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya alkhaliqu mina almakhluqina

translation.en: Sufficient for me is the Creator against the creatures.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya alrraziqu mina almarzuqina

translation.en: Sufficient for me is the Sustainer against the sustained.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya allahu rabbu alʿalamina

translation.en: Sufficient for me is Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: hasbi man huwa hasbi

translation.en: Sufficient for me is He Who is sufficient for me.

segments.transliteration: hasbi man lam yazal hasbi

translation.en: Sufficient for me is He Who has been always sufficient for me.

segments.arabic: حَسْبِي مَنْ كَانَ مُذْ كُنْتُ لَمْ يَزَلْ حَسْبِي
segments.transliteration: hasbi man kana mudh kuntu lam yazal hasbi

translation.en: Sufficient for me is He Who had been since eternity and still sufficient for me.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya allahu la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: "Allah suffices me. There is no god save Him.

segments.transliteration: ʿalayhi tawakkaltu

translation.en: In Him have I put my trust,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa rabbu alʿarshi alʿazimi

translation.en: and He is the Lord of the Tremendous Throne."

text.en: Background of dua
Our master scholar, Shaykh al-Nuri,

10.Qutub Rawandi reported from Imam Ali (as) that the Holy Prophet (saws) has stated, that he was afraid for him who does not remember the 4 blessings at dawn & as a result , may be snatched away from him

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ عَرَّفَنِيْ نَفْسَهٗ وَ لَمْ يَتْرُكْنِيْ عَمْيَانَ الْقَلْبِ
segments.transliteration: alh'amdu lillaahil lad'ee a'rrafnee nafsahoo wa lam yatruknee u'myaanal qalbi

translation.en: All Praise to Allah who made Himself known to me & did not make me blind hearted

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ جَعَلَنِيْ مِنْ اُمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ اٰلِه
segments.transliteration: alh'amdu lillaahil lad'ee ja-a'lanee min ummati muh'ammadin s'allallaahu a'layji wa aalihee wa sallam

translation.en: All Praise to Allah who included me among the followers of Muhammad (saws)

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ جَعَلَ رِزْقِيْ فِيْ يَدَيْهِ وَ لَمْ يَجْعَلْ رِزْقِيْ فِي اَيْدِيْ النَّاسِ
segments.transliteration: alh'amdu lillaahil lad'ee ja-a'la rizqee fee yadihee wa lam yaj-a'lhu fee aydin naasi

translation.en: All Praise to Allah who has ordained my sustenance to be in HIS own hands & not in the hands of human beings

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ سَتَرَ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ عُيُوْبِيْ وَ لَمْ يَفْضَحْنِيْ بَيْنَ الْخَلَايِقِ.
segments.transliteration: alh'amdu lillaahil lad'ee satara u'yoobee wa lam yafz'ah'nee baynan naasi

translation.en: All Praise to Allah who has covered my sins & shortcomings & did not degrade me in the eyes of Human beings

text.en: 11.Syeda Fatima Zehra (sa) supplication after the Morning Prayer]

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهٗ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهٗ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِيْ وَ يُمِيْتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ، وَ هُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ.
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul mulko wa lahul hamdo, yohyee wa yomeeto, be-yadehil khayro, wa howa a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer.

translation.en: There is no god, except Allah, the one, there is no partner for Him. For Him is the kingdom and for Him is the praise. He enlivens and gives death, in His hands is the good. And He is powerful over everything.

text.en: Ten times after the Morning Prayer, and ten times after Maghrib Prayer; all these would earn ten rewards, and ten sins would be forgiven each of them being equal to freeing slave from the progeny of Ismail, and no sin would be there on anyone, except the polytheist. And it is protection for you from all Satans and all evils if you recite between morning and evening

segments.transliteration: asbahtu allahumma muʿtasiman bidhimamika almaniʿi

translation.en: O Allah, I have begun this morning seeking refuge with Your invulnerable security

segments.transliteration: alladhi la yutawalu wa la yuhawalu

translation.en: that is neither touched nor caught

segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ghashimin wa tariqin

translation.en: against the evil of all oppressive and domineering ones

segments.arabic: مِنْ سَائِرِ مَنْ خَلَقْتَ وَمَا خَلَقْتَ
segments.transliteration: min sa'iri man khalaqta wa ma khalaqta

translation.en: from among all Your animate and inanimate creatures

segments.transliteration: min khalqika alssamiti walnnatiqi

translation.en: both the silent and the speaking;

segments.transliteration: fi junnatin min kulli makhufin

translation.en: and being in protection against all terrifying things;

segments.transliteration: bilibasin sabighatin

translation.en: and being in the complete garb

segments.transliteration: wa la'i ahli bayti nabiyyika

translation.en: of my loyalty to the Household of Your Prophet;

segments.arabic: مُحْتَجِباً مِنْ كُلِّ قَاصِدٍ لِي إِلىٰ أَذِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: muhtajiban min kulli qasidin li ila adhiyyatin

translation.en: and veiling myself against all those who intend harm to me,

segments.transliteration: bijidarin hasinin

translation.en: behind an impervious wall,

segments.transliteration: al-ikhlasi fil-iʿtirafi bihaqqihim

translation.en: which is my sincerity in the profession of their (Divinely commissioned) right (of leadership)

segments.transliteration: walttamassuki bihablihim

translation.en: and my adherence to their Rope,

segments.transliteration: muqinan anna alhaqqa lahum wa maʿahum

translation.en: and bearing with certainty that the Right is theirs, with them,

segments.transliteration: wa fihim wa bihim

translation.en: in them, and amid them.

segments.transliteration: uwali man walaw

translation.en: I thus accede to those whom they accept

segments.transliteration: wa ujanibu man janabu

translation.en: and depart those whom they depart.

segments.transliteration: fa-aʿidhni allahumma bihim

translation.en: O Allah, protect me, in the names of them,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ مَا أَتَّقيهِ يَا عَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ma attaqihi ya ʿazimu

translation.en: against the evil of all that which I fear, O All-great.

segments.arabic: حَجَزْتُ ٱلأَعَادِيَ عَنِّي بِبَدِيعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: hajaztu al-aʿadiya ʿanni bibadiʿi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: I am restraining the enemies against me through the Originator of the heavens and the earth;

segments.transliteration: inna jaʿalna min bayni aydihim saddan

translation.en: "And We have set a bar before them

segments.transliteration: wa min khalfihim saddan

translation.en: and a bar behind them,

segments.transliteration: fa-aghshaynahum fahum la yubsiruna

translation.en: and (thus) have covered them so that they see not."

text.en: 13.Dua From Holy Prophet(saws) From Mufeed al-Deen in al-Majaalis:

Narrated from Abi Barzah al-Aslami from his father who said: When the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) had offered the Fajr Prayer, he (s.a.w.a.) raised his voice until his companions could hear him say the foll three times each :

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِيْ دِيْنِيَ الَّذِيْ جَعَلْتَهٗ لِيْ عِصْمَةً.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee deeneyal lazee ja-a’ltahu lee i’smatan.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me the religion that You have made a safeguard for me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِيْ جَعَلْتَ فِيْهَا مَعَاشِيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee dunyaayal latee ja-a’lta feehaa ma-a’ashee.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me this world that You have made me live in.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِيْ آخِرَتِيَ الَّتِيْ جَعَلْتَ اِلَيْهَا مَرْجَعِيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee aakherateyal latee ja-a’lta elayhaa marja-e’e.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me my hereafter that you have made my place of return.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ نِقْمَتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo berezaaka min sakhateka wa a-o’ozo be-a’fweka min niqmateka.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with Your pleasure from Your ire and I seek refuge with Your forgiveness from Your wrath.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا اَعْطَيْتَ وَ لَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَ لَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka laa maane-a’ lemaa a-a’tayta wa laa mo’teya lemaa mana’ta wa laa yanfa-o’ zal jadde minkaljaddo.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You – nobody can deny to the one whom You have given, and nobody can give to the one whom You have denied and nobody's efforts come to fruition without You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مَتِّعْنِيْ بِسَمْعِيْ وَ بَصَرِيْ وَ اجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَارِثَيْنِ مِنِّيْ وَ اَرِنِيْ ثَارِيْ مِنْ عَدُوِّيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma matte’nee be-sam-e’e wa basaree waj a’lhomal waaresayne minnee wa arenee saaree min a’duwwee.

translation.en: O Allah! Grant me the use of my hearing and sight and let them stay with me till my death and show me the destruction of my enemies.

text.en: 14.In al-Faqeeh: The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) used to say after the Fajr prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَ الْحُزْنِ وَ الْعَجْزِ وَ الْكَسَلِ وَ الْبُخْلِ وَ الْجُبْنِ وَ ضَلْعِ الدَّيْنِ وَ غَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ وَ بَوَارِ الْاَيَّمِ وَ الْغَفْلَةِ وَ الذِّلَّةِ وَ الْقَسْوَةِ وَ الْعَيْلَةِ وَ الْمَسْكَنَةِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka menal hamme wal huzne wal a’jze wal kasale wal bukhle wal jubne wa zal-i’d dayne wa ghalabatir rejaale wa bawaaril ayyaame wal ghaflate waz zillate wal qaswate wal a’ylate wal maskanate

translation.en: O Allah! I seek protection with You from grief and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, turning away from the truth and idle talk of men, wasting time and negligence, vileness and cruelty, destitution and poverty.

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ وَ مِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ وَ مِنْ عَيْنٍ لَا تَدْمَعُ وَ مِنْ دُعَاءٍ لَا يُسْمَعُ وَ مِنْ صَلَاةٍ لَا تَنْفَعُ (تُرْفَعُ)
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min nafsin laa tashba-o’ wa min qalbin laa yakhsha-o’ wa min a’ynin laa tadma-o’ wa min do-a’a-in laa yusma-o’ wa min salaatin laa tanfa-o’ (turfa-o’)

translation.en: And I seek protection with You from the self that never gets satisfied, the heart that does not humble itself, the eye that does not shed tears, the supplication that is not heard, the prayer that does not benefit.

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنِ امْرَاَةٍ تُشَيِّبُنِيْ قَبْلَ اَوَانَ مَشِيْبِيْ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَلَدٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ رِبًّا وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ مَالٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ عَذَابًا وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ صَاحِبِ خَدِيْعَةٍ اِنْ رَاَى حَسَنَةٍ دَفَنَهَا وَ اِنْ رَاَىْ سَيِّئَةً اَفْشَاهَا.
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka menim ra-atin toshayyebonee qabla awaana masheebee wa a-o’ozo beka min waladin yakoono a’layya ribban wa a-o’ozo beka min maalin yakoono a’layya a’zaaban wa a-o’ozo beka min saahebe khadee-a’tin in ra-ay hasanatin da-fa-nahaa wa in ra-ay sayye-atan afshaahaa.

translation.en: And I seek protection with You from a woman who makes me old before my time, and I seek protection with You from a son who subjugates me, and I seek protection with You from wealth that is a torment for me, and I seek protection from the deceiver who conceals any good that he sees and propagates any evil that he sees.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْ لِفَاجِرٍ عَلَيَّ (عِنْدِيْ) يَدًا وَ لَا مِنَّةً.
segments.transliteration: allahumma laa taj-a’l le-faajerin a’layya (i’ndee) yadan wa laa minnatan.

translation.en: O Allah! Do not let an insolent one ever do me a favor and do not make him expect anything from me.

text.en: [1] al-Faqeeh, vol. 1, p. 335; Behaar al-Anwaar, vol. 86, p. 186

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَ کُنْ لِوَلِيِّكَ فِيْ خَلْقِكَ وَ لِيَا وَ حَافِظًا وَ قَائِدًا وَ نَاصِرًا حَتّيٰ تُسْكِنَهُ اَرْضَكَ طَوْعًا وَ تُمَتِّعَهُ مِنْهَا (فِيْهِا) طَوِيْلًا،وَ تَجْعَلَهُ وَ ذُرِّيَّتَهُ فِيْهِا اْلاَئِمَّةَ الْوَارِثِيْنَ،وَ اجْمَعْ لَهُ شَمْلَهُ،وَ اَکْمِلْ لَهُ اَمْرَهُ،وَ اَصْلِحْ لَهُ رَعِيَّتَهُ،وَ ثَبِّتْ رُکْنَهُ،وَ اَفْرِغِ الصَّبْرَ مِنْكَ عَلَيْهِ حَتّيٰ يَنْتَقِمَ،فِيْشْتَفِيْ وَ يَشْفِيْ حَزَازَاتِ قُلُوْبٍ نَغِلَةٍ وَ حَرَارَاتِ صُدُرٍ وَ غِرَةٍ وَ حَسَرَاتِ اَنْفُسٍ تَرِحَةٍ،مَنْ دِمَاءٍ مَسْفُوكَةٍ وَ اَرْحَامٍ مَقْطُوْعَةٍ وَ طَاعَةٍ مَجْهُوْلَةٍ،قَدْ اَحْسَنْتَ اِلَيْهِ الْبَلاَءَ وَ وَ سَّعْتَ عَلَيْهِ اْلآلاَءَ وَ اَتْمَمْتَ عَلَيْهِ النَّعْمَاءَ فِيْ حُسْنِ الْحِفْظِ مِنْكَ لَهُ،اَللَّهُمَّ اکْفِهِ هَوْلَ عَدُوِّهِ،وَ اَنْسِهِمْ ذِکْرَهُ،وَ اَرِدْ مَنْ اَرَادَهُ وَ كِدْ مَنْ كَادَهُ،وَ امْکُرْ بِمَنْ مَكَرَ بِهِ وَ اجْعَلْ دَائِرَةَ السَّوْءِ عَلَيْهِمْ...
segments.transliteration: Allahumma wa kun liwaliyyika fi khalkika wa liya wa hafidhan wa qaidan wa nasiran hatta tuskina-hu ardhaka taw'an wa tumatti'ahu minha (feeha) tawila, wa taj'alahu wa dhurriyyatahu feeha ala-immatan warithin, wa ajma' lahu shamlahu, wa akmil lahu amrahu, wa aslih lahu ra'iyatahu, wa thabbit ruknahu, wa afrighi al-sabr minaka alayhi hatta yantaqima, fayashtafi wa yashfi hazazat qulubin naghilatin wa hararat sudadin wa ghira wa hasarat anfusin tarihat, man dima'in masfukatin wa arhamin maqtu'atin wa ta'atan majhulatin, qad ahsanta ilayhi al-balaa'a wa wasa'ta alayhi al-ala'a wa atmmata alayhi al-ni'maa fi husni al-hifzi minka lahu, Allahumma ikfihi hawla aduwwihi, wa ansihim dhikrahu, wa arid man aradahu wa kid man kadahu, wa amkur bi man makara bihi wa aj'al da'irat al-suu'i alayhim...

translation.en: Make him and his descendants among the leaders (imams) who inherit (the knowledge and authority), and bring together his family, complete his affair, set right his subjects, strengthen his foundation, pour upon him your patience until he takes vengeance and thus relieves the sorrow and cures the afflictions of hearts wounded, and chests inflamed, and souls oppressed, from spilled blood, severed wombs, and unknown obedience. You have been gracious to him in the calamities you have brought upon him, and you have extended to him your bounties, and you have completed your blessings to him in the excellence of preserving him. O Allah, suffice him against the aggression of his enemies, increase their mention of him, turn back whoever intends evil towards him, scheme against those who scheme against him, and encircle them with (divine) disfavor."

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمََّّ صَلِّ عَليٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ.
segments.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa ali Muhammadin wa 'ajjil farajahum.

translation.en: "O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, and hasten their relief."

segments.arabic: اٰمَنْتُ بِاللهِ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهُ وَ كَفَرْتُ بِالْجِبْتِ وَ الطَّاغُوْتِ،وَ اٰمَنْتُ بِسِرِّ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلَانِيَتِهِمْ،وَ ظَاهِرِهِمْ وَ بَاطِنِهِمْ وَ اَوَّلِهِمْ وَ اٰخِرِهِمْ۔
segments.transliteration: "Amantu billahi waḥdahu lā sharīka lahū wa kafartu bil-jibt wa al-ṭāghūt, wa amantu bi-sirri āli Muḥammadin wa ʿalāniyatihim, wa ẓāhirihim wa bāṭinihim wa awwalihim wa ākhirihim.

translation.en: I believe in Allah alone, with no partners, and I reject idols and false deities. I believe in the secrets and manifestations of the family of Muhammad, their outward and inward qualities, their beginning and their end

text.en: Imam Sadiq(as) Dua

segments.arabic: أَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ اكْتُبَا رَحِمَكُمَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: Astaghfirullahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem. Iktubaa rahimakumallah.'

translation.en: "I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan. Write (it), may Allah have mercy on you both."

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرّحمنِ الرَّحِيمِ أَمْسَيْتُ وَ أَصْبَحْتُ بِاللَّهِ مُؤْمِناً عَلَى دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ (صلّى اللهُ عليه وآله) وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَ عَلَى دِينِ عَلِيٍّ (عليه السَّلامُ) وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَ عَلَى دِينِ فَاطِمَةَ (عليها السَّلامُ) وَ سُنَّتِهَا وَ عَلَى دِينِ الْأَوْصِيَاءِ صَلَواتُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَسُنَّتِهِمْآمَنْتُ بِسِرِّهِمْ وَعَلَانِيَتِهِمْ وَبِغَيْبِهِمْ وَشَهَادَتِهِمْ وَأَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ فِي لَيْلَتِي هَذِهِ وَيَوْمِي هَذَا مِمَّا اسْتَعَاذَ مِنْهُ مُحَمَّدٌ وَعَلِيٌّ وَفَاطِمَةُ وَالْأَوْصِيَاءُ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَأَرْغَبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ فِيمَا رَغِبُوا فِيهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ.
segments.transliteration: Bismi Allāhi Ar-Raḥmāni Ar-Raḥīm. 'Amsaytu wa 'asbahtu billāhi mu'minan 'alā dīni Muḥammadin (ṣallá Allāhu ʿalayhi wa-ālihī wa-sallam) wa sunnatihi wa 'alā dīni 'Alīyyin (ʿalayhi as-salām) wa sunnatihi wa 'alā dīni Fāṭimata (ʿalayha as-salām) wa sunnatiha wa 'alā dīni al-'awṣiyā'i ṣalawātu Allāhi ʿalayhim was-sunnatihim. Āmantu bisirrihim wa 'alāniyatihim wa bighaybihim wa shahādatihim wa astaʿīthu bi-Allāhi fī laylatī hādhā wayamī hādhā mimma ista'ādha minhu Muḥammadun Wa'aliyyun wa-Fatimatu wal-Awsiyaa'u salla Allahu 'alayhim wa-arghabu ila Allahi feema raghibu fihi wa-la hawla wa-la quwwata illa billah..

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Compassionate. I have become a believer in Allah, on the religion of Muhammad (peace be upon him) and his Sunnah, on the religion of Ali (peace be upon him) and his Sunnah, and on the religion of Fatima (peace be upon her) and her Sunnah, and the religion of the Awsiya (peace be upon them) and their Sunnah. I believe in their secrets and their public actions, and I seek refuge in Allah in this night of mine and in my day from what Muhammad, Ali, Fatima, and the Awsiya sought refuge from. I ask Allah for what they asked for, and there is no power or strength except in Allah.

segments.transliteration: Bismillāh ar-Raḥmān ar-Raḥīm

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: يَا مَاجِدُ يَا جَوَادُ يَا حَيّاً حِينَ لَا حَيَّ
segments.transliteration: Yā Mājid, Yā Jawād, Yā Ḥayyān ḥīna lā ḥayy

translation.en: O Majestic One, O Generous One, O Ever-Living when none lives.

segments.transliteration: Yā Fard, Yā Munfaridan bil-waḥdāniyyah

translation.en: O Unique One, O the One Alone in Oneness.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَشْتَبِهُ عَلَيْهِ الْأَصْوَاتُ
segments.transliteration: Yā man lā yashtabihu ‘alayhi al-aṣwāt

translation.en: O He to whom no voices are confusing.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ اللُّغَاتُ
segments.transliteration: Yā man lā yakhfā ‘alayhi al-lughāt

translation.en: O He to whom no languages are hidden.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ ما تَحْمِلُ كُلُّ أُنْثى
segments.transliteration: Yā man ya‘lamu mā taḥmilu kullu unthā

translation.en: O He who knows what every female bears.

segments.transliteration: Wa mā taghīḍu al-arḥāmu wa mā tazdād

translation.en: And what the wombs reduce and what they increase.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ خائِنَةَ الْأَعْيُنِ وما تُخْفِي الصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: Yā man ya‘lamu khā’inat al-a‘yun wa mā tukhfī aṣ-ṣudūr

translation.en: O He who knows the betrayal of the eyes and what hearts conceal.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِسَرِيرَتِي مِنِّي بِهَا
segments.transliteration: Yā man huwa a‘lamu bisarīratī minnī bihā

translation.en: O He who knows my secrets better than I know them.

segments.transliteration: Yā Mālik al-ashyā’ qabla takwīnihā

translation.en: O Owner of all things before their creation.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْمَكْنُونِ الْمَخْزُونِ الْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ
segments.transliteration: As’aluka bismika al-maknūn al-makhzūn al-ḥayy al-qayyūm

translation.en: I ask You by Your hidden and preserved Name, the Living, the Sustainer.

segments.transliteration: Alladhī huwa nūrun min nūr

translation.en: Who is Light from Light.

segments.transliteration: Wa as’aluka binūrika as-sāṭi‘ fī aẓ-ẓulumāt

translation.en: And I ask You by Your radiant Light in the darkness.

segments.arabic: وسُلْطَانِكَ الْغَالِبِ ومُلْكِكَ الْقَاهِرِ لِمَنْ دُونَكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa sulṭānika al-ghālib wa mulkika al-qāhir liman dūnaka

translation.en: And by Your prevailing authority and overpowering sovereignty over all.

segments.arabic: وبِقُدْرَتِكَ الَّتِي بِهَا تُذِلُّ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa biqudratika allātī bihā tudhillu kulla shay’

translation.en: And by Your power through which You humble all things.

segments.transliteration: Wa biraḥmatika allātī wasi‘at kulla shay’

translation.en: And by Your mercy which encompasses all things.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: As’aluka an tuṣallī ‘alā Muḥammad wa āli baytihi

translation.en: I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and his family.

segments.arabic: وأَنْ تُعِيذَنِي مِنْ جَمِيعِ مَضَلَّاتِ الْفِتَنِ
segments.transliteration: Wa an tu‘īdhani min jamī‘ maḍallāt al-fitan

translation.en: And to protect me from all misguiding trials.

segments.arabic: ومِنْ شَرِّ جَمِيعِ مَا يَخَافُ أَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri jamī‘ mā yakhāfu aḥadun min khalqik

translation.en: And from the evil of all that any of Your creation fears.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ وأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: Innaka Samī‘ ad-du‘ā’ wa anta Arḥam ar-Rāḥimīn

translation.en: Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplications, and You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ هٰذِهٖ صَلَاتِيْ صَلَّيْتُهَا لَا لِحَاجَۃٍ مِنْکَ اِلَيْهَا، وَ لَا رَغْبَۃٍ مِنْکَ فِيْهَا اِلَّا تَعْظِيْمًا وَ طَاعَۃً وَ اِجَابَۃً لَکَ اِلٰي مَا اَمَرْتَنِيْ بِهٖ. اِلٰهِيْ اِنْ کَانَ فِيْهَا خَلَلٌ اَوْ نَقْصٌ مِنْ رُکُوْعِهَا اَوْ سُجُوْدِهَا، فَلَا تُؤَاخِذْنِيْ وَ تَفَضَّلَ عَلَيَّ بِالْقُبُوْلِ وَ الْغُفْرَانِ بِرَحْمَتِکَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: Elaahee Haazehi Salaatee Sallaytohaa Laa Le-Haajatin Minka Elayhaa, Wa Laa Raghbatin Minka Feehaa Illaa Ta’zeeman Wa Taa-A’tan Wa Ejaabatan Laka Elaa Maa Amartanee Behi. Elaahee In Kaana Feehaa Khalalun Aw Naqsum Min Rokoo-E’haa Aw Sojoodehaa, Falaa To-Aakhiznee Wa Tafazzal A’layya Bil-Qaboole Wal Ghufraane Be-Rahmateka Yaa Arhamar Raahemeen.

translation.en: O Allah! This is my prayer that I have just offered on account of neither a need that You may have for it nor a desire that You may have for it; rather, it is only glorification of You, obedience to You, and response to You to carry out what You have ordered me to do. O my God: If there is a defect or a deficiency in my prayer, whether in the genuflection or the prostration; then do not reproach me for it; rather, confer upon me with Your acceptance (of it) and forgiveness (of me) by Your Mercy, O the Most Merciful!

text.en: Dua Ahad after Fajr PrayersZiyarah of Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him) after Fajr PrayersDua Sabahby Imam Ali (peace be upon him)Dua Hareeqby Syeda Fatima (sa)Surah Yasin

20.Six verses to protect from AdversityImam Ali (peace be upon him) said:"Whoever recites these six verses every morning, Allah will protect them from any adversity, even if they were already in danger."
Bihar al-Anwar, Vol.83. Pg.337

segments.arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّـهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلَانَا ۚ وَعَلَى اللَّـهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ*

translation.en: "Say, 'Nothing will befall us except what Allah has ordained for us. He is our Master, and in Allah let the faithful trust.'"(al-Tawbah, 9: 51)

segments.arabic: وَإِن يَمْسَسْكَ اللَّـهُ بِضُرٍّ فَلَا كَاشِفَ لَهُ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ وَإِن يُرِدْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَلَا رَادَّ لِفَضْلِهِ ۚ يُصِيبُ بِهِ مَن يَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ ۚ وَهُوَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ*

translation.en: "And if Allah should touch you with affliction, none can remove it save He; and if He intends for you good, none can hold back His Bounty. He causes it to reach whomsoever He wills among His servants. And He is the Forgiving, the Merciful." (Yunus, 10: 107)

segments.arabic: وَمَا مِن دَابَّةٍ فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا عَلَى اللَّـهِ رِزْقُهَا وَيَعْلَمُ مُسْتَقَرَّهَا وَمُسْتَوْدَعَهَا ۚ كُلٌّ فِي كِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ*

translation.en: "And there is no creature on earth but that its sustenance lies with Allah, and He knows its [enduring] abode and its temporary place of lodging. All is in a manifest Book."Hud, 11: 6)

segments.arabic: وَكَأَيِّن مِّن دَابَّةٍ لَّا تَحْمِلُ رِزْقَهَا اللَّـهُ يَرْزُقُهَا وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۚ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ*

translation.en: "And how many a creature bears not its own provision, yet God provides for it and for you? And He is the All-Hearing and All-Knowing."(al-'Ankabut, 29: 60)

segments.arabic: مَّا يَفْتَحِ اللَّـهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِن رَّحْمَةٍ فَلَا مُمْسِكَ لَهَا ۖ وَمَا يُمْسِكْ فَلَا مُرْسِلَ لَهُ مِن بَعْدِهِ ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ*

translation.en: "Whatever mercy Allah unfolds for mankind, none shall withhold. And whatever he withholds, none shall release thereafter. And He is the Almighty, the Wise."(al-Fatir, 35: 2)

segments.arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّـهُ ۚ قُلْ أَفَرَأَيْتُم مَّا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّـهِ إِنْ أَرَادَنِيَ اللَّـهُ بِضُرٍّ هَلْ هُنَّ كَاشِفَاتُ ضُرِّهِ أَوْ أَرَادَنِي بِرَحْمَةٍ هَلْ هُنَّ مُمْسِكَاتُ رَحْمَتِهِ ۚ قُلْ حَسْبِيَ اللَّـهُ عَلَيْهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ الْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ*
segments.transliteration: "And were you to ask them, 'Who created the heavens and the earth?' They would surely say, 'Allah.' Say, ‘Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allah? Should Allah desire some harm for me, can they remove His Harm? Or, should He desire some mercy for me, can they withhold His Mercy?’ Say, ‘Allah is sufficient for me. In Him, let the trusting put their trust.’" (al-Zumar, 39:38)

translation.en: *After reciting above verses say:*

segments.arabic: حسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لا إِلهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَکَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ وَأَمْتَنِعُ بِحَوْلِ اللَّهِ وَقُوَّتِهِ مِنْ حَوْلِهِمْ وَقُوَّتِهِمْ وَأَسْتَشْفِعُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ مِنْ شَرِّ ما خَلَقَ وَأَعُوذُ بِمَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا قُوَّهَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.*

translation.en: "Say, 'Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god except Him. In Him, I put my trust, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne. I seek protection in Allah's Power and Strength from that of others, and I ask the intercession of the Lord of the Daybreak from the evil of what He has created. I seek refuge in what Allah wills; there is no power except with Allah, the Exalted, the Magnificent.'"

segments.arabic: ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مَخْرَجًا
segments.transliteration: wa maiyn yattaqil laaha yaj'al lahoo makhrajaa

translation.en: Whoever is wary of Allah, He shall make for him a way out [of the adversities of the world and the Hereafter]

segments.transliteration: Wa yarzuqhu min haisu laa yahtasib;

translation.en: and provide for him from whence he does not count upon.

segments.arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ
segments.transliteration: wa many yatawakkal 'alal laahi fahuwa husbuh;

translation.en: And whoever puts his trust in Allah, He will suffice him.

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدْرًا
segments.transliteration: innal laaha baalighu amrih; qad ja'alal laahu likulli shai'in qadraa

translation.en: Indeed Allah carries through His commands. Certainly, Allah has ordained a measure [and extent] for everything.

text.en: Dh'ur and Asr TaqeebatRecited after the obligatory salat.
Before zuhr
Dh'ur Taqeeb
Dhu'r more.
Asr Taqeeb
Asr more
Common /Res
1.From Misbah al-Mutahajjid:

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ ٱلْحَلِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu alʿazimu alhalimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah, the All-great and Most Forbearing.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيـمِ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu rabbu alʿarshi alkarimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah, the Lord of the Throne of Honor.

segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka mujibati rahmatika

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for the motives of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿaza'ima maghfiratika

translation.en: the determining causes of Your forgiveness,

segments.transliteration: walghanimata min kulli birrin

translation.en: the advantage of each act of kindness,

segments.transliteration: walssalamata min kulli ithmin

translation.en: and the safeguarding against each and every sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَدَعْ لِي ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tadaʿ li dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not leave any of my offenses unforgiven,

segments.transliteration: wa la hamman illa farrajtahu

translation.en: any of my misfortunes unrelieved,

segments.transliteration: wa la suqman illa shafaytahu

translation.en: any of my ailments unhealed,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿayban illa satartahu

translation.en: any of my defects uncovered,

segments.transliteration: wa la rizqan illa basattahu

translation.en: any (item of my) sustenance not including (me),

segments.transliteration: wa la khawfan illa amantahu

translation.en: any fear (that I experience) unsecured,

segments.transliteration: wa la su'an illa saraftahu

translation.en: any evil (that comes upon me) uncontrollable,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَاجَةً هِيَ لَكَ رِضاً وَلِيَ فيهَا صَلاَحٌ إِلاَّ قَضَيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la hajatan hiya laka ridan wa liya fiha salahun illa qadaytaha

translation.en: and any need that achieves Your satisfaction and my benefit unanswered.

segments.transliteration: ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.transliteration: amina rabba alʿalamina

translation.en: (please) Respond, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: 2.Repeat the following litany reportedfrom Imam Ja'far Sadiq (peace be upon him)ten times:

segments.transliteration: billahi iʿtasamtu

translation.en: With Allah I seek protection,

segments.transliteration: wa billahi athiqu

translation.en: in Allah I trust,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala allahi atawakkalu

translation.en: and upon Allah I rely.

text.en: 3. Dua from Imam Musa Al Kazim(as):

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ عَظُمَتْ ذُنُوبِي فَأَنْتَ أَعْظَمُ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma in ʿazumat dhunubi fa-anta aʿzamu

translation.en: O Allah! if my sins are enormous, surely You are more Tremendous.

segments.transliteration: wa in kabura tafriti fa-anta akbaru

translation.en: If my transgression has exceeded all limits, surely You are Greater.

segments.transliteration: wa in dama bukhli fa-anta ajwadu

translation.en: If my stinginess has perpetuated, surely You are more Generous.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱغْفِرْ لِي عَظيمَ ذُنُوبِي بِعَظِيمِ عَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir li ʿazima dhunubi biʿazimi ʿafwika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) forgive my enormous sins out of Your tremendous pardon,

segments.transliteration: wa kathira tafriti bizahiri karamika

translation.en: forgive my limitless transgression out of Your obvious generosity,

segments.transliteration: waqmaʿ bukhli bifadli judika

translation.en: and impede my stinginess by the virtue of Your magnanimity.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَة فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: There is no god save You.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayka

translation.en: I pray Your forgiveness and I repent before You.

text.en: Recite Surah Naba
4.Syeda Fatima Zahra (peace be upon her) Dua after Dhuhr Salat
Recitations :-5 |Imam Ridha(as)6 |& 7 |8 Imam Ali(as) |9. Ya Same Kulle Saut|

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمّ صَلّ عَلٰي مُحَمّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمّدٍ وَ عَجّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ.

translation.en: 6.Imam Ridha (peace be upon him)is reported to have said, 'When you finish the Dhuhr Prayer, raise your hands and say:'

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اِنّي اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allahuma Inni Ataqqarabu Elaika B-Jodik Wa-Karamik,

translation.en: O Allah, I seek closeness towards you through your goodness and generosity,

segments.transliteration: Wa Ataqarabu Elaika B Mohammed Abdik Wa-Rasoolik,

translation.en: and I closeness towards you through Muhammad; your servant and messenger,

segments.arabic: وَاَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ بِمَلائِكَتِكَ الْمُقَرَّبينَ وَاَنْبِيَائِكَ وَرُسُلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa Ataqarabu Elaika B Malaikatik Al Moqarabeen Wa Anbiyaik Wa Rosolik,

translation.en: and I seek closeness towards you through your closest most dearest angles, prophets and apostles;

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّد عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ وَعَلى آلِ مُحَمَّد،
segments.transliteration: An Tosali Ala Mohammed Abdik Wa Rasoolik Wa Ala Aali Mohammed,

translation.en: That to send your blessings onto Muhammed your servant and messenger and onto Muhammad's progeny,

segments.arabic: وَاْنَ تُقيلَني عَثْرَتي وَتَسْتُرَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوبي وَتَغْفِرَها لي،
segments.transliteration: Wa An Tqilni Asrati Wa-Tastor Ala Znoobi Wa Tagfirha Lee

translation.en: That so you let go of what I have stumbled upon and that you cover my sins and you forgive them for me

segments.arabic: وَتَقْضِيَ لي حَوائجي وَلا تُعَذِّبْني بِقَبيحٍ كانَ مِنّي،
segments.transliteration: Wa Taqdi Lee Hawaeiji Wa La Toazbni B Qabeehin Kaan Min-ni

translation.en: and grant me my needs and do not torment me due to the filth of what was done by me,

segments.transliteration: Fa Inna Afwaka Wa Joodak Yasaoni

translation.en: For your mercy and generosity suffices me

segments.transliteration: Innaka Ala Kol Shai-in Qadeer

translation.en: As you are capable to do all things

segments.arabic: يَا اَهْلَ التَّقْوٰى وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ اَنْتَ مَوْلَايَ وَ سَيِّدِيْ فَارْزُقْنِيْ اَنْتَ خَيْرٌ لِيْ مِنْ اَبِيْ وَ اُمِّيْ وَ مِنَ النَّاسِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ بِيْ اِلَيْكَ فَقْرٌ وَ فَاقَةٌ وَ اَنْتَ غَنِيٌّ عَنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيْمِ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰى اِخْوَانِهِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ الْاَئـِمَّةِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ وَ تَسْتَجِيْبَ دُعَائِيْ وَ تَرْحَمَ تَضَرُّعِيْ وَ اصْرِفْ عَنِّيْ اَنْوَاعَ الْبَلَاءِ يَا رَحْمٰنُ.
segments.transliteration: Yaa Ahlat Taqwaa Wal Maghferate Yaa Arhamar Raahemeena Anta Mawlaaya Wa Sayyedee Far Zuqnee Anta Khayrun Lee Min Abee Wa Ummee Wa Menan Naase Ajma-E’ena Bee Elayka Faqrun Wa Faaqatun Wa Anta Ghaniyyun A’nnee As-Aloka Be-Wajhekal Kareeme Wa As-Aloka An Tosalleya A’laa Mohammadin Wa Aale Mohammadin Wa A’laa Ikhwaanehin Nabiyyeena Wal A-Immatit Taahereena Wa Tastajeeba Do-A’aa-Ee Wa Tarhama Tazarro-E’e Was Rif A’nnee Anwaa-A’l Balaa-E Yaa Rahmaan.

translation.en:
O the worthiest of being feared and the Lord of forgiveness! O most Merciful! You are my Master and my Lord, provide me sustenance as You are to me better than my father and my mother and all the people. Unto You I am poor and needy, and You are needless.
 I ask You by the name of Your generous face, and I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad and upon his brothers, the Prophets, and the pure Imams, and to accept my prayers, and have mercy upon my acquiescence, and take away from me all sorts of tribulations, O Beneficent!

text.en: 8.Imam Ali(as) prayer after noon prayer

segments.arabic: « اللّهُمَّ ، إنِّي أَتَقَرَّبً إلَيَْكَ بِجُودِكَ ، وَكَرَمِكَ ، وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ ، وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إلَيْكَ بِمَلَائِكَتِكَ المُقَرَّبِينَ ، وَأَنْبِيَائِكَ المُرْسَلِينَ ، وَبِكَ.

translation.en: « O Allah, I draw near to You with Your generosity and I draw near to You through Muhammad Your servant and Messenger, and I draw near to You with Your close angels, Your messenger prophets, and with You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ ، أَنْتَ الغَنِّى عَنِّي ، وَبي الفَاقَةُ إلَيْكَ ، وَأَنْتَ الغَنِيُ ، وَأَنَا الفقيرُ

translation.en: O God, You are the One who is needless of me, and I am in need of You, and You are the Rich, and I am poor.

segments.arabic: إلَيْكَ أقلْتني مِنْ عَثْرَتي ، وَسَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوبي ، فَاقْضِ اليَوْمَ حاجتي ، ولا تُعَذّبْني بِقَبِيحِ ما تَعْلَمُ مِنِّي ، بَلْ عَفْوُكَ وَجُودُكَ يَسَعُني .. »

translation.en: You have lifted me up from my stumble, and covered my sins, so fulfill my need today, and do not torture me due to what is ugly that you know of me, but your forgiveness and your presence are enough for me.. »

segments.arabic: « يا أَهْلَ التَقْوَى ، وَيَا أَهْلَ المَغْفِرَةِ ، يا بِرُّ يا رَحِيمُ ، أَنْتَ أَبرُّ بي مِنْ أَبي ، وَأُمِّي ، وَمِنْ جَمِيعِ الخَلَائِقِ ، إقْبَلْني بِقَضَاءِ حَاجَتي ، مُجَاباً دُعَائي ، مَرْحُوماً صَوْتي ، قَدْ كَشَفْتَ أَنْوَاعَ البَلَاءِ عَنِّي .. »
segments.transliteration: "O people of piety, O people of forgiveness, O righteousness, O merciful, you are more honorable to me than my father, my mother, and all creatures. Accept me by fulfilling my needs and answering my supplications.” Have mercy on my voice, you have revealed all kinds of afflictions from me"

translation.en: 9.Invocation "Ya Samia Kulle Saut"

segments.arabic: يا سامِعَ كُلِّ صَوْتٍ ،يا جامِعَ (كُلِّ فَوْتٍ) ،يا بارِئَ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ ،

translation.en: O' He who hear all voice, O' He who gathered every thing, O' He who created soul after death,

segments.arabic: يا باعِثُ ،يا وارِثُ ،يا سَيِّدَ السَّادَةِ ،يا إِلهَ الْآلِهَةِ ،

translation.en: O' the causer, O' the Inheritor, O' master of the masters, O' God of gods,

segments.arabic: يا جَبَّارَ الْجَبابِرَةِ ،يا مَلِكَ الدُّنْيا وَالْآخِرَةِ ،

translation.en: O' The Mighty over the oppressors, O' The king of this world and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic:
يا رَبَّ الْأَرْبابِ ،
 يا مَلِكَ الْمُلُوكِ

translation.en: O' the Lord of the lords, O' the King of the kings,

segments.arabic:
يا بَطَّاشُ ، يا ذَا الْبَطْشِ الشَّديدِ ،
 يا فَعَّالاً لِما يُريدُ ،

translation.en: O' the vigorous, O' He who attain extreme vigorous, O' He who did what He wishes,

segments.arabic: يا مُحْصِيَ عَدَدِ الْأَنْفاسِ وَنَقْلِ الْأَقْدامِ ،

translation.en: O' He who knows the number of breaths and movement of feet,

segments.arabic: يا مَنِ السِّرُّ عِنْدَهُ عَلانِيَةٌ ،يا مُبْدِئُ ، يا مُعيدُ .

translation.en: O' He who to Him all secrets are visible, O' the starter, O' He who returns every thing.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّكَ عَلى خِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ،وَبِحَقِّهِمُ الَّذي أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ عَلى نَفْسِكَ ،

translation.en: I requested from You by the sake of your right over the best among Your creatures and for the sake of their right you have made incumbent on Yourself

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ السَّلامُ ،وَأَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ بِفِكاكِ رَقَبَتي مِنَ النَّارِ ،وَأَنْجِزْ لِوَلِيِّكَ وَابْنِ نَبِيِّكَ الدَّاعي إِلَيْكَ بِإِذْنِكَ ،

translation.en: to send Your blessing on Muhammad and members of his house and to grant me the rescue of my neck from the Hell fire, execute for Your good friends from the descendant of Your Prophet, the callers to Your course with Your permission,

segments.arabic: وَأَمينِكَ في خَلْقِكَ ،وَعَيْنِكَ في عِبادِكَ ،وَحُجَّتِكَ عَلى خَلْقِكَ ،عَلَيْهِ صَلَواتُكَ وَبَرَكاتُكَ وَعْدَهُ .

translation.en: Your trustee among Your creatures, Your sight among Your servants, Your proof among Your creatures, may Your peace and blessing be upon him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ أَيِّدْهُ بِنَصْرِكَ ،وَانْصُرْ عَبْدَكَ ،وَقَوِّ أَصْحابَهُ وَصَبِّرْهُمْ ،

translation.en: O' Allah! Support him with Your assistance and assist Your servant, empowered his companions and grant them patience

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لَهُمْ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطاناً نَصيراً ،وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُ ،وَأَمْكِنْهُ مِنْ أَعْدائِكَ وَأَعْداءِ رَسُولِكَ ،يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ .
segments.transliteration: Open for them a protected authority and hasten his relief, let him prevail over Yours and Your Prophet's enemies, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

translation.en: The Post-Afternoon ('Asr) Prayer Litanies.

text.en: 2. Post Asr dua as is quoted from Misbah al-Mutahajjid:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god save Him,

segments.transliteration: alhayyu alqayyumu

translation.en: the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,

segments.transliteration: alrrahmani alrrahimu

translation.en: the All-compassionate, the All-merciful,

segments.transliteration: dhu aljalali wal-ikrami

translation.en: and the Lord of Majesty and Honor.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu an yatuba ʿalayya

translation.en: And I ask Him to accept my repentance,

segments.transliteration: tawbata ʿabdin dhalilin khadiʿin

translation.en: like His acceptance of the repentance of a slave who is submissive, acquiescent,

segments.transliteration: faqirin ba'isin

translation.en: poor, miserable,

segments.transliteration: miskinin mustakinin mustajirin

translation.en: despondent, dejected, seeking refuge (with Him),

segments.arabic: لاَ يَمْلِكُ لِنَفْسِهِ نَفْعَاً وَلاَ ضَرّاً
segments.transliteration: la yamliku linafsihi nafʿan wa la darran

translation.en: not controlling for himself any harm or profit,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ مَوْتاً وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ نُشُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa la mawtan wa la hayatan wa la nushuran

translation.en: and not controlling death nor life nor raising (the dead) to life.

text.en: 3. You may then say the following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic:
ا
َللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَشْبَعُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min nafsin la tashbaʿu

translation.en: O Allah, I surely seek Your protection against a self that never has enough,

segments.transliteration: wa min qalbin la yakhshaʿu

translation.en: a heart that does not feel apprehension,

segments.transliteration: wa min ʿilmin la yanfaʿu

translation.en: knowledge that does not avail,

segments.transliteration: wa min salatin la turfaʿu

translation.en: a prayer that is not accepted,

segments.transliteration: wa min duʿa'in la yusmaʿu

translation.en: and a supplication that is not responded.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ ٱلْيُسْرَ بَعْدَ ٱلْعُسْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka alyusra baʿda alʿusri

translation.en: O Allah, I surely beseech You for easiness after difficulty,

segments.transliteration: walfaraja baʿda alkarbi

translation.en: relief after misfortune,

segments.transliteration: walrrakha'a baʿda alshshiddati

translation.en: and comfort after hardship.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: There is no god save You.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayka

translation.en: I pray Your forgiveness and repent before You.

text.en: 4.ReciteSura Asr

5. Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) is reported as saying: Anyone who implores Almighty Allah's forgiveness(i.e. astaghfirullaha) seventy timesafter the `Asr Prayer will have seven hundred of his sins forgiven.

6.Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (al-Jawad) (peace be upon him) is also reported as saying: Anyone who recitesSurah al-Qadr (No. 97) ten timesafter the `Asr Prayer will be granted the reward of the deeds of all creatures on that day.
7.From Sahifa Radhvia

segments.transliteration: hamdan lillaahe.

translation.en: Praise is for Allah.

text.en: 8."After performing Asr prayerseek forgiveness from Allah seventy-seven times (77)
9.ReciteSyeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after Asr Salat From Sahifa Fatimiya
10.Dua 'Asharaatis also recommended and the best time for this supplication is the time after the `Asr Prayers on Fridays.
11.Another Asr Dua "Allhumma Rabis samawat was sab"

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمٰوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَ رَبَّ الْاَرَضِيْنَ السَّبْعِ وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ مَا تَحْتَهُنَّ وَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ

translation.en: "Oh Allah! The Lord of seven heavens, and the Lord of seven earths, and whatever is in them, and whatever is between them, and whatever is beneath them, and the Lord of tremendous throne.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ جِبْرَآئِيْلَ وَ مِيْكَائِيْلَ وَ اِسْرَافِيْلَ وَ رَبَّ السَّبْعِ الْمَثَانِيْ وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيْمِ وَ رَبَّ مُـحَمَّدٍ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهٖ خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ

translation.en: And the Lord of Gabriel, Michael and Israfeel, and the Lord of Sab-e-Masani (surah Al-Fateha), and the Lord of tremendous Quran; and the Lord of Muhammad, the l

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْاَعْظَمِ الَّذِيْ بِهِ تَقُوْمُ السَّمٰوَاتُ وَ الْاَرْضُ وَ بِهٖ تُـحْيِي الْمَوْتٰى وَ تَرْزُقُ الْاَحْيَا وَ تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ بَيْنَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِ وَ بِهٖ اَحْصَيْتَ عَدَدَ الْآجَالِ وَ وَزْنَ الْـجِبَالِ وَ كِيْلَ الْبِحَارِ

translation.en: I ask Thee by Thy mightiest name, by Whom heavens and earth are sustained, and by Whom the dead are given life and the living are provided with sustenance, and the gathered, and the scattered are gathered, and by Whom are encompassed the number of the spans of life, and the weight of mountains, and the measure of oceans.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ يَا مَنْ هُوَ كَذٰلِكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اَنْ تَفْعَلَ بِيْ كَذَا وَ كَذَا.
segments.transliteration: Oh one! Who are like this, I ask Thee to Shower unbounded blessing on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad and do for me such and such (in the place of ‘such and such’ ask for you need)."

translation.en: 12.Additonal Asr dua

segments.arabic:
---
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الطَّيِّبَاتِ وَتَرْكَ الْمُنْكَرَاتِ وَفَكَاكَ خِيرَتِي، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمَنَا وَتَتُوبَ عَلَيْنَا وَتَتَوَفَّنَا غَيْرَ مَفْتُونِينَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-alukat’t’ayyibaati wa tarkal munkaraati wa fi’-kak khayraati an taghfira lanaa wa tarh’amanaa wa tatooba a’laynaa wa tawaffanaa ghayra maftoonin birah’matika yaa arh’amar raah’imeen

translation.en: O Allah, I ask you to make me do pious deeds, and that which is lawful, prevent me from ding that which is forbidden, let me do that which is good; protect us have pity on us, admit us to your mercy, and cause us to die without ever having been seduced to evil, by your mercy, O the most merciful

text.en: 13. Invocation of Imam Kazim (a.s.) after Asr prayers for the Reappearance of Imam-e-Zamaan (a.t.f.s.)

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،اَلْاَوَّلُ وَالْاٰخِرُ وَالظَّاهِرُالْبَاطِنُ،

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, the first and the last, the apparent, the Inward,

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،اِلَيْكَ زِيَادَةُ الْاَشْيَاۤءِ وَنُقْصَانُهَا،

translation.en:
You are God, there is no any other deity except You,
 unto You the increase and decrease of all things,

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،خَلَقْتَ الْخَلْقَ بِغَيْرِ مَعُوْنَةٍ مِنْ غَيْرِكَ،وَلَاحَاجَةٍ اِلَيْهِمْ،

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, You create the creations without helping hand from other than You and You are not in need of them;

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،مِنْكَ الْمَشِيَّةُ وَاِلَيْكَ الْبَدْءُ۔

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, all wishes from You and unto You all the initiation.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،قَبْلَ الْقَبْلِ وَخَالِقُ الْقَبْلِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, before the previous and the creator of the previous,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤاِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،بَعْدَ الْبَعْدِ وَخَالِقُ الْبَعْدِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any deity except You, after afterward the creator of afterward,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،تَمْحُوْ مَا تَشَاۤءُ وَتُثْبِتُ وَعِنْدَكَ اُمُّ الْكِتَابِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any deity except You, You erase and establish what ever You wishes and with You the essence of the Book,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّاۤ اَنْتَ،غَايَةُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَوَارِثُهُ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, the Goal and the Inheritor of every thing,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،لَايَعْزُبُ عَنْكَ الدَّقِيْقُ وَلَا الْجَلِيْلُ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, both small and mighty are not far away from You,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،لَايَخْفٰى عَلَيْكَ اللُّغَاتُ،وَلَاتَتَشَابَهُ عَلَيْكَ الْاَصْوَاتُ۔

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, there is no any language hidden to You and voices are not similar to You.

segments.arabic: كُلَّ يَوْمٍ اَنْتَ فِيْ شَاْنٍ،لَايَشْغَلُكَ شَاْنٌ عَنْ شَاْنٍ،عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَاَخْفٰى،دَيَّانُ الدِّيْنِ،مُدَبِّرُ الْاُمُوْرِ،

translation.en: Every day You are at Your duty and a duty did not disturb You from another, the Knower of all hidden and concealed things, the owner of Religion, the director of all things,

segments.arabic: بَاعِثُ مَنْ فِي الْقُبُوْرِ،مُحْيِ الْعِظَامِ وَهِيَ رَمِيْمٌ،

translation.en: He who raises those in the graves, He who gave life to bone after they have became decayed.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْمَكْنُوْنِ الْمَخْزُوْنِ،اَلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّوْمِ،اَلَّذِيْ لَايَخِيْبُ مَنْ سَاَلَكَ بِهِ،اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ،

translation.en: I requested from You by Your sheltered Name, the Eternal the Everlasting, who did not disappoint who ever call Him by His name, to send blessing on Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: وَاَنْ تُعَجِّلَ فَرَجَ الْمُنْتَقِمِ لَكَ مِنْ اَعْدَاۤئِكَ،وَاَنْجِزْلَهُ مَا وَعَدْتَهُ،يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ۔

translation.en: and hasten the reappearance of Your retaliator from Your enemies and execute for him all You have promised him, O' the possessor of Magnificence and Honour.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِسُبْحَانَ اللهِ والْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلا إلهَ إلاَّ اللهُ واللهُ أَكْبَرُوَلا حَوْلَ ولا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ باللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: "Glory be to Allah, all praise is due to Him! There is no god but Allah.Allah is the greatest; and there is no might and no strength but from Allah, the most superior, the All-tremendous.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْغُدُوِّ وَالآصَالِ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْعَشِيِّ وَالإبْكَارِ فَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah at morning and evening.Glorify His purity when you enter upon the time of evening and morning.

segments.arabic: وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ فِي السَّموَاتِ والأَرْضِ وَعَشِيّاً وَحِينَ تُظْهِرُونَ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عمَّا يَصِفُونَ

translation.en: And to Him belongs praise in the heavens and the earth, at night fall and mid-day.Glory be to Allah and all honour for He is free from the stories ascribed (about Him).

segments.arabic: وَسَلاَمٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِينَ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be on His apostles. And all praise rightly belongs to Allah – Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ سُبْحَانَ ذِي العِزَّةِ والْجَبَرُوتِ سُبْحَان الحَيّ الَّذِي لا يَمُوتُ

translation.en: Glory be to possessor of the dominion and the Kingdom. Glory be to possessor of might and invincibility. Glory be to the Living, the one Who will never die.

segments.arabic:
سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْقَائِمِ الدَّائِمِ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ سُبْحَانَ الْعَلِيِّ الأَعْلى سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالى
 سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلائِكَةِ والرُّوحِ.

translation.en: Glory be to the All-Self-existent, the Everlasting, Glory be to the Living the Self-subsistent. Glory be to the All-high, the Most High. Glory be to Him and exalted be He, All-glory and All-holy, our Lord and the Lord of Angels and spirit.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّ ذَنْبِي أَمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِعَفَوِكَ وَخَوْفِي أَمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِأَمْنِكَ وَفَقْرِي أمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِغِنَاكَ وذُلّي أمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِعِزّكَ،

translation.en: Oh Allah, surely my sin seeks the refuge of Thy pardon; and my fear seeks the refuge of Thy peace; and my indigence seeks the refuge of Thy self-sufficiency; and my abasement seeks the refuge of Thy exaltation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ واغْفِرْ لي وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.

translation.en: Oh Allah! Bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, and pardon me, and have mercy on me, for surely Thou art the Praised and the Glorious.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ تَمَّ نُورُكَ فَهَدَيْتَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَعَظُمَ حِلْمُكَ فَعَفَوْتَفَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَجْهُكَ رَبَّنَا أَكْرَمُ الْوُجُوهِ وَجَاهُكَ أَعْظَمُ الْجَاهِ وَعَطِيَّتُكَ أَفْضَلُ الْعَطَايَا تُطَاعُ

translation.en: Oh Allah! as Thy light has guided me, so all praise is due to Thee; and by the bounty of Thy clemency pardon me, so all praise is due to Thee Oh our Lord! Thou art the Most Generous of the generous and Thy Splendour is greater than all splendour, and Thy gift is greater in merit than all gifts.

segments.arabic: ربَّنَا وَتَشْكُرُ وَتُعْصى فَتَغْفِرُ وَتُجِيبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ وَتَكْشِفُ الضُّرَّ وَتُنْجِي مِنَ الْكَرْبِ وَتُغْني الْفُقِيرَوَتَشْفي السَّقِيمَ ولا يُجَاري آلاءَكَ أَحَدٌ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

translation.en: Thou thank those who obey thee and forgive when disobeyed, and grants the supplication of one in distress, and removes the harm, and rescues from affliction, and enriches the indigent, and cures the ailing, and nobody can recompense for any of Thy blessings. Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!".

segments.transliteration: ya man khatama alnnubuwwata bimuhammadin

translation.en: O He Who has sealed the Prophethood with Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: Allah may bless him and his Household,

segments.arabic: إِخْتِمْ لِي فِي يَوْمِي هٰذَا بِخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: ikhtim li fi yawmi hadha bikhayrin

translation.en: (please) seal with goodness this day of mine,

segments.transliteration: wa shahri bikhayrin

translation.en: this month of mine,

segments.transliteration: wa sanati bikhayrin

translation.en: this year of mine,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿumri bikhayrin

translation.en: and my entire lifetime.

text.en: 15.Imam Ali Naqi(as) supplication after the Asr Prayer

segments.transliteration: Yaa man 'alawta fa 'azumta,

translation.en: O You Who have risen high and become great.

segments.transliteration: Wa qaharta faghallabta,

translation.en: And You subdued and overcame.

segments.transliteration: Wa ghalabta faqaharta,

translation.en: And You overcame and subdued.

segments.transliteration: Yaa man ghalabta fa 'azumta bi qudratika,

translation.en: O You Who became mighty and great through Your power.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بَسَطْتَ ظِلَّكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Yaa man basatta dhillaka 'ala khalqika,

translation.en: O You Who have spread Your shadow over Your creation.

segments.transliteration: Wa manah'ta 'ibadaka ni'amaka,

translation.en: And bestowed Your blessings upon Your servants.

segments.transliteration: As'aluka yaa shadeedal 'iqaabi,

translation.en: I ask You, O Severe in punishment.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَنْتَقِمُ بِقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِلْحَادِ،
segments.transliteration: Yaa man yantaqimu bi qudratihi min ahlil ilhaadi,

translation.en: O You Who avenges with His power against the people of disbelief.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ وَلِيِّكَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ،
segments.transliteration: As'aluka bihaqqi waliyyika 'Aliyyi bni Abi Talib,

translation.en: I ask You by the right of Your guardian, Ali ibn Abi Talib.

segments.arabic: وَأَتَوَسَّلُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ فِي قَضَاءِ حَوَائِجِي،
segments.transliteration: Wa atawassalu bihi ilayka fi qada'i hawa'iji,

translation.en: And I seek his intercession with You to fulfill my needs.

segments.transliteration: Wa an tarhama Muhammadan wa Aala Muhammadin,

translation.en: And that You have mercy on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

segments.transliteration: Wa tu'eenani 'ala qada'i hawa'iji,

translation.en: And help me to fulfill my needs.

segments.transliteration: Wa adaa'i nawafili wa fara'idi,

translation.en: And to perform my supererogatory prayers and obligations.

segments.transliteration: Wa birri ikhwaani, wa tamaami taa'atika,

translation.en: And to be kind to my brothers and complete in Your obedience.

segments.transliteration: Yaa arhamar raahimeen,

translation.en: O Most Merciful of the merciful.

text.en: 16. You may then do the thanksgiving prostration.(sajda Shukr)

segments.transliteration: allahumma daʿawtani fa'ajabtu daʿwataka

translation.en: O Allah, when You called at me, I responded to Your call,

segments.transliteration: wa sallaytu maktubataka

translation.en: performed the prayer prescribed by You,

segments.transliteration: wantashartu fi ardika kama amartani

translation.en: and dispersed through the land as You have ordered me to do.

segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka min fadlika alʿamala bitaʿatika

translation.en: So, I beseech You to make me, out of Your favoring, work in obedience to You,

segments.transliteration: wajtinaba maʿsiyatika

translation.en: avoid disobedience to You,

segments.transliteration: walkafafa min alrrizqi birahmatika

translation.en: and gain sufficient sustenance, in the name of Your mercy.

text.en: As soon as it is midday say the following It is reported that Imam al-Baqir (`a) instructed Muhammad ibn Muslim to keep on saying this as it keeps his eyes from haram

segments.transliteration: subhana allahi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,
