segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: there is no god save Allah,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَلاَ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh sahibatan wa la waladan

translation.en: and all praise is due to Allah, Who has not taken a wife or a son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: and Who has not a partner in the kingdom,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun min aldhdhulli

translation.en: and Who has not a helper to save Him from disgrace;

segments.transliteration: wa kabbirhu takbiran

translation.en: and magnify Him with all magnificence.

text.en: - Recite 8 Units/ Rak'ats (2 X 4 )Nafilah( Supererogatory) Noon Prayer - Recommended before Zuhr  In the first two units, say the Takbir statement seven times & say,

segments.transliteration: aʿudhu billahi min alshshaytani alrrajimi

translation.en: I pray for Allah's protection from Satan, the accursed.

text.en: Recite Surah al-Faatihah and S al-Tawhid in the first unit and S al-Fatihah and Surah al-Kafirun (No. 109) in the second. Upon accomplishment, you may repeat the Takbir statements three times, Tasbih al-Zahra', and then say the following prayer:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni daʿifun

translation.en: O Allah, I am weak;

segments.transliteration: faqawwi fi ridaka daʿfi

translation.en: so, (please) strengthen my weakness in the course of Your pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa khudh ila alkhayri binasiyati

translation.en: lead my forelock to goodness,

segments.transliteration: wajʿali al-imana muntaha rida'i

translation.en: cause faith to be the utmost of my pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa barik li fima qasamta li

translation.en: bless for me that which You have decided for me,

segments.arabic: وَبَلِّغْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ كُلَّ ٱلَّذِي ارْجُو مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ballighni birahmatika kulla alladhi arju minka

translation.en: make me attain, by means of Your mercy, all that which I wish from You,

segments.transliteration: wajʿal li wuddan

translation.en: and appoint love for me,

segments.transliteration: wa sururan lilmu'minina

translation.en: delight for the believers,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿahdan ʿindaka

translation.en: and a covenant with You.

text.en: You may then stand up to offer next couple of units as exactly as the previous couple except that you may utter one statement of Takbir instead of seven.You may then offer another couple of units as

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba hadhihi alddaʿwati alttammati

translation.en: O Allah, Lord of this perfect supplication

segments.transliteration: walssalati alqa'imati

translation.en: and established prayer,

segments.arabic: بَلِّغْ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: balligh muhammadan salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: (please) assign to Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: alddarajata walwasilata

translation.en: the rank, right of mediation,

segments.transliteration: walfadla walfadilata

translation.en: excellence, and advantage.

segments.transliteration: billahi astaftihu

translation.en: With Allah do I commence,

segments.transliteration: wa billahi astanjihu

translation.en: from Allah do I seek success,

segments.arabic: وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ اتَوَجَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bimuhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi atawajjahu

translation.en: and in the name of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household, do I turn my face (towards Allah).

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي بِهِمْ عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهاً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ وَمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: wajʿalni bihim ʿindaka wajihan fi alddunya wal-akhirati wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: and, in their names, make me worthy of regard in this world and in the Hereafter, and of those drawn near to You.

text.en: You may recite the Surahs with low voice except for the basmalah. It is preferred to recite S al-Fatihah and S al-Qadr at the first unit and Sura al-Fatihah and Surah al-Tawhid at the second. After the tashahhud statement in the second unit, you may add the following:

segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal shafaʿatahuwarfaʿ darajatahu

translation.en: And (please) admit his intercession and raise his rank.

text.en: Magrib and Isha TaqeebatRecited after the obligatory salats.
Sunset
Magrib
Magrib more
Sy.Fatima(sa) Magrib
Gufailah-Nafila
Isha
Isha more
Sy.Fatima(sa) Isha
Common-Res
1.After reciting Tasbih al-Zahra', say the following invocation of blessings:

segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna ʿala alnnabiyyi

translation.en: "Surely, Allah and His angels bless the Prophet.

segments.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْليماً﴾
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu ʿalayhi wa sallimu tasliman

translation.en: O you who believe! Call for Divine blessings on him and salute him with a becoming salutation."

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin alnnabiyyi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad the Prophet,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala dhurriyyatihi wa ʿala ahli baytihi

translation.en: upon his offspring, and upon his Household.

text.en: 2.From Imam Moosa al Kazim (a.s)without talking to anyone, say the following7 times:

segments.transliteration: bismi allahi alrrahmani alrrahimi

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيِمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high, the All-great.

text.en: 3.Then, repeat the following doxology three times:

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذي يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi yafʿalu ma yasha'u

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who does whatever He desires,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafʿalu ma yasha'u ghayruhu

translation.en: and none else can ever do whatever one desires save Him.

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka mujibati rahmatika

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You for the motives of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿaza'ima maghfiratika

translation.en: the determining causes of Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَٱلنَّجَاةَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِنْ كُلِّ بِلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: walnnajata mina alnnari wa min kulli baliyyatin

translation.en: deliverance from Hellfire and all misfortunes,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْفَوْزَ بِٱلْجَنَّةِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ في دَارِ ٱلسَّلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: walfawza biljannati walrridwani fi dari alssalami

translation.en: winning Paradise,Divine Contentment in the Abode of Peace,

segments.arabic: وَجَوَارِ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa jiwari nabiyyika muhammadin ʿalayhi wa alihi alssalamu

translation.en: and the vicinity of Your Prophet Muhammad—peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: There is no god save You.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayka

translation.en: I pray Your forgiveness and I repent before You.

text.en: 5. After Magrib salat recite: Allahuma Ajirna minan naar

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ أَجِرْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ سَالِمِيْنَ وَ أَدْخِلْنَا الْجَنَّةَ بِسَلَامٍ آمِنِيْنَ

translation.en: O Allah help us to depart from life of this world in safety and save us from fire and make us enter Paradise with peace and safety.

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَفَّنا مُسْلِمِيْنَ وَ أَلْحِقْنَا بِالصَّالِحِيْنَ بِفَضْلِکَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: And make us die in Thy submission and include us with the righteous, I beseech You by Thy grace and mercy on us, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful! ".

translation.en: 6.Then, say the following litany "Subhanaka:

segments.transliteration: subhanaka la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: All glory be to You. There is no god save You.

segments.transliteration: ighfir li dhunubi kullaha jamiʿan

translation.en: Forgive my sins all in all,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ كُلَّهَا جَمِيعاً إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba kullaha jamiʿan illa anta

translation.en: for none can forgive all sins save You.

text.en: ReciteSurah Waqiyah
Recite Sunset Duas
Before Magrib Between Adhan and Iqamah, say the following

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bi'iqbali laylika

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the coming of Your night,

segments.transliteration: wa idbari naharika

translation.en: the departure of Your daylight,

segments.transliteration: wa huduri salawatika

translation.en: the presence of Your prayers,

segments.transliteration: wa aswati duʿatika

translation.en: the voices of Your supplicants,

segments.transliteration: wa tasbihi mala'ikatika

translation.en: and the glorification of Your angels,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa an tatuba ʿalayya

translation.en: and to accept my repentance.

segments.transliteration: innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu

translation.en: You are verily, the Oft-Returning, the Most Merciful

segments.arabic: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
segments.transliteration: Fa Subhaanal laahi heena tumsoona wa heena tusbihoon

translation.en: So glorify Allah when you enter evening and when you rise at dawn.

segments.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَعَشِيًّا وَحِينَ تُظْهِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lahul hamdu fis samaawaati wal ardi wa 'ashiyyanw wa heena

translation.en: To Him belongs all praise in the heavens and the earth, at nightfall and when you enter noontime.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوْبِ وَ الْأَبْصَارِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلىٰ دِيْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma muqallibal-quloobi wal-absaar, thabbit qalbee ‘alaa deenik.

translation.en: "O Allah, Controller of hearts and eyes, keep my heart firm on Your religion."

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنِي وَ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَّدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
segments.transliteration: Wa laa tuzigh qalbee ba’da idh hadaytanee wahab lee min ladunka rahmatan innaka antal-wahhaab.

translation.en: "Do not let my heart go astray after You have guided me. Grant me mercy from Yourself. Truly, You are the Bestower."

segments.transliteration: Wa ajirnee minan-naar bi-rahmatika.

translation.en: "By Your mercy, protect me from the Fire."

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ امْدُدْ لِي فِيْ عُمُرِي وَ اَوْسِعْ عَليَّ فِيْ رِزْقِي وَانْشُرْ عَلَيَّ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma amdud lee fee ‘umree wa awsi’ ‘alayya fee rizqee wanshur ‘alayya rahmatak.

translation.en: "O Allah, give me a long life, increase my provision, and cover me with Your mercy."

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ كُنْتُ عِنْدَكَ فِي أُمِّ الْكِتَابِ شَقِيًّا فَاجْعَلْنِي سَعِيْدًا
segments.transliteration: Wa in kunta ‘indaka fee ummil-kitaabi shaqeeyyan faj’alnee sa’eeda.

translation.en: "And if, in Your record, I am written as unhappy, then change it to happiness."

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ تَمْحُوْ مَا تَشَاءُ وَ تُثْبِتُ وَ عِنْدَكَ أُمُّ الْكِتَاب
segments.transliteration: Fa innaka tamhoo ma tashaao wa tuthbito wa ‘indaka ummul-kitaab.

translation.en: "For You erase what You will, and You affirm what You will. With You is the Master Record."

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ʿalayka

translation.en: O Allah, I do beseech You, in the name of the right of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad that is incumbent upon You

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wajʿal alnnura fi basari

translation.en: and to give light to my insight,

segments.transliteration: walbasirata fi dini

translation.en: make me discerning in my religion,

segments.transliteration: wal-yaqina fi qalbi

translation.en: have conviction in my heart,

segments.transliteration: wal-ikhlasa fi ʿamali

translation.en: sincerity in my deeds,

segments.transliteration: walssalamata fi nafsi

translation.en: safety in my self,

segments.transliteration: walssaʿata fi rizqi

translation.en: vastness in my sustenance,

segments.transliteration: walshshukra laka abadan ma abqaytani

translation.en: and perpetual thankfulness for You as long as you keep me alive.

text.en: 11.-Six Duas below (a-f ) from 'Nafila App' -

segments.arabic: أَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ اكْتُبَا رَحِمَكُمَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: Astaa‘eedhu billaahi minash-shaytaani r-rajeem, uktubaa rahimakumallaah.

translation.en:
"I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan. Write me as one of those whom You have shown mercy to, "
Then say

segments.transliteration: Bismi Allāhi al-Raḥmāni al-Raḥīm

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.

segments.arabic: أَمْسَيْتُ وَأَصْبَحْتُ بِاللَّهِ مُؤْمِنًا عَلَى دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ (صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ) وَسُنَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: Amsaytu wa-aṣbaḥtu bi-llāhi mu’minan ‘alā dīni Muḥammadin (ṣallā Allāhu ‘alayhi wa-ālih) wa-sunnatih.

translation.en: I ended my evening and began my morning as a believer in Allah, upon the religion of Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) and his tradition.

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى دِينِ عَلِيٍّ (عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ) وَسُنَّتِهِ وَعَلَى دِينِ فَاطِمَةَ (عَلَيْهَا السَّلَامُ) وَسُنَّتِهَا
segments.transliteration: Wa-‘alā dīni ‘Aliyyin (‘alayhi as-salām) wa-sunnatih, wa-‘alā dīni Fāṭimata (‘alayhā as-salām) wa-sunnatihā.

translation.en: And upon the religion of ʿAlī (peace be upon him) and his tradition, and upon the religion of Fāṭimah (peace be upon her) and her tradition.

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى دِينِ الْأَوْصِيَاءِ صَلَوَاتُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَسُنَنِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: Wa-‘alā dīni al-awṣiyā’i ṣalawātu Allāhi ‘alayhim wa-sunanihim.

translation.en: And upon the religion of the Successors, may Allah's blessings be upon them, and their traditions.

segments.transliteration: Āmantu bisirrihim wa-‘alāniyyatihim wa-bighaybihim wa-shahādatihim.

translation.en: I believe in their secrets and their openness, in their unseen and their witnessed presence.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ فِي لَيْلَتِي هَذِهِ وَيَوْمِي هَذَا
segments.transliteration: Wa-asta‘īdhū bi-llāhi fī laylatī hādhihi wa-yawmī hādhā.

translation.en: And I seek refuge in Allah during this night of mine and this day of mine.

segments.arabic: مِمَّا اسْتَعَاذَ مِنْهُ مُحَمَّدٌ وَعَلِيٌّ وَفَاطِمَةُ وَالْأَوْصِيَاءُ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: Mimmā ista‘ādha minhu Muḥammadun wa-‘Aliyyun wa-Fāṭimatu wa-l-awṣiyā’u ṣallā Allāhu ‘alayhim.

translation.en: From that which Muhammad, ʿAlī, Fāṭimah, and the Successors (peace be upon them) sought refuge from.

segments.arabic: وَأَرْغَبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ فِيمَا رَغِبُوا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa-arghabu ilā Allāhi fīmā raghibū fīhi.

translation.en: And I desire from Allah what they desired.

segments.arabic: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa-lā ḥawla wa-lā quwwata illā bi-llāh.

translation.en: And there is no power and no strength except through Allah.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي يُولِجُ اللَّيْلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي اللَّيْلِالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا وَقَبَ لَيْلٌ وَغَسَقَ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا لَاحَ نَجْمٌ وَخَفَقَ.
segments.transliteration:
Bismillahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
Alhamdu lillahi alladhi yulij al layla fee alnnahari wayuliju alnnahara fee allayli
Alhamdu lillahi kullama waqaba laylun waghassaq waalhamdu lillahi kullama laha najmun wakhafaq.

translation.en: "In the Name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Compassionate. Praise be to Allah, who causes the night to enter into the day and causes the day to enter into the night. Praise be to Allah every time the night falls and every time the stars twinkle."

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِأَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِقُدْرَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِمَغْفِرَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِسُلْطَانِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌوَأَعُوذُ بِكَرَمِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِجَمْعِ اللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ وَشَيْطَانٍ مَرِيدٍوَكُلِّ مُغْتَالٍ وَسَارِقٍ وَعَارِضٍ وَمِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ وَالْهَامَّةِ والْعَامَّةِوَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ أَوْ كَبِيرَةٍ بِلَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍوَمِنْ شَرِّ فُسَّاقِ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ وَ فُجَّارِهِمْوَمِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِوَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ رَبِّي آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ.
segments.transliteration:
Bismillahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
A'oothu bi'izzati Allahi wa a'oothu bi qudrati Allahi wa a'oothu bi maghfirati Allahi wa a'oothu bi rahmati Allahi wa a'oothu bi sultani Allahi alladhi huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer
Wa a'oothu bi karami Allahi wa a'oothu bi jami'i Allahi min sharri kulli jabbarin 'aneedin wa shaytanin mareedinWa kulli mughtalin wa saariqin wa 'aridhin wa min sharri alssammati wa alhamaati wa al'amaatiWa min sharri kulli dabbatin sagheeratin aw kabeeratin biallayli aw naharWa min sharri fusaqi al'arabi wa al'ajami wa fujjarihimWa min sharri fasqati aljinni wa al'insiWa min sharri kulli dabbatin rabbi akhithun bina'siyatiha inna rabbi 'ala siratin mustaqeemin.

translation.en:
In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.
I seek refuge in the might of Allah, His power, His forgiveness, His mercy, and His sovereignty, over all things.I seek refuge in the generosity of Allah and in the gathering of Allah, from the evil of every arrogant and stubborn tyrant, and from the tempting devil.From the harm of every murderer, thief, and robber, and from the evil of the scorpions, snakes, and pests, small and large, by day and by night.From the harm of the wicked Arabs and non-Arabs, and from their wickedness.
From the harm of the sinful jinn and mankind.From the harm of every creature whose forelock my Lord grasps. Indeed, my Lord is on a straight path.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِأُعِيذُ نَفْسِي وَذُرِّيَّتِي وَأَهْلَ بَيْتِيوَمَالِي بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍوَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ وهي العوذة الَّتِي عَوَّذَ بِهَا جَبْرَائِيلُ الْحَسَنَ وَالْحُسَيْنَ (عليهما السَّلامُ).
segments.transliteration: Bismillah al-Rahman al-RahimU'iithu nafsi wa dhurriyyati wa ahli baytiWa mali bikalimatillah al-tammati min kulli shaytaninWa hamma wa min kulli 'aynin lammah wa hiya al-'awdah allati 'awwadha biha Jibrailu al-Hasan wa al-Husayn (alayhima al-salam).

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.I seek refuge for myself, my family, my possessions, and my household, with the perfect words of Allah, from every devil, mischief, and the evil eye.

segments.arabic: يَا شَدِيدَ الْمَحَالِ يَا عَزِيزاً ذَلَّلْتَ بِعِزَّتِكَ جَمِيعَ مَا خَلَقْتَ اكْفِنِي شَرَّ (فُلانٍ بِمَا شِئْتَ).
segments.transliteration: Ya Shadid al-Mahal, Ya Azizan Dhallalta bi 'izzatika jami'a ma khalaqta, ikfini sharra [fulanin] bima shi'ta.

translation.en: O Powerful One who makes the impossible possible!O Mighty One, by Your might, You have brought everything into submission. Suffice me against all evil...

text.en: 12.Syeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after magrib Salat-Seperate page

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يَبْلُغُ مَدْحَتَهُ الْقَائِلُوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee laa yablogho midhatahul qaaeloona,

translation.en: Praise be to the one, Whose praise cannot be encompassed together even by all the speakers.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُحْصِيْ نَعْمَاءَهُ الْعَادُّوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yohsee na’maa-ahul a’addoona,

translation.en: All praise is for God, whose bounties cannot be counted by even all those, who count.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُؤَدِّيْ حَقَّهُ الْمُجْتَهِدُوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yo-addee haqqahul mujtahedoona,

translation.en: All praise is for God, whose right cannot be restored even by those, who try to restore it.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْاَوَّلُ وَ الْاٰخِرُ، وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الظَّاهِرُ وَ الْبَاطِنُ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa elaaha illal laahul awwalo wal aakhero, wa laa elaaha illal laahuz zaahero wal baateno,

translation.en: And there is no god, except Allah, the first and the last. And there is no god, except Allah, the apparent and the hidden.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْمُحْيِيْ الْمُمِيْتُ، وَ اللهُ اَكْبَرُ ذُوْ الطَّوْلِ وَ اللهُ اَكْبَرُ ذُوْ الْبَقَاءِ الدَّائِمِ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa elaaha illal laahul mohyil momeeto, wal laaho akbaro zut tawle wal laaho akbaro zul baqaa-id daa-eme.

translation.en: And there is no god, except Allah, the giver of life and death. And Allah is the greatest and owner of rewards and Allah is the greatest and He is eternally present.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُدْرِكُ الْعَالِمُوْنَ عِلْمَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yudrekul a’alemoona i’lmahu,

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, whose knowledge cannot be perceived even by the learned;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْتَخِفُّ الْجَاهِلُوْنَ حِلْمَهٗ، وَ لَا يَبْلُغُ الْمَادِحُوْنَ مِدْحَتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa yastakhifful jaaheloona hilmahu, wa laa yabloghul maadehoona midhatahu,

translation.en: and whose knowledge cannot be labeled as ordinary even by the ignorant;and the praisers cannot reach upto the end of His extolling

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَصِفُ الْوَاصِفُوْنَ صِفَتَهٗ وَ لَا يُحْسِنُ الْخَلْقُ نَعْتَهٗ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa yaseful waasefoona sefatahu wa laa yohsenul khalqo na’tahu.

translation.en: and the describers cannot describe Him. And even all creatures together cannot describe Him fully.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ ذِيْ الْمُلْكِ وَ الْمَلَكُوْتِ، وَ الْعَظَمَةِ وَ الْجَبَرُوْتِ (وَ الْعِزِّ) وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءِ، وَ الْبَهَاءِ وَ الْجَلَالِ، وَ الْمَهَابَةِ وَ الْجَمَالِ، وَ الْعِزَّةِ وَ الْقُدْرَةِ وَ الْحَوْلِ وَ الْقُوَّةِ، وَ الْمِنَّةِ وَ الْغَلَبَةِ، وَ الْفَضْلِ وَ الطَّوْلِ، وَ الْعَدْلِ وَ الْحَقِّ وَ الْخَلْقِ وَ الْعَلَاءِ، وَ الرِّفْعَةِ وَ الْمَجْدِ، وَ الْفَضِيْلَةِ وَ الْحِكْمَةِ وَ الْغِنَاءِ وَ السَّعَةِ وَ الْبَسْطِ وَ الْقَبْضِ، وَ الْحِلْمِ وَ الْعِلْمِ، وَ الْحُجَّةِ الْبَالِغَةِ وَ النِّعْمَةِ السَّابِغَةِ وَ الثَّنَاءِ الْحَسَنِ الْجَمِيْلِ
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahe zil mulke wal malakoote, wal a’zamate wal jabaroote (wal i’zze) wal kibreyaa-e, wal bahaa-e wal jalaale, wal mahaabate wal jamaale, wal i’zzate wal qudrate wal hawle wal quwwate, wal minnate wal ghalabate, wal fazle wat tawle, wal a’dle wal haqqe wal khalqe wal a’laa-e, war rif-a’te wal majde, wal fazeelate wal hikmate wal ghenaa-e was sa-a’te wal baste wal qabze, wal hilme wal i’lme, wal hujjatil baaleghate wan ne’matis saabeghate was sanaa-il hasanil jameele

translation.en: All praise be for Allah, Who is the owner of kingdom and dominion; owner of the great and tremendous force; owner of honor and greatness;owner of elegance of majesty and awe and beauty and powerand strength and force and might and favor and clout andgoodwill and nobility and justice and truth;and good manners and greatness, exaltation and enormity, and excellence and wisdom;and self-sufficiency and wideness; and tying up and opening; and forbearance and knowledge; and matured reasoning and perfect bounty; and beautiful and elegant creation; and are the noble bounties.

segments.arabic: وَ الْاٰلَاءِ الْكَرِيْمَةِ، مَلِكِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ وَ الْجَنَّةِ وَ النَّارِ، وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ تَبَارَكَ (اللهُ) وَ تَعَالٰى.
segments.transliteration: wal aalaa-il kareemate, malekid dunyaa wal aakherate wal jannate wan naare, wa maa feehinna tabaarakal (laaho) wa ta-a’alaa.

translation.en: Only He is ruler in the world and hereafter, and Paradise and Hell and what is between them. He is bountiful and also the highest.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ عَلِمَ اَسْرَارَ الْغُيُوْبِ، وَ اطَّلَعَ عَلٰى مَا تَجِنُّ الْقُلُوْبُ فَلَيْسَ عَنْهُ مَذْهَبٌ وَ لَا مَهْرَبٌ، وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الْمُتَكَبِّرِ فِيْ سُلْطَانِهِ الْعَزِيْزِ فِيْ مَكَانِهِ، الْمُتَجَبِّرِ فِيْ مُلْكِهِ، الْقَوِيِّ فِيْ بَطْشِهِ، الرَّفِيْعِ فَوْقَ عَرْشِهِ، الْمُطَّلِعِ عَلٰى خَلْقِهٖ، وَ الْبَالِغِ لِمَا اَرَادَ مِنْ عِلْمِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee a’lema asraaral ghoyoobe, wat tala-a’ a’laa maa tajinnul qoloobo falaysa a’nho mazhabun wa laa mahrabun, wal hamdo lillaahil motakabbere fee sultaanehil a’zeeze fee makaanehil, motajabbere fee mulkehil, qawiyye fee batshehir, rafee-e’ fawqa a’rshehil, mutta-le-e’ a’laa khalqehi, wal baaleghe lemaa araada min i’lmehi.

translation.en: All praise be for Allah, Who is the knower of secrets of the unseen and is aware of the concealed secrets of the hearts; there is no scope to flee and run away from Him.All praise be for Allah, who is the owner of pride in His kingdom; who is honorable in his stage; and the owner of domination in His kingdom, who is powerful in His attacks; who is the owner of the loftinesses of His Throne; who is aware of the circumstances of His creatures; and has the capacity to reach upto what He has intended through His knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ بِكَلِمَاتِهٖ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ الشِّدَادُ، وَ ثَبَتَتِ الْاَرَضُوْنَ الْمِهَادُ، وَ انْتَصَبَتِ الْجِبَالُ الرَّوَاسِيْ الْاَوْتَادُ، وَ جَرَتِ الرِّيَاحُ اللَّوَاقِحُ، وَ سَارَ فِيْ جَوِّ السَّمَاءِ السَّحَابُ، وَ وَقَفَتْ عَلٰى حُدُوْدِهَا الْبِحَارُ، وَ وَجِلَتِ الْقُلُوْبُ مِنْ مَخَافَتِهٖ، وَ انْقَمَعَتِ الْاَرْبَابُ لِرُبُوْبِيَّتِهٖ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا مُحْصِيْ قَطْرِ الْمَطَرِ، وَ وَرَقِ الشَّجَرِ، وَ مُحْيِيْ اَجْسَادِ الْمَوْتٰى لِلْحَشْرِ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee bekalemaatehi qaamatis samaawaatush shedaado, wa sabatatil arazoonal mehaado, wan tasabatil jebaalur rawaasil awtaado, wa jaratir reyaahul lawaa-qeho, wa saara fee jawwis samaa-is sahaabo, wa waqafat a’laa hodoodehal behaaro, wa wajelatil qoloobo min makhaafatehi, wan qa-ma-a’til arbaabo le-roboobiyyatehi tabaarakta yaa mohsee qatril matare, wa waraqish shajare, wa mohyee ajsaadil mawtaa lil-hashre.

translation.en: All praise is for the one, through the support of whose words all seven hardest heavens and the softest earths are established.Through Him are fixed in the earth the tent pegs of mountains; and through His favors blow the winds that bloom the blossoms and in the atmosphere of the sky is established the excursion of the clouds; and the seas are stopped at their boundaries; and the hearts are trembling due to His fear.And the lords of the world are destroyed through His Lordship.Blessed are You, O counter of the drops of rain and the leaves and the enlivener of the dead bodies on Judgment Day.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْاِكْرَامِ، مَا فَعَلْتَ بِالْغَرِيْبِ الْفَقِيْرِ اِذَا اَتَاكَ مُسْتَجِيْرًا مُسْتَغِيْثًا؟ مَا فَعَلْتَ بِمَنْ اَنَاخَ بِفِنَائِكَ وَ تَعَرَّضَ لِرِضَاكَ وَ غَدَا اِلَيْكَ، فَجَثَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ، يَشْكُوْ اِلَيْكَ مَا لَا يَخْفٰى عَلَيْكَ؟ فَلَا يَكُوْنَنَّ يَا رَبِّ حَظِّيْ مِنْ دُعَائِيْ الْحِرْمَانُ، وَ لَا نَصِيْبِيْ مِمَّا اَرْجُوْ مِنْكَ الْخِذْلَانُ.
segments.transliteration: Subhaanaka yaa zal jalaale wal ikraame, maa fa-a’lta bil-ghareebil faqeere ezaa ataaka mustajeeran mustagheesan? maafa-a’ta beman anaakha be-fenaa-eka wa ta-a’rraza le-rezaaka wa ghadaa elayka, fajasaa bayna yadayka, yashkoo elayka maa laa yakhfaa a’layka? falaa yakoonanna yaa rarre hazzee min do-a’a-il hirmaano, wa laa naseebee mimmaa arjoo minkal khizlaano.

translation.en:
Praise be to You, O owner of majesty and nobility! 
That You have conducted with this poor destitute, who has come to take refuge in your court.And with the destitute, who has unloaded the baggage in your presence and is the seeker of your pleasure and has presented himself before You and has kneeled down before You and is seeking from You those things, which are not concealed upon You.So, now my share must not be deprivation and my fortune as compared to my hopes, should not be fixed as helplessness.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَزَلْ وَ لَا يَزُوْلُ كَمَا لَمْ يَزَلْ قَائِمًا عَلٰى كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ
segments.transliteration: yaa man lam yazal wa laa yazoolo kamaa lam yazal qaa-eman a’laa kulle nafsin bemaa kasabat

translation.en: O that God, who is present since eternity, and will endure like this forever and who is continuously guarding the deeds of the servants.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ اَيَّامَ الدُّنْيَا تَزُوْلُ، وَ شُهُوْرَهَا تَحُوْلُ، وَ سِنِيَّهَا تَدُوْرُ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man ja-a’la ayyaamad dunyaa tazoolo, wa shohoorahaa tahoolo, wa seniyyahaa tadooro.

translation.en: O one, who has made the days of the world, declining, its months on the stage of change and its years, center of rotation.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الدَّائِمُ لَا تُبْلِيْكَ الْاَزْمَانُ، وَ لَا تُغَيِّرُكَ الدُّهُوْرُ.
segments.transliteration: wa antad daa-emo laa tubleekal azmaano, wa laa toghayyerokad dohooro.

translation.en: You alone are that owner of permanence, whom the times cannot age and the passing times cannot create change in it.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ يَوْمٍ عِنْدَهٗ جَدِيْدٌ، وَ كُلُّ رِزْقٍ عِنْدَهٗ عَتِيْدٌ، لِلضَّعِيْفِ وَ الْقَوِيِّ وَ الشَّدِيْدِ، قَسَّمْتَ الْاَرْزَاقَ بَيْنَ الْخَلَائِقِ، فَسَوَّيْتَ بَيْنَ الذَّرَّةِ وَ الْعُصْفُوْرِ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man kullo yawmin i’ndahu jadeedun, wa kullo rizqin i’ndahu a’teediun, liz-za-e’efe wal qawiyye wash shadeede, qassamtal arzaaqa baynal khalaa-eqe, fasawwayta bayanz zarrate wal u’sfoore.

translation.en: O that being, for whom everyday is new and whose sustenance is ready for every weak, strong and severe; only You have distributed sustenance among all the creatures and have maintained equality between the ant and the bird.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا ضَاقَ الْمُقَامُ بِالنَّاسِ، فَنَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ ضِيْقِ الْمُقَامِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa zaaqal moqaamo bin-naase, fa-na-o’ozo beka min zeeqil moqaame.

translation.en: O God, when the earth straitens for people, I seek refuge from that straitness.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا طَالَ يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ عَلَى الْمُجْرِمِيْنَ، فَقَصِّرْ ذٰلِكَ الْيَوْمَ عَلَيْنَا كَمَا بَيْنَ الصَّلَاةِ اِلَى الصَّلَاةِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa taala yawmul qeyaamate a’lal mujremeena, faqassir zaalekal yawma a’laynaa kamaa baynas salaate elas salaate.

translation.en: O God, when Judgment Day prolongs for the sinners, make that day so short for me, like the gap between two prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا اَدْنَيْتَ الشَّمْسَ مِنَ الْجَمَاجِمِ، فَكَانَ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَ الْجَمَاجِمِ مِقْدَارُ مِيْلٍ، وَ زِيْدَ فِيْ حَرِّهَا حَرَّ عَشْرِ سِنِيْنَ، فَاِنَّا نَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُظِلَّنَا بِالْغَمَامِ، وَ تَنْصِبَ لَنَا الْمَنَابِرَ وَ الْكَرَاسِيَّ نَجْلِسُ عَلَيْهَا وَ النَّاسُ يَنْطَلِقُوْنَ فِيْ الْمُقَامِ، اٰمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa adnaytash shamsa menal jamaajeme, fakaana baynahaa wa baynal jamaajeme miqdaaro meelin, wa zayda fee harrehaa harra ashre seneena, fa-innaa nas-aloka an tozillanaa bil-ghamaame, wa tanseba lanal manaabera wal karaasiyya najleso a’layhaa wan naaso yantaleqoona fil maqaame, aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O God, when the sun begins to heat up and between the two there remains only distance of one mile, and in its heat there is increase of ten years, then we beseech You to bestow us the shade of the cloud of mercy and arrange the pulpit and chair for us upon which we may sit when people head to the stage of accounting. Amen, O Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ الْمَحَامِدِ، اِلَّا غَفَرْتَ لِيْ وَ تَجَاوَزْتَ عَنِّيْ وَ اَلْبَسْتَنِيْ الْعَافِيَةَ فِيْ بَدَنِيْ، وَ رَزَقْتَنِيْ السَّلَامَةَ فِيْ دِيْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: as-aloka allaahumma be-haqqe haazehil mahaamede, illaa ghafarta lee wa tajaawazta a’nnee wa albastanil a’afeyata fee badanee, wa razaqtanis salaamata fee deenee.

translation.en: I ask You, O God, by the right of these praises that You forgive all my sins and overlook them. Give me the garment of health and security in religion.

segments.arabic: فَاِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ، وَ اَنَا وَاثِقٌ بِاِجَابَتِكَ اِيَّايَ فِيْ مَسْاَلَتِيْ، وَ اَدْعُوْكَ وَ اَنَا عَالِمٌ بِاسْتِمَاعِكَ دَعْوَتِيْ، فَاسْتَمِعْ دُعَائِيْ، وَ لَا تَقْطَعْ رَجَائِيْ، وَ لَا تَرُدَّ ثَنَائِيْ وَ لَا تُخَيِّبْ دُعَائِيْ، اَنَا مُحْتَاجٌ اِلٰى رِضْوَانِكَ، وَ فَقِيْرٌ اِلٰى غُفْرَانِكَ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ وَ لَا اٰيِسٌ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَ اَدْعُوْكَ وَ اَنَا غَيْرُ مُحْتَرِزٍ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ.
segments.transliteration: fa-innee as-aloka, wa anaa waasequn be-ejaabateka iyyaya fee mas-alatee, wa ad-o’oka wa anaa a’alemun bis-temaa-e’ka da’watee, fastame’ do-a’a-ee, wa laa taqta’ rajaa-ee wa laa tarudda sanaa-ee wa laa tokhayyib do-a’a-ee, anaa mohtaajun elaa rizwaaneka, wa faqeerun elaa ghufraaneka wa as-aloka wa laa aayesun min rahmateka, wa ad-o’oka wa anaa ghayro mohtarezin min sakhateka.

translation.en:
As I am asking You in the condition that I am confident of the fulfillment of my request and I supplicate with such reliance that You are listening to my voice; so now listen to my call and don't cut off my hope.

 Do not overturn my praise and glorification and do not make my entreaty hopeless.

 I am needful of your pleasure and beggar for your forgiveness. I

 ask You while I have not despaired of your mercy and I am supplicating in such fashion that I am not unveiled from your displeasure.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ فَاسْتَجِبْ لِيْ، وَ امْنُنْ عَلَيَّ بِعَفْوِكَ، وَ تَوَفَّنِيْ مُسْلِمًا، وَ اَلْحِقْنِيْ بِالصَّالِحِيْنَ،
segments.transliteration: rabbe fas-tajib lee, wam nun a’layya be-a’fweka, wa tawaffanee musleman, wa alhiqnee bis-saaleheena,

translation.en: Lord, accept my plea and send down your forgiveness for me; make me die a Muslim and join me with your righteous servants.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَمْنَعْنِيْ فَضْلَكَ يَا مَنَّانُ، وَ لَا تَكِلْنِيْ اِلٰى نَفْسِيْ مَخْذُوْلًا، يَا حَنَّانُ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe laa tamna’nee fazlaka yaa mannaano, wa laa takilnee elaa nafsee makhzoolan, yaa hannaano.

translation.en: O God, do not deprive me of your grace and nobility, O doer of good, and by separating me from Yourself, do not hand me over to my self, O doer of favor.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْ عِنْدَ فِرَاقِ الْاَحِبَّةِ صَرْعَتِيْ، وَ عِنْدَ سُكُوْنِ الْقَبْرِ وَحْدَتِيْ وَ فِيْ مَفَازَةِ الْقِيَامَةِ غُرْبَتِيْ، وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ مَوْقُوْفًا لِلْحِسَابِ فَاقَتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: rabbir ham i’nda feraaqil ahibbate sar-a’tee, wa i’nda sokoonil qabre wahdatee wa fee mafaazatil qeyaamate ghurbatee, wa bayna yadayka mawqoofan lil-hesaabe faaqatee.

translation.en: Lord, when the friends separate from us at the time of death, have mercy on my destruction and when I am interred in the grave, have mercy on my loneliness and when I appear in the stage of Judgment Day, have mercy on my alienity and when I stand before You in the stage of accounting, have mercy on my needfulness.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اَسْتَجِيْرُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَجِرْنِيْ، رَبِّ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَعِذْنِيْ (رَبِّ) اَفْزَعُ اِلَيْكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَبْعِدْنِيْ، رَبِّ اَسْتَرْحِمُكَ مَكْرُوْبًا فَارْحَمْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe astajeero beka menan naare fa-ajirnee, rabbe a-o’ozo beka menan naare fa-a-i’znee (rabbe) af-ze-o’ elayka menan naare, fa-ab-i’dnee, rabbe as-tarhemoka makrooban farhamnee.

translation.en:
Lord, I seek refuge from Hell through You, so accord refuge to me and I seek salvation from Hell fire through You, so give me salvation. 

I am terrified of Hell, so keep me away from it; and I want your mercy in distress and sorrow, so have mercy on me.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا جَهِلْتُ فَاغْفِرْ لِي، (رَبِّ) قَدْ اَبْرَزَنِيْ الدُّعَاءُ لِلْحَاجَةِ اِلَيْكَ فَلَا تُؤْيِسْنِيْ، يَا كَرِيْمُ ذَا الْاٰلَاءِ وَ الْاِحْسَانِ وَ التَّجَاوُزِ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe astaghferoka lemaa jahilto faghfir lee, (rabbe) qad abrazanid do-a’aa-o lil-haajate elayka falaa toa-yisnee, yaa kareemo zal aalaa-e wal ehsaane wat tajaawoze.

translation.en: Lord, I seek forgiveness for my ignorance, so please forgive me. [Lord] my needs have taken me out and made me stand in the stage of supplication, so now don't disappoint me, O owner of nobility, favor, bounty and forgiveness.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِيْ يَا بَرُّ يَا رَحِيْمُ، اِسْتَجِبْ بَيْنَ الْمُتَضَرِّعِيْنَ اِلَيْكَ دَعْوَتِيْ وَ ارْحَمْ بَيْنَ الْمُنْتَحِبِيْنَ بِالْعَوِيْلِ عَبْرَتِيْ،
segments.transliteration: sayyedee yaa barro yaa raheemo, istajib baynal motazarre-e’ena elayka da’watee war ham baynal muntahebeena bil-a’weele a’bratee,

translation.en: My chief, O doer of good, O merciful, accept my supplication between all entreaties and among all complainants, have mercy on my tears.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ فِيْ لِقَائِكَ يَوْمَ الْخُرُوْجِ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا رَاحَتِيْ، وَ اسْتُرْ بَيْنَ الْاَمْوَاتِ يَا عَظِيْمَ الرَّجَاءِ عَوْرَتِيْ، وَ اعْطِفْ عَلَيَّ عِنْدَ التَّحَوُّلِ وَحِيْدًا اِلٰى حُفْرَتِيْ، اِنَّكَ اَمَلِيْ وَ مَوْضِعُ طَلِبَتِيْ، وَ الْعَارِفُ بِمَا اُرِيْدُ فِيْ تَوْجِيْهِ مَسْاَلَتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: waj a’l fee leqaa-eka yamal khorooje menad dunyaa raahatee, was tur baynal amwaate yaa a’zeemar rajaa-e a’wratee, wa’ tif a’layya i’ndat tahawwole waheedan elaa hufratee, innaka amalee wa maw-ze-o’ talebatee, wal a’arefo bemaa oreedo fee tawjeehe mas-alatee.

translation.en: On the day I leave the world, deem my relief to be in your meeting and among all the dead, veil my defects, O my great center of hopes, when I am going to the grave alone, have mercy on me, O my support and the focus of my needs, and knower of the direction of my pleas.

segments.arabic: فَاقْضِ يَا قَاضِيَ الْحَاجَاتِ حَاجَتِيْ، فَاِلَيْكَ الْمُشْتَكٰى وَ اَنْتَ الْمُسْتَعَانُ وَ الْمُرْتَجٰى، اَفِرُّ اِلَيْكَ هَارِبًا مِنَ الذُّنُوْبِ فَاقْبَلْنِيْ، وَ اَلْتَجِأُ مِنْ عَدْلِكَ اِلٰى مَغْفِرَتِكَ فَاَدْرِكْنِيْ، وَ اَلْتَاذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ بَطْشِكَ فَامْنَعْنِيْ وَ اَسْتَرْوِحُ رَحْمَتَكَ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ فَنَجِّنِيْ،
segments.transliteration: faqze yaa qaazeyal haajaate haajatee, fa-elaykal mushtakaa wa antal musta-a’ano wal murtajaa, afirro elayka haareban menaz zonoobe faqbalnee, wa altaje-o min a’dleka elaa maghferateka fa-adriknee, wa altaazo be-a’fweka min batsheka fam-na’nee wa astar-weho rahmataka min e’qaabeka fanajjenee,

translation.en: O fulfiller of needs, fulfill my needs, my entreaty is towards You and only You are my helper and center of hope.I flee the sins and run towards You; from your justice I am coming into the refuge of your forgiveness, so come to my help.I seek the refuge of your forgiveness from chastisement, so give me security. And as opposed to your chastisement, I am seeker of your mercy, so save me from hell.

segments.arabic: وَ اَطْلُبُ الْقُرْبَةَ مِنْكَ بِالْاِسْلَامِ فَقَرِّبْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الْفَزَعِ الْاَكْبَرِ فَاٰمِنِّيْ، وَ فِيْ ظِلِّ عَرْشِكَ فَظَلِّلْنِيْ، وَ كِفْلَيْنِ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ فَهَبْ لِيْ، وَ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا سَالِمًا فَنَجِّنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ اِلَى النُّوْرِ فَاَخْرِجْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: wa atlobul qurbata minka bil-islaame faqarribnee, wa menal fa-za-i’l akbare fa-aaminnee wa fee zille a’rsheka fazallilnee, wa kiflayne min rahmateka fahab lee, wa menad dunyaa saaleman fanajjenee, wa menaz zolomaate elan noore fa-akhrijnee.

translation.en: I seek proximity to You through Islam, so make me your proximate one and secure me from the terror of Judgment Day and accommodate me in the shade of your throne and bestow upon me both parts of your mercy and give me relief from the world with security and take me out from the darknesses convey me to the stage of effulgence.

segments.arabic: وَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَبَيِّضْ وَجْهِيْ، وَ حِسَابًا يَسِيْرًا فَحَاسِبْنِيْ وَ بِسَرَائِرِيْ فَلَا تَفْضَحْنِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa yawmal qeyaamate fa-bayyiz wajhee, wa hesaaban yaseeran fahaasibnee wa besaraa-eree falaa tafzahnee,

translation.en: Illuminate my face on Judgment Day and ease my accounting and do not expose me on the basis of my secrets.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلٰى بَلَائِكَ فَصَبِّرْنِيْ، وَ كَمَا صَرَفْتَ عَنْ يُوْسُفَ السُّوْءَ وَ الْفَحْشَاءَ فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّيْ، وَ مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لِيْ بِهٖ فَلَا تُحَمِّلْنِيْ.

translation.en: Bestow patience to me upon your trials and like You turned away evil and wantonness from Yusuf, turn it away from me as well. And don't impose the load of what I am not capable of.

segments.arabic: وَ اِلٰى دَارِ السَّلَامِ فَاهْدِنِيْ، وَ بِالْقُرْاٰنِ فَانْفَعْنِيْ، وَ بِالْقَوْلِ الثَّابِتِ فَثَبِّتْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ فَاحْفَظْنِيْ، وَ بِحَوْلِكَ وَ قُوَّتِكَ وَ جَبَرُوْتِكَ فَاعْصِمْنِيْ، وَ بِحِلْمِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ وَ سَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ فَنَجِّنِيْ، وَ جَنَّتَكَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ فَاَسْكِنِّيْ، وَ النَّظَرَ اِلٰى وَجْهِكَ فَارْزُقْنِيْ، وَ بِنَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ فَاَلْحِقْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الشَّيَاطِيْنِ وَ اَوْلِيَائِهِمْ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِيْ شَرٍّ فَاكْفِنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: wa elaa daaris salaame fahdenee, wa bil-qur-aane fan-fa’nee, wa bil-qawlis saabete fasabbitnee, wa menash shaytaanir rajeeme fah-faznee, wa be-hawleka wa quwwateka wa jabarooteka fa’simnee, wa be-hilmeka wa i’lmeka wa sa-a’te rahmateka min jahannama fanajjenee, wa jannatakal firdawsa fa-askinnee, wan nazara elaa wajheka far-zuqnee, wa be-nabiyyeka mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi fa-alhiqnee, wa menash sahyaateene wa awleyaa-ehim wa min sharre kulle zee sharrin fakfenee.

translation.en:
Guide me to the abode of Islam and make the Quran beneficial for me and make me steadfast on the constant statement; make me secure from the accursed satan. 

And protect me through your power and strength and force. 

Save me from Hell through your forbearance and knowledge. Settle me in the Firdos Paradise and make me see your blessed countenance and join me to your prophet, Muhammad and secure me from the satans and their friends and all mischief makers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اَعْدَائِيْ وَ مَنْ كَادَنِيْ بِسُوْءٍ اِنْ اَتَوْا بَرًّا فَجَبِّنْ شَجِيْعَهُمْ، فَضِّ جُمُوْعَهُمْ، كَلِّلْ سِلَاحَهُمْ، عَرْقِبْ دَوَابَّهُمْ، سَلِّطْ عَلَيْهِمُ الْعَوَاصِفَ وَ الْقَوَاصِفَ اَبَدًا حَتّٰى تُصْلِيْهِمُ النَّارَ، اَنْزِلْهُمْ مِنْ صَيَاصِيْهِمْ، وَ اَمْكِنَّا مِنْ نَوَاصِيْهِمْ اٰمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma wa a-a’daa-ee wa man kaadanee be-soo-in in ataw barran fajabbin sha-jee-a’hum, fazze jomoo-a’hum, kallil selaahahum, a’rqib dawaabbahum, sallit a’layhemul a’waa-sefa wal qawaasefa abadan hattaa tusleehemun naara, anzilhum min sayaaseehim wa amkinnaa min nawaaseehim aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O God, if my enemies and those, who deceive me, intend to cause distress, weaken the strength of their heart and disperse their gathering and blunt their weapons and make their mounts lifeless and send fast and furious storms on them, so much so that You send them to Hell. Take them out of their refuges and bestow their control to us, amen, O Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً يَشْهَدُ الْاَوَّلُوْنَ مَعَ الْاَبْرَارِ وَ سَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِيْنَ وَ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ، وَ قَائِدِ الْخَيْرِ، وَ مِفْتَاحِ الرَّحْمَةِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin, salaatan yash-hadul awwaloona ma-a’l abraare wa sayyedil mursaleena wa khaatamin nabiyyeena, wa qaa-edil khayre, wa miftaahir rahmate.

translation.en: O God, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, which is witnessed by the formers and the latters and the righteous that your prophet is the chief of messengers, seal of prophets, leader of the righteous and key of mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ، وَ الشَّهْرِ الْحَرَامِ، وَ رَبَّ الْمَشْعَرِ الْحَرَامِ وَ رَبَّ الرُّكْنِ وَ الْمَقَامِ، وَ رَبَّ الْحِلِّ وَ الْحَرَامِ، بَلِّغْ رُوْحَ مُحَمَّدٍ مِنَّا التَّحِيَّةَ وَ السَّلَامَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma rabbal baytil haraame, wash shahril haraame, wa rabbal mash-a’ril haraame wa rabbar rukne wal maqaame, wa rabbal hille wal haraame, balligh rooha mohammadin minnat tahiyyata was salaama.

translation.en: O God, Lord of the sacred house and the sacred month; O Lord of Masharul Haraam and owner of Rukn Maqaam and Hill and Haram. Convey our salutations and respects to the soul of His Eminence, Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُوْلَ اللهِ، سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَمِيْنَ اللهِ، سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللهِ، اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa rasoolal laah, salaamun a’layka yaa ameenal laahe, salaamun a’layka yaa mohammadab na a’bdil laahe, assalaamo a’layka wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Messenger of Allah (s); Peace be on you, O trustee of Allah; Peace be on you, O Muhammad bin Abdullah; Peace be on you, and His mercy and blessings.

segments.arabic: فَهُوَ كَمَا وَصَفْتَهٗ بِالْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ رَءُوْفٌ رَحِيْمٌ.
segments.transliteration: fahowa kamaa wasaftahu bil-moameneeena raoofun raheemun.

translation.en: As he is described by God to be merciful to the believers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَعْطِهٖ اَفْضَلَ مَا سَاَلَكَ، وَ اَفْضَلَ مَا سُئِلْتَ لَهٗ، وَ اَفْضَلَ مَا اَنْتَ مَسْئُوْلٌ لَهٗ اِلٰى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ، اٰمِيْنَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a-a’tehi afzala maa sa-alaka, wa afzala maa so-ilta lahu, wa afzala maa anta mas-oolun lahu elaa yawmil qeyaamate, aameena yaa rabbal a’alameen.

translation.en: O God, bestow on him best of the things that He has asked You for; or someone else has asked regarding him, or they would be asked till Judgment Day, amen, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Recite Salaat-ul Ghufaylah between Maghrib and Isha
Recite4 Rak'ats Nafilah (2X2)after Maghrib, 2 of which can be Ghufaylah

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka biwajhika alkarimi

translation.en: O Allah, I surely beseech You in the name of Your Honorable Face,

segments.transliteration: wasmika alʿazimi

translation.en: Your Tremendous Name,

segments.transliteration: wa mulkika alqadimi

translation.en: and Your Timeless Kingdom,

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَ انْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذَنْبِيَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya alʿazima

translation.en: and to forgive my enormous sin;

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلْعَظِيمَ إِلاَّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: innahu la yaghfiru alʿazima illa alʿazimu

translation.en: for none can forgive the enormous save the All-tremendous (Lord).

segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu

translation.en: Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass!

segments.transliteration: la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is no strength save with Allah.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah.

segments.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: sabbaha lillahi ma fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: Whatever is in the heavens and the earth declares the glory of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa alʿazizu alhakimu

translation.en: and He is the Mighty, the Wise.

segments.transliteration: lahu mulku alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth;

segments.transliteration: yuhyi wa yumitu

translation.en: He gives life and causes death;

segments.transliteration: wa huwa ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: and He has power over all things.

segments.transliteration: huwa al-awwalu wal-akhiru

translation.en: He is the First and the Last

segments.transliteration: walzzahiru walbatinu

translation.en: and the Ascendant (over all) and the Knower of hidden things,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa bikulli shay'in ʿalimun

translation.en: and He is Cognizant of all things.

segments.transliteration: huwa alladhi khalaqa alssamawati wal-arda

translation.en: He it is who created the heavens and the earth

segments.transliteration: fi sittati ayyamin

translation.en: in six periods,

segments.transliteration: thumma istawa ʿala alʿarshi

translation.en: and He is firm in power;

segments.transliteration: yaʿlamu ma yaliju fi al-ardi

translation.en: He knows that which goes deep down into the earth

segments.transliteration: wa ma yakhruju minha

translation.en: and that which comes forth out of it,

segments.transliteration: wa ma yanzilu min alssama'i

translation.en: and that which comes down from the heaven

segments.transliteration: wa ma yaʿruju fiha

translation.en: and that which goes up into it,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa maʿakum ayna ma kuntum

translation.en: and He is with you wherever you are;

segments.transliteration: wallahu bima taʿmaluna basirun

translation.en: and Allah sees what you do.

segments.transliteration: lahu mulku alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth;

segments.transliteration: wa ila allahi turjaʿu al-umuru

translation.en: and to Allah are (all) affairs returned.

segments.transliteration: yuliju allayla fi alnnahari

translation.en: He causes the night to enter in upon the day,

segments.transliteration: wa yuliju alnnahara fi allayli

translation.en: and causes the day to enter in upon the night,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa ʿalimun bidhati alssuduri

translation.en: and He is Cognizant of what is in the hearts.

segments.arabic: لَوْ انْزَلْنَا هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْآنَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ
segments.transliteration: law anzalna hadha al-qur'ana ʿala jabalin

translation.en: Had We sent down this Qur'an on a mountain,

segments.arabic: لَرَايْتَهُ خَاشِعاً مُتَصَدِّعاً مِنْ خَشْيَةِ اللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: lara'aytahu khashiʿan mutasaddiʿan min khashyati allahi

translation.en: you would certainly have seen it falling down, splitting asunder because of the fear of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa tilka al-amthalu nadribuha lilnnasi

translation.en: and We set forth these parables to men

segments.transliteration: laʿallahum yatafakkaruna

translation.en: that they may reflect.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: huwa allahu alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: He is Allah besides Whom there is no god;

segments.transliteration: ʿalimu alghaybi walshshahadati

translation.en: the Knower of the unseen and the seen;

segments.transliteration: huwa alrrahmanu alrrahimu

translation.en: He is the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: huwa allahu alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: He is Allah, besides Whom there is no god;

segments.transliteration: almaliku alquddusu

translation.en: the King, the Holy,

segments.transliteration: alssalamu almu'minu almuhayminu

translation.en: the Giver of peace, the Granter of security, Guardian over all,

segments.transliteration: alʿazizu aljabbaru almutakabbiru

translation.en: the Mighty, the Supreme, the Possessor of every greatness.

segments.transliteration: subhana allahi ʿamma yushrikuna

translation.en: Glory be to Allah from what they set up with Him.

segments.transliteration: huwa allahu alkhaliqu albari'u almusawwiru

translation.en: He is Allah the Creator, the Maker, the Fashioner;

segments.transliteration: lahu al-asma'u alhusna

translation.en: His are the most excellent names;

segments.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: yusabbihu lahu ma fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: whatever is in the heavens and the earth declares His glory;

segments.transliteration: wa huwa alʿazizu alhakimu

translation.en: and He is the Mighty, the Wise.

text.en: As in other Nafila , it is sufficient to recite Surah al-Fatihah alone in each unit. It is advisable to recite the Surahs with audible voice,

segments.transliteration: shukran shukran shukran

translation.en: Thanks, thanks, thanks.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: In the Name of Allah save Whom there is no god,

segments.transliteration: ʿalimu alghaybi walshshahadati

translation.en: the Knower of the unseen and the seen,

segments.transliteration: alrrahmanu alrrahimu

translation.en: the All-beneficent, and the All-merciful.

segments.transliteration: allahumma adhhib ʿanniya alhamma walhazana

translation.en: O Allah, (please) take away from me grief and distress.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لِي عِلْمٌ بِمَوْضِعِ رِزْقِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu laysa li ʿilmun bimawadiʿi rizqi

translation.en: O Allah! verily, I lack acquaintance with the place of my sustenance;

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّمَا أَطْلُبُهُ بِخَطَرَاتٍ تَخْطُرُ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa innma atlubuhu bikhataratin takhturu ʿala qalbi

translation.en: rather, I am seeking it owing to ideas that come upon my mind.

segments.transliteration: fa-ajulu fi talabihu albuldana

translation.en: I consequently wander in countries searching for it.

segments.transliteration: fa-ana fima ana talibun kalhayrani

translation.en: By doing such, I am as confused as the confounded,

segments.arabic: لاَ أَدْرِي أَفِي سَهْلٍ هَوُ أَمْ فِي جَبَلٍ
segments.transliteration: la adri afi sahlin huwa am fi jabalin

translation.en: since I do not know whether my sustenance lies in a plain, on a mountain,

segments.arabic: أَمْ في أَرْضٍ أَمْ في سَمَاءٍ
segments.transliteration: am fi ardin am fi sama'in

translation.en: on the ground, in the air,

segments.arabic: أَمْ فِي بَرٍّ أَمْ فِي بَحْرٍ
segments.transliteration: am fi barrin am fi bahrin

translation.en: on lands, in seas,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala yaday man

translation.en: at whose hands,

segments.transliteration: wa min qibali man

translation.en: or who the source of it is.

segments.transliteration: wa qad ʿalimtu anna ʿilmahu ʿindaka

translation.en: I have full knowledge that You know all these,

segments.transliteration: wa asbabahu biyadika

translation.en: the causes of them are in Your Hands,

segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhi taqsimuhu bilutfika

translation.en: and it is You Who distribute it out of Your compassion

segments.transliteration: wa tusabbibuhu birahmatika

translation.en: and cause it out of Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, please send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ يَا رَبِّ رِزْقَكَ لِي وَاسِعاً
segments.transliteration: wajʿal ya rabbi rizqaka li wasiʿan

translation.en: and make, O Lord, Your sustenance that is provided (by You) to me expansive,

segments.transliteration: wa matlabahu sahlan

translation.en: my seeking for it easy for me,

segments.transliteration: wa ma'khadhahu qariban

translation.en: and its source close to me.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُعَنِّنِي بِطَلَبِ مَا لَمْ تُقَدِّرْ لِي فيهِ رِزْقاً
segments.transliteration: wa la tuʿannini bitalbi ma lam tuqaddiru li fihi rizqan

translation.en: Please, do not fatigue me by seeking that which You have not decided for me to take,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka ghaniyyun ʿan ʿadhabi

translation.en: because You are certainly in no need for tormenting me

segments.transliteration: wa ana faqirun ila rahmatika

translation.en: while I am in full need for Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: fasalli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: (Please) Send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa jud ʿala ʿabdika bifadlika

translation.en: and confer liberally upon me, Your slave, out of Your graciousness.

segments.transliteration: innaka dhu fadlin ʿazimin

translation.en: You are surely the Lord of great favor.

text.en: 3.Then recite-"Allahumma Rabba alssamawati..":

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَمَا اظَلَّتْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alssamawati alssabʿi wa ma azallat

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of the seven skies and whatever they shade,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba al-aradina alssabʿi wa ma aqallat

translation.en: Lord of the seven layers of the earth and whatever they carry,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba alshshayatini wa ma adallat

translation.en: Lord of the devils and whatever they mislead,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba alrriyahi wa ma dharat

translation.en: and Lord of the winds and whatever they winnow!

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba kulli shay'in

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of all things,

segments.transliteration: wa ilaha kulli shay'in

translation.en: God of all things,

segments.transliteration: wa malika kulli shay'in

translation.en: and Possessor of all things!

segments.arabic: انْتَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُقْتَدِرُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu almuqtadiru ʿala kulli shay'in

translation.en: You are Allah, the Omnipotent over all things.

segments.arabic: انْتَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلاوَّلُ فَلاَ شَيْءَ قَبْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu al-awwalu fala shay'a qablaka

translation.en: You are Allah the Foremost; there is thus nothing before You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta al-akhiru fala shay'a baʿdaka

translation.en: You are the Last; there is thus nothing after You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alzzahiru fala shay'a fawqaka

translation.en: You are the Ascendant; there is thus nothing above You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta albatinu fala shay'a dunaka

translation.en: You are the Inward; there is thus nothing concealed from You.

segments.transliteration: rabba jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila

translation.en: O Lord of Gabriel, Michael, and Seraph!

segments.transliteration: wa ilaha ibrahima wa ismaʿila

translation.en: O God of Abraham, Ishmael,

segments.transliteration: wa ishaqa wa yaʿquba wal-asbati

translation.en: Isaac, Jacob, and the Tribes!

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an tawallani birahmatika

translation.en: to oversee me with Your mercy

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ احَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tusallit ʿalayya ahadan min khalqika

translation.en: and not to give any of Your creatures power over me

segments.transliteration: mimman la taqata li bihi

translation.en: that I cannot stand.

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni atahabbabu ilayka fahabbibni

translation.en: O Allah, I am endearing myself to You; so (please) endear me to the others,

segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnasi faʿazzizni

translation.en: create affection for me among people,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ شَّيَاطِينِ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلإِنْسِ فَسَلِّمْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri shshayatini aljinn wal-insi fasallimni

translation.en: and keep me sound from the evil of the devils of jinn and men,

segments.transliteration: ya rabba alʿalamina

translation.en: O Lord of the Worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: and bless Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: Nos 4 to 9 |Nos 10 - 16
4.The Isha Nafilah
The Nafila prayer, consists oftwo units and should be offered in the sitting positionit is recommended to recite Surah al-Waqi`ah (No. 56) in the first unit and Surah al-Tawhid in the second.
5.Imam Hassan Askari(as) has recommended recite Salwaat 100 timesfor any need after the Isha Nafila .

segments.arabic: يَا مُذِلَّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ وَمُعِزَّ كُلِّ ذَليلٍ قَدْ وَحَقِّكَ بَلِّغْ مَجْهُودِي
اَللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا مَنْ لَا تَرَاهُ الْعُيُونُ وَلَا تُخَالِطُهُ الظُّنُونُ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka yaa man laa tarahu al-'uyoonu wa laa tukhaalituhu ath-thunoonu

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You, O One whom eyes cannot see, and thoughts cannot perceive.

segments.transliteration: Wa laa yasifuhu alwaasifoon

translation.en: And whom describers cannot describe.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تُغَيِّرُهُ الدُّهُورُ وَلَا تُبْلِيهِ الْأَزْمِنَةُ وَلَا تَحْمِلُهُ الْأُمُورُ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa taghayyiruhu adduhooru wa laa tublihi alazminatu wa laa tahmiluhu alumooru

translation.en: O One whom time does not change, nor do ages wear out, nor is He burdened by matters.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَذُوقُ الْمَوْتَ وَلَا يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa yadhooq almawta wa laa yakhaafu alfawta

translation.en: O One who does not taste death and does not fear loss.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَضُرُّهُ الذُّنُوبُ وَلَا تَنْقُصُهُ الْمَغْفِرَةُ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa tadhurruhu adhdhunoobu wa laa tanqusu almaghfirah

translation.en: O One whom sins do not harm, nor does forgiveness diminish Him.

segments.transliteration: Salli 'ala Muhammad wa aalihi

translation.en: Send blessings upon Muhammad and his family.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي مَا لَا يَنْقُصُكَ وَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا لَا يَضُرُّكَ وَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: Wahab li ma laa yanqusuq wa ighfir li ma laa yadhurruq wa af'al bi ma anta ahluh

translation.en: Grant me what does not diminish You, forgive me for what does not harm You, and deal with me as You are worthy.

text.en: 10. Recite "Allaahumma A'afinaa"

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَافِنَا مِنْ كُلِّ بَلَاءِ الدُّنْيَاوَاصْرِفْ عَنَّا شَرَّ الدُّنْيَا وَ شَرَّ الْآخِرَۃِوَارْزُقْنَا خَيْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَ خَيْرَ الْآخِرَۃِبِفَضْلِکَ وَ رَحْمَتِکَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a’afinaa min kulli balaa-id dunyaa was’-rif a’nnaa sharrad dunyaa wa sharral aakhirati war-zuqnaa khayrad dunyaa wa khayrul aakhirati bifaz”lika wa rah’matika yaa arh’amar raah’imeen

translation.en: Oh Allah save us from all tribulations of the world; and turn away from us the evil of the world and the evil of the hereafter; and give us the good of the world and the good of the hereafter; By Thy grace and by Thy mercy, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!"

text.en: 11. Recite :"Allhumma haza salati"

segments.arabic:
اَللّٰهُمَّ هٰذِهٖ صَلَاتِي صَلَّيْتُهَا لَا لِحَاجَةٍ مِنْكَ إِلَيْهَا
 وَ لَا رَغْبَةٍ مِنْكَ فِيْهَا إِلَّا تَعْظِيمًا وَ طَاعَةً وَ إِجَابَةً لَّكَ إِلىٰ مَا أَمَرْتَنِي

translation.en: Oh Allah, this is the prayer that I have offered to thee. In offering it I have no need from Thee and no personal wish from Thee except to bow down (before Thy majesty) and to obey Thee and to comply with what Thou hast commanded me.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِنْ كَانَ فِيْهَا خَلَلٌ أَوْ نَقْصٌ مِنْ رُكُوْعِهَا أَوْ سُجُوْدِهَا أَوْ قِيَامِهَا أَوْ قُعُوْدِهَا فَلَا تُؤَاخِذْنِي وَ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِالْقَبُوْلِ وَ الْغُفْرَانِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: “ Oh Allah, do not punish me if there has been any flaw or defect in my bowings, my prostrations or my standings or sittings, and bestow Thy grace on me by Thy acceptance and forgiveness by Thy mercy. Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!”

translation.en: 12.Then recite the following:"A'ooza be'izzatil-lahe"

segments.arabic: أَعُوْذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِقُدْرَةِ الله وَ أَعُوْذُ بِمَغْفِرَةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِرَحْمَةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِسُلْطَانِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ هُوَ عَلىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌوَ
segments.transliteration: A'ooza be'izzatil-lahe wa a'oozo be-qoodaratil-lahe wa a'oozo be-magh-firatil-lahe wa a'oozo be-rahmatil-lahe, wa a'oozo be-sooltanil-lahil-lazi-hova ala koolle shai'in qadeer.

translation.en: "I seek refuge in the might of Allah, and I seek refuge in the power of Allah, and I seek refuge in the forgiveness of Allah, and I seek refuge in the mercy of Allah, I seek refuge in the dominion of Allah, He Who has power over all things

segments.arabic: أَعُوْذُ بِكَرَمِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِجَمْعِ اللهِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ وَ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيْدٍ وَ كُلِّ مُغْتَالٍ وَ سَارِقٍ وَ عَارِضٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa a'o-ozo be - karamil-lahe wa a'ooze be jamillahes min sharre koolle jabbarin aneedin wa shaitanin mareed , koolle mookh-talin wa sare-qin wa arezin

translation.en: and I seek refuge in the mercy of Allah from the evil of all strong tyrants and the rebellious Shaitan, and all persons who attack from ambush, thieves and all accidents;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ وَ الْهَامَّةِ وَ الْعَامَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharris saam-mate val-haam-mate val-aam mate,

translation.en: and from the poisonous animals, and noxious insects and reptiles and evil of the common people

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ صَغِيْرَةٍ وَ كَبِيْرَةٍ بِلَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre koolle daab-batin saghiratin av kabiratin be lailin wa naharin,

translation.en: and from the menace of the small and big beasts in the nigh or in the day;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فُسَّاقِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ وَ فُجَّارِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre foossaquil-arabe val-aajame wa foojjarehim,

translation.en: and from the evil of the transgressors of Arab and non-Arabs and their sinners,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre fasaqatit jinne val-inse,

translation.en: and from the evil of the transgressors among Jinn and men

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ رَبِّي آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيْمٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre koolle daab-batin anta aakhizoon benasiyateha inna rabbi ala siratim moostaqeem

translation.en: and from the evil of all living creatures which Thou holds by their forelock. Surely straight is the path of my Lord".

text.en: 13.Then recite the following: Allhumma be haqqe Muhammad..

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلِّ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: "Oh Allah! By the truth of Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُؤْمِنَّا مَكْرَكَ وَ لَا تُنْسِنَا ذِكْرَكَ وَ لَا تَكْشِفْ عَنَّا سِتْرَكَ

translation.en: and save me from Thy plan; and make us not forgetful of Thy remembrance;and do not disclose our defects which Thou has concealed;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَحْرِمْنَا فَضْلَكَ وَ لَا تُحِلَّ عَلَيْنَا غَضَبَكَ وَ لَا تُبَاعِدْنَا مِنْ جِوَارِكَ وَ لَا تَنْقُصْنَا مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ

translation.en: and do not deprive us of Thy grace; and do not bring down Thy wrath on us; and do not send us away from Thy vicinity and do not diminish Thy mercy on us;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَنْزِعْ مِنَّا بَرَكَتَكَ وَ لَا تَمْنَعْنَا عَافِيَتَكَ وَ أَصْلِحْ لَنَا مَا أَعْطَيْتَنَا

translation.en: and do not deflect Thy blessing from us; and do not deprive us of Thy salvation and set aright what thou has given us;

segments.arabic: وَ زِدْنَا مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْمُبَارَكِ الطَّيِّبِ الْحَسَنِ الْجَمِيْلِ وَ لَا تُغَيِّرْ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَتِكَ وَ لَا تُؤْيِسْنَا مِنْ رَوْحِكَ وَ لَا تُهِنَّا بَعْدَ كَرَامَتِكَ

translation.en: and increase Thy blessed, excellent and fine bounty on us; and do not alter thy blessings which we possess and do not remove us away from Thy abundance for undoubtedly thou art most generous;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُضِلَّنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنا وَ هَبْ لَنا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ

translation.en: and do not let us go astray after thou hast guided us aright; and grant us from Thee mercy. Verily, Thou are Most generous.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ قُلُوْبَنَا سَالِمَةً وَ أَرْوَاحَنَا طَيِّبَةً وَ أَزْوَاجَنَا مُطَهَّرَةً وَ أَلْسِنَتَنَا صَادِقَةً وَ إِيْمَانَنَا دَائِماً وَ يَقِيْنَنَا صَادِقاً وَ تِجَارَتَنَا لَا تَبُورُ

translation.en: Oh Allah! make our hearts obedient to Thee and our souls good, and keep our wives chaste, and make our tongues truthful and our belief lasting and our certainty sincere and do not destroy our livelihood

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَ قِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ.

translation.en: our Lord! Grant us good in the world and good in the hereafter, and save us from the chastisement of the fire".

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ عَجِّلْ فَرَجَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ إِحْفَظْ غَيْبَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ ، يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ إِنْتَقِمْ لِابْنَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ عليهما السلام .

translation.en: O' Lord of Muhammad hasten the relief of the family of Muhammad, O' Lord of Muhammad protect the absence of Muhammad, O' Lord of Muhammad retaliate for the daughter of Muhammad (peace be on them).

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ . أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّ رَسُولَكَ الصَّادِقَ الْمُصَدَّقَ صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ قالَ إِنَّكَ قُلْتَ ما تَرَدَّدْتُ في شَيْءٍ أَنَا فاعِلُهُ كَتَرَدُّدي في قَبْضِ رُوحِ عَبْدِيَ الْمُؤْمِنِ، يَكْرَهُ الْمَوْتَ وَأَنَا أَكْرَهُ مَساءَتَهُ .

translation.en: O' Allah! Send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, O' Allah! Verily Your Prophet, the faithful ones and the trust worthy ones report Your saying that You said: You did not hesitate in anything like You do when taking the life of a good believing servant, he dislike death while I dislike causing him harm.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَعَجِّلْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْفَرَجَ ، وَالنَّصْرَ وَالْعافِيَةَ ، وَلاتَسُؤْني في نَفْسي ، وَلا في فُلانٍ .

translation.en: O' Allah send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and hasten Your guard's relief, grant him good health and victory, and don't cause evil to my soul, and don't cause me evil through So and so person.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا، وَأَجْرًا عَظِيمًا، وَتَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا، وَلِسَانًا ذَاكِرًا، وَبَدَنًا حَلِيمًا، وَرِزْقًا مَزِيدًا، وَعِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَعَمَلًا صَالِحًا، وَدُعَاءً مُسْتَجَابًا، وَذَنْبًا مَغْفُورًا، وَرِزْقًا صَادِقًا، وَذُرِّيَّةً صَالِحَةً، وَشِفَاءً شَافِيًا، وَمَصِيرًا مُبَارَكًا، وَنَصْرًا قَرِيبًا، وَنَعِيمًا دَائِمًا، وَالْجَنَّةَ، وَالْحَرِيرَ، وَالنَّضَارَةَ، وَالسُّرُورَ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka sabran jameelan, wa ajran azeeman, wa tawbatan nasoohan, wa lisanan dhakiran, wa badanan haleeman, wa rizqan mazeedan, wa 'ilman naafi'an, wa 'amalan salihan, wa du'aa'an mustajaaban, wa dhanban maghfooran, wa rizqan saadiqan, wa dhurriyyatan salihatan, wa shifaa'an shaafiyan, wa maseeran mubaarakan, wa nasran qareeban, wa na'eeman daaiman, wal-jannata, wal-hareera, wan-nadharata, was-surura, birahmatika yaa arhamar-raahimeen.

translation.en: "Oh Allah! I ask Thee for joyful patience, great reward; sincere turning; a remembering tongue; forbearing body; increased subsistence beneficial knowledge and good action; granted supplication; forgiven sin; honest livelihood; decent children; wholesome cure; a blessed destination; a victory close at hand; and lasting bliss and the Paradise, and silk, and freshness and vigour, and delight, by Thy mercy, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!"

text.en: ReciteSyeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after isha Salat

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعَظَمَتِهٖ، سُبْحَانَ مَنْ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعِزَّتِهٖ، سُبْحَانَ مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِاَمْرِهٖ وَ مُلْكِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: subhaana man tawaa-za-a’ kullo shay-in le-a’zamatehi, subhaana man zalla kullo shay-in le-i’zzatehi, subhaana man khaza-a’ kullo shay-in le-amrehi wa mulkehi.

translation.en: Glorified is the one, before whose greatness, everything is subservient. Glorified is the one, before whose power, everything is debased.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنِ انْقَادَتْ لَهُ الْاُمُوْرُ بِاَزِمَّتِهَا.
segments.transliteration: subhaana manin qaadat lahul omooro be-azimmatehaa.

translation.en: Glorified is the one, before whose command and kingdom, everything is humble.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَنْسَى مَنْ ذَكَرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lā yansā man dhakarahu,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who never forgets the one who remembers Him,

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يُخَيِّبُ مَنْ دَعَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lā yukhayyibu man da‘āhu,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who never disappoints the one who calls upon Him,

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَيْهِ كَفَاهُ.
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī man tawakkala ‘alayhi kafāhu.

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who suffices whoever relies upon Him.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَامِكِ السَّمَاءِ، وَ سَاطِحِ الْأَرْضِ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi sāmiḳi as-samā’i, wa sāṭiḥi al-arḍi,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, the One Who raised the heavens and spread the earth,

segments.arabic: وَ حَاصِرِ الْبِحَارِ، وَ نَاضِدِ الْجِبَالِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ḥāṣiri al-biḥāri, wa nāḍidi al-jibāli,

translation.en: and Who confines the seas, and Who sets firm the mountains,

segments.arabic: وَ بَارِئِ الْحَيَوَانِ، وَ خَالِقِ الشَّجَرِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bāri’i al-ḥayawāni, wa khāliqi ash-shajari,

translation.en: and Who created living beings, and Who brought forth the trees,

segments.arabic: وَ فَاتِحِ يَنَابِيعِ الْأَرْضِ، وَ مُدَبِّرِ الْأُمُورِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa fātiḥi yanābī‘i al-arḍi, wa mudabbiri al-umūri,

translation.en: and Who opened the springs of the earth, and Who directs the affairs,

segments.arabic: وَ مُسَيِّرِ السَّحَابِ، وَ مُجْرِي الرِّيحِ وَ الْمَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa musayyiri as-saḥābi, wa mujri ar-rīḥi wa al-mā’i,

translation.en: and Who drives the clouds, and Who sets in motion the wind and the water,

segments.arabic: وَ النَّارِ مِنْ أَغْوَارِ الْأَرْضِ، مُتَسَارِعَاتٍ فِي الْهَوَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa an-nāri min aghwāri al-arḍi, mutasāri‘ātin fī al-hawā’i,

translation.en: and the fire from the depths of the earth, swiftly moving in the air,

segments.transliteration: Wa muhbiti al-ḥarri wa al-bardi.

translation.en: and Who sends down heat and cold.

segments.arabic: اَلَّذِيْ بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ، وَ بِشُكْرِهِ تُسْتَوْجَبُ الزِّيَادَاتُ،
segments.transliteration: Alladhī bina‘matihi tatimmu aṣ-ṣāliḥātu, wa bishukrihi tustawjabu az-ziyādātu,

translation.en: The One by Whose blessing good deeds are completed, and by Whose gratitude increases are deserved,

segments.arabic: وَبِأَمْرِهِ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ، وَبِعِزَّتِهِ اسْتَقَرَّتِ الرَّاسِيَاتُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi’amrihi qāmati as-samāwātu, wa bi‘izzatihi istaqarrati ar-rāsiyātu,

translation.en: and by His command the heavens were established, and by His might the firm mountains were set,

segments.arabic: وَسَبَّحَتِ الْوُحُوشُ فِي الْفَلَوَاتِ، وَالطَّيْرُ فِي الْوَكَنَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: Wa sabbaḥati al-wuḥūshu fī al-falawāti, waṭ-ṭayru fī al-wakanāti.

translation.en: and the wild beasts glorify Him in the open fields, and the birds in their nests.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَفِيعِ الدَّرَجَاتِ، مُنْزِلِ الْآيَاتِ، وَاسِعِ الْبَرَكَاتِ، سَاتِرِ الْعَوْرَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi rafī‘i ad-darajāti, munzili al-āyāti, wāsi‘i al-barakāti, sātiri al-‘awrāti,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, the Exalted in ranks, Revealer of signs, Expander of blessings, and Concealer of faults,

segments.arabic: قَابِلِ الْحَسَنَاتِ، مُقِيلِ الْعَثَرَاتِ، مُنَفِّسِ الْكُرُبَاتِ، مُنْزِلِ الْبَرَكَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: Qābili al-ḥasanāti, muqīli al-‘atharāti, munaffisi al-kurubāti, munzili al-barakāti,

translation.en: Accepter of good deeds, Forgiver of stumbles, Reliever of distresses, and Sender of blessings,

segments.arabic: مُجِيبِ الدَّعَوَاتِ، مُحْيِي الْأَمْوَاتِ، إِلٰهِ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَ السَّمَاوَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: Mujībi ad-da‘awāti, muḥyī al-amwāti, ilāha man fī al-arḍi wa as-samāwāti.

translation.en: Answerer of prayers, Reviver of the dead, God of all in the earth and the heavens.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَمْدٍ وَ ذِكْرٍ، وَ شُكْرٍ وَ صَبْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi ‘alā kulli ḥamdin wa dhikrin, wa shukrin wa ṣabrin,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah for every praise and remembrance, and for gratitude and patience,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَاةٍ وَ زَكَاةٍ، وَ قِيَامٍ وَ عِبَادَةٍ، وَ سَعَادَةٍ وَ بَرَكَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣalātin wa zakātin, wa qiyāmin wa ‘ibādah, wa sa‘ādah wa barakah,

translation.en: and for prayer and almsgiving, for standing in worship and servitude, for happiness and blessing,

segments.arabic: وَ زِيَادَةٍ وَ رَحْمَةٍ، وَ نِعْمَةٍ وَ كَرَامَةٍ، وَ فَرِيضَةٍ وَ سَرَّاءَ وَ ضَرَّاءَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ziyādah wa raḥmah, wa ni‘mah wa karāmah, wa farīḍah wa sarā’a wa ḍarrā’a,

translation.en: and for increase and mercy, for bounty and honor, for obligations, for ease and hardship,

segments.arabic: وَ شِدَّةٍ وَ رَخَاءٍ، وَ مُصِيبَةٍ وَ بَلَاءٍ، وَ عُسْرٍ وَ يُسْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa shiddah wa rakhā’, wa muṣībah wa balā’, wa ‘usrin wa yusrin,

translation.en: and for severity and relief, for trials and afflictions, for difficulty and ease,

segments.arabic: وَ غِنَاءٍ وَ فَقْرٍ، وَ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ، وَ فِي كُلِّ أَوَانٍ وَ زَمَانٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ghinā’in wa faqr, wa ‘alā kulli ḥālin, wa fī kulli awānin wa zamānin,

translation.en: and for wealth and poverty, in every state, and in every time and age,

segments.arabic: وَ فِي كُلِّ مَثْوًى وَ مُنْقَلَبٍ وَ مُقَامٍ.
segments.transliteration: Wa fī kulli mathwan wa munqalabin wa maqāmin.

translation.en: and in every dwelling, return, and station.
