segments.transliteration: 1. Repeat the Takbir statement (i.e. Allahu Akbar; Allah is the Greatest) three times while raising your hands to the level of your ears2.Recite theTasbih az-Zahra'litany.34 times AllahuAkbar , 33 times Alhamdolillah , 33 times Subhanallah3.Recite this dua "La ilaha illa allahu ilahan wahidan": |pps

translation.en: la ilaha illa allahu

text.en: There is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: ilahan wahidan

translation.en: One and Only God;

segments.transliteration: wa nahnu lahu muslimuna

translation.en: and we are submissive to Him.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah

segments.transliteration: wa la naʿbudu illa iyyahu

translation.en: and we worship none save Him,

segments.transliteration: mukhlisina lahu alddina

translation.en: making our devotion sincere as in His sight,

segments.transliteration: wa law kariha almushrikuna

translation.en: even though the polytheists may detest it.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: rabbuna wa rabbu aba'ina al-awwalina

translation.en: (He is) Our Lord and the Lord of our fathers of old.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: wahdahu wahdahu wahdahu

translation.en: Alone, alone, alone.

segments.transliteration: anjaza waʿdahu

translation.en: He has truly fulfilled His promise,

segments.transliteration: wa nasara ʿabdahu

translation.en: granted His servant victory,

segments.transliteration: wa aʿazza jundahu

translation.en: made powerful His soldiers,

segments.transliteration: wa hazama al-ahzaba wahdahu

translation.en: and defeated the parties alone.

segments.transliteration: falahu almulku wa lahu alhamdu

translation.en: So, sovereignty be His and praise be His.

segments.transliteration: yuhyi wa yumitu

translation.en: He grants life and causes (others) to die,

segments.transliteration: wa yumitu wa yuhyi

translation.en: and (then) causes to die and raises from the dead;

segments.transliteration: wa huwa hayyun la yamutu

translation.en: while He is eternally ever-living and He never dies.

segments.transliteration: biyadihi alkhayru

translation.en: All goodness is at His Hand,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: and He has power over all things.

text.en: 2.Then, say the following:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْحَيُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa,alhayyu alqayyumu wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah; there is no god save Him, the Ever-living and Self-Subsisting; and to Him do I turn in repentance.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ihdiny min ʿindika

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) guide me to the true guidance of Yours,

segments.transliteration: wa afid ʿalayya min fadlika

translation.en: pour upon me from Your grace,

segments.transliteration: wanshur ʿalayya min rahmatika

translation.en: spread over me from Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa anzil ʿalayya min barakatika

translation.en: and bring down upon me from Your blessings.

segments.transliteration: subhanaka la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Glory be to You; there is no god save You.

segments.transliteration: ighfir li dhunubi kulliha jamiʿan

translation.en: (Please) forgive my sins—all of them entirely,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ كُلَّهَا جَمِيعاً إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba kulliha jamiʿan illa anta

translation.en: because none can forgive all sins entirely save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min kulli khayrin ahata bihi ʿilmuka

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me part of all good things that are encompassed by Your knowledge

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min kulli sharrin ahata bihi ʿilmuka

translation.en: and I seek Your protection against all evils that are encompassed by Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عَافِيَتَكَ في أُمُوري كُلِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka ʿafiyataka fi umuri kulliha

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me wellbeing from You in all of my affairs

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ ٱلآخَرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min khizyi alddunya wa ʿadhabi alakhirati

translation.en: and I seek Your protection against the disgrace of this world and the chastisement in the Next World.

segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu biwajhika alkarimi

translation.en: I also seek protection of Your Noble Face,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿizzatika allati la turamu

translation.en: Your invulnerable omnipotence,

segments.arabic: وَقُدْرَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَمْتَنِعُ مِنْهَا شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qudratika allati la yamtaniʿu minha shay'un

translation.en: and Your power that none can deter

segments.transliteration: min sharri alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: against the evils of this world and the Next World,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri alawjaʿi kulliha

translation.en: the evils of all pains,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and the evil of all moving creatures that You grasp from forelocks.

segments.transliteration: inna rabbi ʿala siratin mustaqimin

translation.en: Verily, my Lord is on a Straight Path.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: There is neither strength nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: tawakkaltu ʿala alhayyi alladhi la yamutu

translation.en: I put my trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has not taken to Himself a son,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَريكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: nor has He had any partner in sovereignty,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun mina aldhdhulli

translation.en: nor does He need any to protect Him from humiliation.

segments.transliteration: wa kabbirhu takbiran

translation.en: And magnify Him with all magnificence.

text.en: 4.Before you move from your prayer-place, repeat the following litanyten times:

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: wahdahu la sharika lahu

translation.en: (He is) One and Only; and there is no partner with Him;

segments.transliteration: ilahan wahidan

translation.en: a Single God;

segments.transliteration: ahadan fardan samadan

translation.en: One, Unique, and eternally Besought of all.

segments.transliteration: lam yattakhidh sahibatan wa la waladan

translation.en: He has taken to Himself neither a wife nor a son.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ كُلَّما سَبَّحَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi kullama sabbaha allaha shay'un

translation.en: All Glory be to Allah whenever Allah is glorified by things,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yusabbaha

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes to be glorified,

segments.transliteration: wa kama huwa ahluhu

translation.en: as exactly as He is worthy of glorification,

segments.arabic: وَكمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa ʿizzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا حَمِدَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi kullama hamida allaha shay'un

translation.en: All praise be to Allah whenever Allah is praised by things,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yuhmada

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes to be praised,

segments.transliteration: wa kama huwa ahluhu

translation.en: as exactly as He is worthy of praising,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa ʿizzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ كُلَّمَا هَلَّلَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu kullama hallala allaha shay'un

translation.en: There is no god save Allah whenever Allah's Oneness in Godhead is professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yuhallala

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes His Oneness in Godhead to be professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama huwa ahluhu

translation.en: as exactly as He is worthy of being the One and Only God,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa ʿizzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كُلَّمَا كَبَّرَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru kullama kabbara allaha shay'un

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest whenever Allah's Most Greatness is professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yukabbara

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes His Most Greatness to be professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama huwa ahluhu

translation.en: as exactly as He is worthy of being the Greatest,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa ʿizzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.transliteration: subhana allahi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah;

segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi

translation.en: all praise be to Allah;

segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: there is no god save Allah;

segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru

translation.en: and Allah is the Greatest

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نِعْمَة أَنْعَمَ بِهَا عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: ʿala kulli niʿmatin anʿama biha ʿalayya

translation.en: for all bounties that He has bestowed upon me

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala kulli ahadin min khalqihi

translation.en: and upon each and every being of His creatures,

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ كَانَ أَوْ يَكُونُ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: mimman kana aw yakunu ila yawmi alqiyamati

translation.en: including those who passed away and those who will exist up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا أَرْجُو
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka min khayri ma arju

translation.en: and I beseech You to grant me the best of what I hope

segments.transliteration: wa khayri ma la arju

translation.en: and the best of what I have not included with my hopes.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَحْذَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min sharri ma ahdharu

translation.en: I also beseech You to protect me against the evil of what I anticipate

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma la ahdharu

translation.en: and the evils of what I do not anticipate.

text.en: 7.Then, repeat the following prayer three times:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: wajʿal li min amri farajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: cause all my affairs to arrive at a relief, prepare for me a way out,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ أَحْتَسِبُ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu

translation.en: and give me sustenance from whence I think and from whence I do not think.

text.en: 8.Then, hold your beard with your right hand, raise your left hand towards the sky, and repeat the following prayer seven times:

segments.transliteration: yarabba muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Lord of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad:

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa ʿajjil faraja ali muhammadin

translation.en: and hasten the Relief of the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: Holding the same situation, repeat the following prayer three times:

segments.transliteration: ya dhaljalali wal-ikrami

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Honor,

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: warhamni wa ajirni mina alnnari

translation.en: have mercy upon me, and deliver me from Hellfire.

text.en: 9. Sahifa Alavia no 102. His supplication after the five daily prayers. Recite Surah Tauheed twelve times then spread your hands and recite the following Dua:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ ٱلْمَخْزُونِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bismika almaknuni almakhzuni

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in Your Name: the well-guarded, stored,

segments.transliteration: alttahiri alttuhri almubaraki

translation.en: pure, immaculate, and blessed.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alʿazimi

translation.en: And I beseech You in Your Great Name

segments.transliteration: wa sultanika alqadimi

translation.en: and Your eternal power.

segments.transliteration: ya wahiba alʿataya

translation.en: O Donor of gifts!

segments.transliteration: wa ya mutliqa al-usara

translation.en: O Releaser of captives!

segments.transliteration: wa ya fakkaka alrriqabi mina alnnari

translation.en: O Deliverer of necks from the Fire!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُعْتِقَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa an tuʿtiqa raqabati mina alnnari

translation.en: to deliver me from the Fire,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَنِي مِنَ ٱلدُّنْيَا سَالِماً
segments.transliteration: wa an tukhrijani mina alddunya saliman

translation.en: to cause me leave this world free (from liabilities),

segments.transliteration: wa tudkhilani aljannata aminan

translation.en: to allow me to Paradise with security,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ دُعَائِي أَوَّلَهُ فَلاَحاً
segments.transliteration: wa an tajʿala duʿa'i awwalahu falahan

translation.en: and to make the beginning of my prayer successful,

segments.transliteration: wa awsatahu najahan

translation.en: the middle of it a gain,

segments.transliteration: wa akhirahu salahan

translation.en: and the end of it a prosperity.

segments.transliteration: innaka anta ʿallamu alghuyubi

translation.en: Verily, You are the Knower of all unseen things.

text.en: 10.Sahifah al-`Alawiyyah no 105, the following prayer is said after the obligatory prayers:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَنْ سَمْعٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yashghaluhu samʿun ʿan samʿin

translation.en: O He Who is not distracted by a sound from hearing another sound!

segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yughallituhu alssa'iluna

translation.en: O He Who is not confused by the beseechers!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ ٱلْمُلِحِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yubrimuhu ilhahu almulihhina

translation.en: O He Who is not annoyed by the insistence of those who entreat Him persistently!

segments.transliteration: adhiqni barda ʿafwika

translation.en: (Please do) Make me taste the nice flavor of Your pardon

segments.transliteration: wa halawata rahmatika wa maghfiratika

translation.en: and the sweetness of Your mercy and forgiveness.

text.en: 11.Recite "ilahi hadhihi salati sallaytuha:"

segments.transliteration: ilahi hadhihi salati sallaytuha

translation.en: O Allah, This is my prayer that I have just offered

segments.transliteration: la lihajatin minka ilayha

translation.en: on account of neither a need that You may have for it

segments.transliteration: wa la raghbatin minka fiha

translation.en: nor a desire that You may have for it;

segments.transliteration: illa taʿziman wa taʿatan

translation.en: rather, it is only glorification of You, obedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَإِجَابَةً لَكَ إِلَىٰ مَا أَمَرْتَنِي بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ijabatan laka ila ma amartani bihi

translation.en: and response to You to carry out what You have ordered me to do.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ فِيهَا خَلَلٌ أَوْ نَقْصٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana fiha khalalun aw naqsun

translation.en: O my God: If there is a defect or a deficiency in my prayer,

segments.transliteration: min rukuʿiha aw sujudiha

translation.en: whether in the genuflection or the prostration;

segments.transliteration: fala tu´akhidhni

translation.en: then, (please) do not reproach me for it;

segments.transliteration: wa tafaddal ʿalayya bilqabuli wal-ghufrani

translation.en: rather, confer upon me with Your acceptance (of it) and forgiveness (of me).

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَعْتَدي عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la yaʿtadi ʿala ahli mamlakatihi

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not treat the people of His realm with transgression!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَأْخُذُ أَهْلَ ٱلأَرْضِ بِأَلْوَانِ الْعَذَابِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la ya'khudhu ahla al-ardi bi-alwani alʿadhabi

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not inflict on the inhabitants of the earth various sorts of torture!

segments.transliteration: subhana alrra'ufi alrrahimi

translation.en: Glory be to the Affectionate, the Merciful!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجَعلْ لِي فِي قَلْبِي نُوراً وَبَصَراً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal li fi qalbi nuran wa basaran

translation.en: O Allah, (please) fill my heart with illumination, discernment,

segments.transliteration: wa fahman wa ʿilman

translation.en: (faculty of) understanding, and knowledge.

segments.transliteration: innaka ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: Verily, You have power over all things.

text.en: 13.Al-Kaf`ami, in his book of al-Misbah, says to repeat the following prayer three times after obligatory prayers:

segments.transliteration: uʿidhu nafsi wa dini

translation.en: I seek for myself, my religion,

segments.transliteration: wa ahli wa mali

translation.en: my family members, my possessions,

segments.transliteration: wa waladi wa ikhwani fi dini

translation.en: my descendants, my brethren-in-faith,

segments.transliteration: wa ma razaqani rabbi wa khawatima ʿamali

translation.en: all sustenance that my Lord has provided to me as sustenance, the results of my deeds,

segments.transliteration: wa man yaʿnini amruhu

translation.en: and whomever I may concern about,

segments.transliteration: billahi alwahidi

translation.en: (I seek for all these) the protection of Allah, the Single,

segments.transliteration: al-ahadi alssamadi

translation.en: the One, and the eternally Besought of all

segments.transliteration: alladhi lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: Who begets not, nor is He begotten;

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and the like of Whom there is none.

segments.transliteration: wa birabbi alfalaqi

translation.en: And [I seek the protection of] the Lord of the dawn

segments.transliteration: min sharri ma khalaqa

translation.en: from the evil of what He has created,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqaba

translation.en: the evil of the utterly dark night when it comes,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri alnnaffathati fi alʿuqadi

translation.en: the evil of those who blow on knots,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri hasidin idha hasada

translation.en: and the evil of the envious when he envies.

segments.transliteration: wa birabbi alnnasi

translation.en: And [I seek the protection of] the Lord of men,

segments.transliteration: maliki alnnasi

translation.en: the King of men,

segments.transliteration: ilahi alnnasi

translation.en: the God of men,

segments.transliteration: min sharri alwaswasi alkhannasi

translation.en: from the evil of the whisperings of the slinking (Satan),

segments.transliteration: alladhi yuwaswisu fi suduri alnnasi

translation.en: who whispers into the hearts of men

segments.transliteration: mina aljinnati walnnasi

translation.en: from among the jinn and the men.

text.en: 14.It is narrated in an inscription handwritten by Shaykh al-Shahid

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ مَغْفِرَتَكَ أَرْجَىٰ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna maghfirataka arja min ʿamali

translation.en: O Allah, Truly, I hope for Your forgiveness more than I trust my deed.

segments.transliteration: wa inna rahmataka awsaʿu min dhanbi

translation.en: Your mercy is verily more expansive than my sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنْ كَانَ ذَنبِي عِنْدَكَ عَظِيماً
segments.transliteration: allahumma in kana dhanbi ʿindaka ʿaziman

translation.en: O Allah, If my sin is grave in Your view,

segments.transliteration: faʿafwuka aʿzamu min dhanbi

translation.en: then Your pardon is greater than my sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ أَهْلاً أَنْ أَبْلُغَ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma in lam akun ahlan an ablugha rahmataka

translation.en: O Allah, If I do not deserve to attain Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: farahmatuka ahlun an tablughani wa tasaʿani

translation.en: then Your mercy is so liberal that it can reach and include me,

segments.transliteration: li-annaha wasiʿat kulla shay'in

translation.en: because it has included all things;

segments.transliteration: birahmatika ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: [Let it be] by Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: 15.Ibn Babawayh (i.e. Shaykh al-Saduq) mentions one should say the following litany immediately after reciting Tasbih al-Zahra':

segments.transliteration: allahumma anta alssalamu

translation.en: O Allah, You are the [source of] peace,

segments.transliteration: wa minka alssalamu

translation.en: peace is coming from You,

segments.transliteration: wa laka alssalamu

translation.en: peace is for You,

segments.transliteration: wa ilayka yaʿudu alssalamu

translation.en: and to You does peace belong.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
segments.transliteration: subhana rabbika rabbi alʿizzati ʿamma yasifuna

translation.en: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.

segments.transliteration: wa salamun ʿala almursalina

translation.en: Peace be on the messengers.

segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha alnnabiyyu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Prophet.

segments.transliteration: wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala al-a'immati alhadina almahdiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon the Imams; the guides and well-guided.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَنْبِيَاءِ ٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَمَلاَئِكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala jamiʿi anbya'i allahi wa rusulihi wa mala'ikatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon all Prophets, Messengers, and angels of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ عِبَادِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayna wa ʿala ʿibadi allahi alssalihina

translation.en: Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala ʿaliyyin amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali, the Commander of the Believers.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala alhasani wal-husayni

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,

segments.transliteration: sayyiday shababi ahli aljannati ajmaʿina

translation.en: the two chiefs of all the youth of Paradise.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala ʿaliyyi bni alhusayni zayni alʿabidina

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn, the Adornment of the Worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ بَاقِرِ عِلْمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala muhammadi bni ʿaliyyin baqiri ʿilmi alnnabiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali, the splitter of the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala jaʿfari bni muhammadin alssadiqi

translation.en: Peace be upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad, the veracious.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ٱلْكَاظِمِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala musa bni jaʿfarin alkazimi

translation.en: Peace be upon Musa the son of Ja`far, the suppressor of rage.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ ٱلرِّضَا
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala ʿaliyyi bni musa alrrida

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of Musa, the amiable.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْجَوَادِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala muhammadi bni ʿaliyyin aljawadi

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali, the magnanimous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْهَادِي
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala ʿaliyyi bni muhammadin alhadi

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of Muhammad, the guide.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلزَّكِيِّ ٱلْعَسْكَرِيِّ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala alhasani bni ʿaliyyin alzzakiyyi alʿaskariyyi

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali, the bright and resident of `Askar.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُجَّةِ بْنِ ٱلْحَسَنِ ٱلْقَائِمِ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala alhujjati bni alhasani alqa'imi almahdiyyi

translation.en: Peace be upon the Argument (of Allah), the son of al-Hasan, the Assumer and the well-guided.

segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi ʿalayhim ajmaʿina

translation.en: Blessings of Allah be upon them all.

text.en: 16.Shaykh al-Kaf`ami dua expressing articles of faith:"

segments.transliteration: raditu billahi rabban

translation.en: I have submitted to Allah being my Lord,

segments.transliteration: wa bil-islami dinan

translation.en: to Islam being my religion,

segments.arabic: وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ نَبِيّاً
segments.transliteration: wa bimuhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi nabiyyan

translation.en: to Muhammad—peace be upon him and his Household—being the Prophet,

segments.transliteration: wa biʿaliyyin imaman

translation.en: to `Ali being my leader,

segments.transliteration: wa bilhasani wal-husayni

translation.en: to al-Hasan, al-Husayn,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿaliyyin wa muhammadin

translation.en: `Ali, Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa jaʿfarin wa musa

translation.en: Ja`far, Musa,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿaliyyin wa muhammadin

translation.en: `Ali, Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿaliyyin wal-hasani

translation.en: `Ali, al-Hasan,

segments.transliteration: wal-khalafi alssalihi ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: and the Righteous Successor—peace be upon them all—

segments.transliteration: a'immatan wa sadatan wa qadatan

translation.en: being my Imams, masters, and leaders.

segments.transliteration: bihim atawalla wa min aʿda'ihim atabarra'u

translation.en: Only them should I follow and their enemies will I disavow.

text.en: Repeat the following prayer three times:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka alʿafwa wal-ʿafiyata

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for amnesty, good health,

segments.transliteration: wal-muʿafata fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and wellbeing in this world as well as the Next World.

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ وَ عِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي لَا تُرَامُ،
segments.transliteration: Aʿūdhu bi-wajhika al-karīm wa ʿizzatika allatī lā turām

translation.en: I seek refuge in Your Noble Face and Your unassailable might,

segments.arabic: وَ قُدْرَتِكَ الَّتِي لَا يَمْتَنِعُ مِنْهَا شَيْءٌ،
segments.transliteration: Wa qudratika allatī lā yamtaniʿu minhā shayʾ

translation.en: And in Your power from which nothing can escape,

segments.transliteration: Min sharri ad-dunyā wal-ākhirah

translation.en: From the evils of this world and the Hereafter,

segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri al-awjāʿ kullihā

translation.en: And from the harm of all ailments.

text.en: Recite the following Qur'anic texts:in Panel

segments.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَىُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُۥ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِۦ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَىْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّا بِمَا شَآءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَـُٔودُهُۥ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِىُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

translation.en: Allah—there is no god except Him—is the Living One, the All-sustainer. Neither drowsiness befalls Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that may intercede with Him except with His permission? He knows what is before them and what is behind them, and they do not comprehend anything of His knowledge except what He wishes. His seat embraces the heavens and the earth and He is not wearied by their preservation, and He is the All-exalted, the All-supreme.Holy Quran 2: 255

segments.arabic: لَآ إِكْرَاهَ فِى ٱلدِّينِ ۖ قَد تَّبَيَّنَ ٱلرُّشْدُ مِنَ ٱلْغَىِّ ۚ فَمَن يَكْفُرْ بِٱلطَّـٰغُوتِ وَيُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ فَقَدِ ٱسْتَمْسَكَ بِٱلْعُرْوَةِ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ لَا ٱنفِصَامَ لَهَا ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: There is no compulsion in religion: rectitude has become distinct from error. So one who disavows fake deities and has faith in Allah has held fast to the firmest handle for which there is no breaking; and Allah is all-hearing, all-knowing.Holy Quran 2: 256

segments.arabic: ٱللَّهُ وَلِىُّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يُخْرِجُهُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَوْلِيَآؤُهُمُ ٱلطَّـٰغُوتُ يُخْرِجُونَهُم مِّنَ ٱلنُّورِ إِلَى ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ ۗ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ

translation.en: Allah is the wali of the faithful: He brings them out of darkness into light. As for the faithless, their awliya are the fake deities, who drive them out of light into darkness. They shall be the inmates of the Fire, and they will remain in it [forever]Holy Quran 2: 257.

segments.arabic: شَهِدَ ٱللَّهُ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمِ قَآئِمًۢا بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۚ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

translation.en: Allah, maintainer of justice, the Almighty and the All-wise, besides whom there is no god, bears witness that there is no god except Him, and [so do] the angels and those who possess knowledge.Holy Quran 3: 18

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمُ ۗ وَمَا ٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْعِلْمُ بَغْيًۢا بَيْنَهُمْ ۗ وَمَن يَكْفُرْ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَرِيعُ ٱلْحِسَابِ

translation.en: Indeed, with Allah religion is Islam, and those who were given the Book did not differ except after knowledge had come to them, out of envy among themselves. And whoever denies Allah's signs [should know that] Allah is swift at reckoning.Holy Quran 3: 19

segments.arabic: قُلِ اللّٰهُمَّ مٰلِكَ الْمُلْكِ تُؤْتِى الْمُلْكَ مَنْ تَشَآءُ وَتَنْزِعُ الْمُلْكَ مِمَّنْ تَشَآءُ وَتُعِزُّ مَنْ تَشَآءُ وَتُذِلُّ مَنْ تَشَآءُ‌ ؕ بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ‌ؕ اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيْرٌتُوْلِجُ الَّيْلَ فِى النَّهَارِ وَتُوْلِجُ النَّهَارَ فِى الَّيْلِ‌ وَتُخْرِجُ الْحَىَّ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ وَتُخْرِجُ الْمَيِّتَ مِنَ الْحَىِّ‌ وَتَرْزُقُ مَنْ تَشَآءُ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ

اِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِىْ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الْاَرْضَ فِىْ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسْتَوٰى عَلَى الْعَرْشِ يُغْشِى الَّيْلَ النَّهَارَ يَطْلُبُهٗ حَثِيْثًا ۙ وَّالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ وَالنُّجُوْمَ مُسَخَّرٰتٍۢ بِاَمْرِهٖ ؕ اَلَا لَهُ الْخَلْقُ وَالْاَمْرُ‌ ؕ تَبٰرَكَ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الْعٰلَمِيْنَاُدْعُوْا رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَّخُفْيَةً‌ ؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُحِبُّ الْمُعْتَدِيْنَ‌ ۚوَلَا تُفْسِدُوْا فِى الْاَرْضِ بَعْدَ اِصْلَاحِهَا وَادْعُوْهُ خَوْفًا وَّطَمَعًا‌ ؕ اِنَّ رَحْمَتَ اللّٰهِ قَرِيْبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِيْنَ
سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
segments.transliteration: subhana rabbika rabbi al-ʿizzati ʿamma yasifuna

translation.en: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.

segments.transliteration: wa salamun ʿala almursalina

translation.en: And peace be on the messengers.

segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: And all praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

text.en: 21.From Sahifa Radhvia Ch6 recited for Rizq

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَمْلِكُ حَوَائِجَ السَّائِلِينَ، وَيَعْلَمُ ضَمِيرَ الصَّامِتِينَ
segments.transliteration: Ya man yamliku hawā’ija as-sā’ilīna, wa ya‘lamu dhamīra as-sāmitīn

translation.en: O He who possesses the needs of the seekers, and knows the inner thoughts of the silent

segments.arabic: لِكُلِّ مَسْأَلَةٍ مِنْكَ سَمْعٌ حَاضِرٌ، وَجَوَابٌ عَتِيدٌ
segments.transliteration: Likulli mas’alatin minka sam‘un hādirun, wa jawābun ‘atīd

translation.en: For every petition You have a listening ear and a ready answer

segments.arabic: وَلِكُلِّ صَامِتٍ مِنْكَ عِلْمٌ بَاطِنٌ مُحِيطٌ
segments.transliteration: Wa likulli sāmitin minka ‘ilmun bātinun muhīt

translation.en: And for every silent one You have a hidden, encompassing knowledge

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَوَاعِيدِكَ الصَّادِقَةِ، وَأَيَادِيكَ الْفَاضِلَةِ، وَرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ
segments.transliteration: As’aluka bi-mawā‘īdika as-sādiqati, wa ayādīka al-fādhilati, wa rahmatika al-wāsi‘ah

translation.en: I ask You by Your truthful promises, Your virtuous favors, and Your vast mercy

segments.arabic: وَسُلْطَانِكَ الْقَاهِرِ، وَمُلْكِكَ الدَّائِمِ، وَكَلِمَاتِكَ التَّامَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa sultānika alqāhiri, wa mulkika addā’imi, wa kalimātika attāmmāt

translation.en: And Your overpowering authority, Your everlasting kingdom, and Your perfect words

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَنْفَعُهُ طَاعَةُ الْمُطِيعِينَ، وَلَا يَضُرُّهُ مَعْصِيَةُ الْعَاصِينَ
segments.transliteration: Ya man lā tanfa‘uhu tā‘atu almutī‘īna, wa lā yadhurruhu ma‘siyatu al‘āsīn

translation.en: O He whom the obedience of the obedient does not benefit, nor the disobedience of the sinners harm

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ، وَارْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: Salli ‘alā Muhammadin wa ālihi, warzuqnī min fadhlika

translation.en: Bless Muhammad and his family, and provide for me from Your grace

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي فِيمَا تَرْزُقُنِي الْعَافِيَةَ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: Wa a‘tinī fīmā tarzuqunī al‘āfiyata, birahmatika yā arhama arrāhimīn

translation.en: And grant me wellbeing in what You provide for me, by Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful

text.en: Would you like me to find the specific source or context of this beautiful supplication for you?

segments.arabic: يَا مُذِلَّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ يَا مُعِزَّ كُلِّ ذَلِيْلٍ قَدْ وَ حَقِّكَ بَلَغَ مَـجْهُوْدِيْ فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ فَرِّجْ عَنِّيْ.
segments.transliteration: yaa mozilla kulle jabbaarin a’needin yaa o-i’zza kulle zaleelin qad wa haqqeqa balagha majhoodee fa-salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi wa farrij a’nnee.

translation.en: O Humiliator of all tyrants! O Dignifier of all humble ones! I, swearing by You, have exerted all efforts; so, send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household and relieve me.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِلّٰهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِلّٰهِ
segments.transliteration: Subhāna-llāhi kamā yanbaghī lillāh, wa-l-hamdu lillāhi kamā yanbaghī lillāh

translation.en: Glory be to Allah as is fitting for Allah, and praise be to Allah as is fitting for Allah

segments.arabic: وَلَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِلّٰهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā ilāha illā-llāhu kamā yanbaghī lillāh, wa lā hawla wa lā quwwata illā billāh

translation.en: There is no god but Allah as is fitting for Allah, and there is no power nor strength except with Allah

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ النَّبِيِّ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْهَاشِمِيِّ
segments.transliteration: Wa sallā-llāhu ‘alā Muhammadin-in-nabiyyi wa ahli baytihi an-nabiyyi al-‘arabiyyi al-hāshimī

translation.en: And may Allah bless Muhammad the Prophet and his household, the Arabian, Hashemite Prophet

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ وَالنَّبِيِّينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْضَى اللهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa sallā-llāhu ‘alā jamī‘i al-mursalīna wa-n-nabiyyīna hattā yardhā-llāh

translation.en: And may Allah bless all the messengers and the prophets until Allah is pleased

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ إِذا تَضايَقَتِ الْاُمُورُ فَتَحَ لَها باباً لَمْ تَذْهَبْ إِلَيْهِ الْأَوْهامُ ، صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَافْتَحْ لِاُمُورِي الْمُتَضايِقَةِ باباً لَمْ يَذْهَبْ إِلَيْهِ وَهْمٌ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ .
segments.transliteration: O' He when the affairs has become difficult He opens ways we didn't imagine, so send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, open ways out of my difficulties that I didn't imagine, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

translation.en: 24.Supplications after Every Obligatory Prayers 82 Rabeeul Anaam Fi Adeea-e-Khairil Anaam

segments.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَ بِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا،
segments.transliteration: Raḍītu bi-llāhi rabban, wa bil-islāmi dīnan

translation.en: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord and Islam as my religion,

segments.arabic: وَبِالْقُرْآنِ كِتَابًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيًّا،
segments.transliteration: Wa bil-Qurʾāni kitāban, wa bi-Muḥammadin ṣallā Allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālihi wa sallam nabiyyan

translation.en: And the Qur'an as my book, and Muhammad, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, as my Prophet,

segments.transliteration: Wa bi-ʿAliyyin waliyyan

translation.en: And Ali as my guardian,

segments.transliteration: Wa bil-Ḥasan wa al-Ḥusayn, wa ʿalā ibn al-Ḥusayn

translation.en: And Hasan and Husayn, and Ali, the son of Husayn,

segments.arabic: وَمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ، وَجَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa Muḥammad ibn ʿAliyy, wa Jaʿfar ibn Muḥammad

translation.en: And Muhammad, son of Ali, and Ja'far, son of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَمُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ، وَعَلِيٍّ بْنِ مُوسَى،
segments.transliteration: Wa Mūsā ibn Jaʿfar, wa ʿAliyy ibn Mūsā

translation.en: And Musa, son of Ja'far, and Ali, son of Musa,

segments.arabic: وَالْحُجَّةِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ أَئِمَّةً.
segments.transliteration: Wa al-Ḥujjah ibn al-Ḥasan ibn ʿAliyy ʿalayhimu al-salām aʾimmah

translation.en: And the Proof (Imam al-Mahdi), son of Hasan, son of Ali, peace be upon them, as leaders.

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma waliyyaka al-Ḥujjah

translation.en: O Allah, guard Your Proof (Imam al-Mahdi),

segments.arabic: فَاحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَ مِنْ خَلْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-iḥfaẓhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: Protect him from in front of him and from behind him,

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ يَمِينِهِ وَ عَنْ شِمَالِهِ، وَمِنْ فَوْقِهِ وَمِنْ تَحْتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ʿan yamīnihi wa ʿan shimālihi, wa min fawqihi wa min taḥtihi

translation.en: And from his right and from his left, and from above and below him,

segments.transliteration: Wa-mdud lahu fī ʿumurihi

translation.en: And extend his life,

segments.transliteration: Wa-jʿalhu al-qāʾim bi-amrika, al-muntaṣira li-dīnika

translation.en: And make him the one who rises by Your command, the supporter of Your religion,

segments.arabic: وَأَرِهِ مَا يُحِبُّ وَتَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنُهُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَفِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa arihi mā yuḥibbu wa taqarru bihi ʿaynu fī nafsihi wa fī dhurriyyatihi

translation.en: And let him see what he loves and what delights his eyes in himself and his descendants,

segments.arabic: وَفِي أَهْلِهِ وَمَالِهِ، وَفِي شِيعَتِهِ وَفِي عَدُوِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa fī ahlihi wa mālihi, wa fī shīʿatihi wa fī ʿaduwwihi

translation.en: And in his family and wealth, and in his followers and his enemies,

segments.transliteration: Wa arihim minhu mā yaḥdharūn

translation.en: And let them (his enemies) see from him what they fear,

segments.arabic: وَأَرِهِ فِيهِمْ مَا يُحِبُّ وَتَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa arihi fīhim mā yuḥibbu wa taqarru bihi ʿaynu

translation.en: And let him see in them what he loves and what delights his eyes,

segments.arabic: وَاشْفِ بِهِ صُدُورَنَا وَصُدُورَ قَوْمٍ مُؤْمِنِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ashfi bihi ṣudūranā wa ṣudūra qawmin muʾminīn

translation.en: And heal through him our hearts and the hearts of a believing people.

segments.transliteration: BismillāhirRaḥmānirRaḥīm

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma balligh mawlānā ṢāḥibazZamān

translation.en: O Allah, convey our salutations to our Master, the Lord of Time,

segments.transliteration: Aynamā kāna wa ḥaythumā kān

translation.en: wherever he may be, in any place he may reside,

segments.arabic: مِنْ مَشَارِقِ الْأَرْضِ وَ مَغَارِبِهَا، سَهْلِهَا وَ جَبَلِهَا،
segments.transliteration: Min mashāriqilarḍi wa maghāribihā, sahlihā wa jabalihā

translation.en: from the east to the west, in its plains and mountains,

segments.arabic: عَنِّيْ وَ عَنْ وَالِدَيَّ وَ عَنْ وَلَدِيَّ وَ إِخْوَانِيْ التَّحِيَّةَ وَ السَّلَامَ،
segments.transliteration: ʿAnni wa ʿan wālidayya wa ʿan waladiyya wa ikhwānī attaḥiyyata wassalām

translation.en: on my behalf, on behalf of my parents, children, and siblings, peace and blessings.

segments.arabic: عَدَدَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ وَ زِنَةَ عَرْشِ اللَّهِ،
segments.transliteration: ʿAdada khalqillāhi wa zinata ʿarshillāh

translation.en: Equal to the number of His creations and the weight of His throne,

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَحْصَاهُ كِتَابُهُ وَ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُهُ.
segments.transliteration: Wa mā aḥṣāhu kitābuhu wa aḥāṭa bihi ʿilmuh

translation.en: and to all that His book records and His knowledge encompasses.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّيْ أُجَدِّدُ لَهُ فِيْ صَبِيْحَةِ هٰذَا الْيَوْمِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī ujadid lahu fī ṣabīḥati hādhā alyawm

translation.en: O Allah, I renew for him today,

segments.arabic: وَمَا عِشْتُ فِيهِ مِنْ أَيَّامِ حَيَاتِيْ،
segments.transliteration: Wa mā ʿishtu fīhi min ayyāmi ḥayātī

translation.en: and in every day of my life,

segments.arabic: عَهْدًا وَ عَقْدًا وَ بَيْعَةً لَهُ فِيْ عُنُقِيْ،
segments.transliteration: ʿAhdan wa ʿaqdan wa bayʿatan lahu fī ʿunuqī

translation.en: a covenant, a contract, and a pledge upon my neck,

segments.arabic: لَا أَحُولُ عَنْهَا وَلَا أَزُولُ أَبَدًا.
segments.transliteration: Lā aḥūlu ʿanhā wa lā azūlu abadan

translation.en: which I shall never turn away from or break.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِنْ أَنْصَارِهِ وَ الذَّابِّيْنَ عَنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ajʿalnī min anṣārihi wa adhdhābbīn ʿanh

translation.en: O Allah, make me among his supporters and those who defend him,

segments.arabic: وَالْمُمْتَثِلِينَ لِأَوَامِرِهِ وَ نَوَاهِيهِ فِي أَيَّامِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Walmumtathilīna liawāmirihi wa nawāhīhi fī ayyāmih

translation.en: and those who obey his commands and prohibitions during his time.

segments.transliteration: Walmustashhidīna bayna yadayh

translation.en: and those who achieve martyrdom in his presence.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ حَالَ بَيْنِيْ وَبَيْنَهُ الْمَوْتُ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma in ḥāla baynī wa baynahulmawt

translation.en: O Allah, if death separates me from him,

segments.arabic: الَّذِيْ جَعَلْتَهُ عَلٰى عِبَادِكَ حَتْمًا مَقْضِيًّا،
segments.transliteration: Alladhī jaʿaltahu ʿalā ʿibādika ḥatman maqdīyā

translation.en: the death You decreed upon Your servants inevitably,

segments.arabic: فَأَخْرِجْنِيْ مِنْ قَبْرِيْ، مُؤْتَزِرًا كَفَنِيْ، شَاهِرًا سَيْفِيْ،
segments.transliteration: Faakhrijnī min qabrī, muʾtaziran kafanī, shāhiran sayfī

translation.en: then resurrect me from my grave, girded in my shroud, wielding my sword,

segments.arabic: مُجَرَّدًا قَنَاتِيْ، مُلَبِّيًا دَعْوَةَ الدَّاعِيْ فِيْ الْحَاضِرِ وَ الْبَادِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Mujarradan qanātī, mulabbiyan daʿwata addāʿī fī alḥāḍir wa albādī

translation.en: ready with my lance, answering the call of the caller, in every place.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنِيْ الطَّلْعَةَ الرَّشِيْدَةَ وَ الْغُرَّةَ الْحَمِيْدَةَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma arinī aṭṭalʿata arrasheeda walghurrata alḥameeda

translation.en: O Allah, let me behold his noble visage and praiseworthy forehead,

segments.arabic: وَ اکْحُلْ بَصَرِيْ بِنَظْرَةٍ مِنِّيْ إِلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa akḥul baṣarī binadhra minī ilayh

translation.en: and brighten my sight with a glance toward him,

segments.transliteration: Wa ʿajjil farajah wa sahhil makhrajah

translation.en: hasten his reappearance and make his emergence smooth.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْدُدْ أَزْرَهُ وَ قَوِّ ظَهْرَهُ وَ طَوِّلْ عُمُرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ashddud azrahu wa qawwī ẓahrahū wa ṭawwil ʿumrah

translation.en: O Allah, strengthen his resolve, fortify his back, and prolong his life,

segments.arabic: وَاعْمُرِ اللَّهُمَّ بِهِ بِلَادَكَ وَ أَحْيِ بِهِ عِبَادَكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ʿamrillāhumma bihi bilādaka wa aḥyi bihi ʿibādaka

translation.en: and through him, revive Your lands and enliven Your servants,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ قُلْتَ وَ قَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ: "ظَهَرَ الْفَسَادُ فِيْ الْبَرِّ وَ الْبَحْرِ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِيْ النَّاسِ."
segments.transliteration: Fainnaka qulta wa qawluka alḥaqq: "Ẓahara alfasādu fī albarr walbaḥr bimā kasabat aydī annās"

translation.en: for You have said, and Your word is true: "Corruption has appeared on land and sea because of what the hands of people have earned."

segments.arabic: فَأَظْهِرِ اللَّهُمَّ لَنَا وَلِيَّكَ وَ ابْنَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ،
segments.transliteration: Faaẓhirillāhumma lanā waliyyaka wa ibn binti nabiyyik

translation.en: So reveal to us, O Allah, Your Guardian, the son of Your Prophet's daughter,

segments.arabic: الْمُسَمَّى بِاسْمِ رَسُولِكَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Almusammā biismi rasūlik ṣallallāhu ʿalayhi wa ālih

translation.en: who bears the name of Your Messenger, peace be upon him and his family,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لَا يَظْفَرَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ الْبَاطِلِ إِلَّا مَزَّقَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Ḥattā lā yaẓfara bishayʾin mina albāṭili illā mazzaqah

translation.en: so that he does not encounter any falsehood without tearing it apart,

segments.transliteration: Wa yuḥiqqalḥaqqa bikalimātihi wa yuḥaqqiqah

translation.en: and establish the truth by his words, and fulfill it.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْشِفْ هٰذِهِ الْغُمَّةَ عَنْ هٰذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ بِظُهُورِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma akshif hādhihi alghummata ʿan hādhihi alummah biẓuhūrihi

translation.en: O Allah, remove this distress from this nation with his appearance,

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُ بَعِيدًا وَ نَرَاهُ قَرِيبًا.
segments.transliteration: Innahum yarawnahu baʿīdā wa narāhu qarībā

translation.en: for they see it as distant, but we see it as near.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣallallāhu ʿalā Muḥammad wa ālih

translation.en: And may Allah send His blessings upon Muhammad and his family.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُم صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنَّ رَسُولَكَ الصَّادِقَ الْمُصَدَّقَ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma inna rasūlaka aṣṣādiqalmuṣaddaq ṣalawātuka ʿalayhi wa ālih

translation.en: O Allah, indeed, Your truthful and trustworthy Messenger, Your blessings upon him and his family,

segments.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّكَ قُلْتَ: ’’مَا تَرَدَّدْتُ فِيْ شَيْءٍ أَنَا فَاعِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Qāla innaka qulta: "Mā taraddadtu fī shayʾin anā fāʿiluh

translation.en: said that You have declared: "I have not hesitated in anything I do,

segments.arabic: كَتَرَدُّدِيْ فِيْ قَبْضِ رُوْحِ عَبْدِيَ الْمُؤْمِنِ،
segments.transliteration: Kataraddudī fī qabḍi rūḥi ʿabdiya almuʾmin

translation.en: as much as I hesitate to take the soul of My believing servant,

segments.arabic: يَكْرَهُ الْمَوْتَ وَ أَنَا أَكْرَهُ مَسَاءَتَهُ.‘‘
segments.transliteration: Yakrahu almawta wa anā akrahu masāʾatah

translation.en: who dislikes death, while I dislike causing him sorrow."

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma faṣalli ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad

translation.en: O Allah, so send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَعَجِّلْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْفَرَجَ وَ النَّصْرَ وَ الْعَافِيَةَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ʿajjil liwaliyyika alfaraja wa annaṣra wa alʿāfiyah

translation.en: and hasten relief, victory, and wellbeing for Your guardian,

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَكِلْنِيْ إِلَىٰ نَفْسِيْ وَ لَا إِلَىٰ أَحَدٍ سِوَاكَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa lā takilnī ilā nafsī wa lā ilā aḥadin siwāk

translation.en: and do not leave me to myself or to anyone besides You.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنَّ الصَّادِقَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ: إِنَّكَ قُلْتَ:
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma inna aṣ-Ṣādiqa ʿalayhi as-salām qāla: innaka qulta

translation.en: O Allah, indeed, al-Ṣādiq (peace be upon him) said that You have declared:

segments.transliteration: Mā taraddadtu fī shayʾin anā fāʿiluh

translation.en: "I have not hesitated in anything I do,

segments.arabic: كَتَرَدُّدِيْ فِيْ قَبْضِ رُوْحِ عَبْدِيَ الْمُؤْمِنِ،
segments.transliteration: Kataraddudī fī qabḍi rūḥi ʿabdī al-muʾmin

translation.en: as much as I hesitate to take the soul of My believing servant,

segments.transliteration: Yakrahu al-mawta wa akrahu masāʾatah

translation.en: who dislikes death, while I dislike causing him sorrow."

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma faṣalli ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad

translation.en: O Allah, so send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَعَجِّلْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْفَرَجَ وَ الْعَافِيَةَ وَ النَّصْرَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ʿajjil liwaliyyika al-faraja wa al-ʿāfiyata wa an-naṣr

translation.en: and hasten the relief, well-being, and victory for Your guardian,

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَسُؤْنِيْ فِيْ نَفْسِيْ وَ لَا فِيْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَحِبَّتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: Wa lā tasuʾnī fī nafsī wa lā fī aḥadin min aḥibbatī

translation.en: and do not afflict me in myself or in any of my loved ones.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَجِّلْ فَرَجَكَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabba Muḥammad, ʿajjil farajaka āli Muḥammad

translation.en: O Lord of Muhammad, hasten Your relief for the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ، احْفَظْ غَيْبَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabba Muḥammad, iḥfaẓ ghaybata Muḥammad

translation.en: O Lord of Muhammad, protect the concealment of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ، انْتَقِمْ لِبْنَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Yā Rabba Muḥammad, intaqim libnata Muḥammad

translation.en: O Lord of Muhammad, take vengeance for the daughter of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
segments.transliteration: Ṣallā Allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālihi wa sallam

translation.en: May Allah's blessings and peace be upon him and his family.

segments.transliteration: ʿAlaniyatun, ayy mubdiʾun ayy muʿīd

translation.en: Openly, You are the Originator, and You are the Restorer.

segments.arabic: اَسْئَلُكَ بِحَقِّكَ عَلٰى خِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Asʾaluka biḥaqqika ʿalā khīratika min khalqik

translation.en: I ask You by Your right over Your chosen ones from Your creation,

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّهِ الَّذِيْ أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُ عَلٰى نَفْسِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa biḥaqqihi alladhī awjabta lahu ʿalā nafsik

translation.en: and by his right, which You have made binding upon Yourself,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: An tuṣalliya ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad ahl baytihi

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, the people of his household,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ السَّاعَةَ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa an tamunna ʿalayya as-sāʿata bifikāki raqabati mina an-nār

translation.en: and to bestow upon me at this moment the freeing of my neck from the Fire,

segments.transliteration: Wa anjiz liwaliyyika wa ibni nabiyyik

translation.en: and to fulfill for Your guardian and the son of Your Prophet,

segments.arabic: الدَّاعِيْ إِلَيْكَ بِإِذْنِكَ وَأَمِيْنِكَ فِيْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Ad-dāʿī ilayka biʾidhnik wa amīnaka fī khalqik

translation.en: the one who calls to You by Your permission, Your trustee among Your creation,

segments.arabic: وَعَيْنِكَ فِيْ عِبَادِكَ وَحُجَّتِكَ عَلٰى خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ʿaynika fī ʿibādik wa ḥujjatika ʿalā khalqik

translation.en: Your eye upon Your servants and Your proof over Your creation,

segments.transliteration: ʿAlayhi ṣalawātuka wa barakātuka waʿdah

translation.en: Your blessings and grace be upon him, as You have promised.

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ayyidhu binaṣrik

translation.en: O Allah, support him with Your help,

segments.transliteration: Wa anṣur ʿabdaka wa qawwi aṣḥābahu wa ṣabbirhum

translation.en: and grant victory to Your servant, strengthen his companions, and grant them patience.

segments.arabic: وَافْتَحْ لَهُمْ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَانًا نَصِيْرًا،
segments.transliteration: Wa iftaḥ lahum min ladunka sulṭānan naṣīra

translation.en: Grant them from Your presence a helping authority,

segments.transliteration: Wa ʿajjil farajahu wa amkinhu min aʿdāʾik

translation.en: and hasten his relief and give him power over Your enemies,

segments.transliteration: Wa aʿdāʾi rasūlik ya arḥama ar-rāḥimīn

translation.en: and the enemies of Your Messenger, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.transliteration: Bil-muntadaḥ al-baṭn, al-maqrūn al-ḥājibayn

translation.en: With a flat belly and joined eyebrows,

segments.arabic: اَحْمَشُ السّاقَيْنِ، بَعِيدُ مَا بَيْنَ الْمَنْكِبَيْنِ،
segments.transliteration: Aḥmash as-sāqayn, baʿīd mā bayna al-mankibayn

translation.en: Lean in the legs, with broad shoulders,

segments.arabic: اَسْمَرُ اللّوْنِ، يَعْتَوْرُهُ مَعَ سُمْرَتِهِ صُفْرَةٌ مِنْ سَهَرِ اللَّيْلِ،
segments.transliteration: Asmarr al-lawn, yaʿtawruhu maʿa sumratihi ṣufratun min sahar al-layl

translation.en: Brown-skinned, tinged with pallor from sleepless nights,

segments.arabic: بِأَبِيْ مِنْ لَيْلَةٍ يُرْعَى النُّجُوْمَ سَاجِدًا وَرَاكِعًا.
segments.transliteration: Bi-abī min laylatin yurʿā an-nujūma sājidan wa rākiʿan

translation.en: My father be sacrificed for one who watches the stars in prostration and bowing.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِيْ مَنْ لَا يَأْخُذُهُ فِي اللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لَائِمٍ، مِصْبَاحُ الدُّجَى.
segments.transliteration: Bi-abī man lā yaʾkhudhuhu fī Allāh lawmat lāʾim, miṣbāḥ ad-dujā

translation.en: My father be sacrificed for one unshaken by the blame of critics in God's way, the lamp of darkness.

segments.transliteration: Bi-abī al-qāʾimi bi-amri Allāh

translation.en: My father be sacrificed for the one who upholds God's command.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ بِاِسْمِکَ الْمَکْنُوْنِ الْمَخْزُوْنِ، الطُّهْرِ الطَّاهِرِ الْمُبَارَکِ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka bi-ismika al-maknūn al-makhzūn, al-ṭahri al-ṭāhir al-mubārak

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your hidden, sacred, pure, and blessed Name.

segments.arabic: و اَسْئَلُکَ بِاِسْمِکَ الْعَظِيْمِ وَ سُلْطَانِکَ الْعَزِيْزِ الْقَدِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: Wa as'aluka bi-ismika al-ʿaẓīm wa sulṭānik al-ʿazīz al-qadīm

translation.en: And I ask You by Your Great Name and Your Mighty, Eternal Power.

segments.arabic: يَا وَاهِبَ الْعَطَايَا، يَا مُطْلِقَ الْاُسَارٰي يَا فَکَّاکَ الرِّقَابِ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: Yā wāhib al-ʿaṭāyā, yā muṭliq al-usārā, yā fakkāk al-riqāb min al-nār

translation.en: O Giver of gifts, O Liberator of the captives, O One who frees the necks from the Fire.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، وَ اَنْ تُعْتِقَ رَقَبَتِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: As'aluka an tuṣallī ʿalā Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad, wa an tuʿtiq raqabatī min al-nār

translation.en: I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, and to free my neck from the Fire.

segments.arabic: و اَنْ تُخْرِجَنِيْ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا اٰمِنًا، وَ تُدْخِلَنِيْ الْجَنَّۃَ سَالِمًا
segments.transliteration: Wa an tukhrijanī min al-dunyā āminan, wa tudkhilanī al-jannata sāliman

translation.en: And to take me out of this world in peace, and to enter me into Paradise safely.

segments.arabic: و اَنْ تَجْعَلَ دُعَائِيْ اَوَّلَهٗ فَلَاحًا وَ اَوْسَطَهٗ نَجَاحًا وَ اٰخِرَهٗ صَلَاحًا
segments.transliteration: Wa an tajʿal duʿā'ī awwalahu falāḥan wa awsaṭahu najāḥan wa ākhirahū ṣalāḥan

translation.en: And to make my prayer its beginning successful, its middle prosperous, and its end righteous.

segments.transliteration: Inna ka anta ʿallām al-ghuyūb

translation.en: Indeed, You are the Knower of the unseen.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَشْغَلُهٗ سَمْعٌ عَنْ سَمْعٍ، يَا مِنْ لَا يُغَلِّطُهُ السَّائِلُوْنَ، وَ يَا مَنْ لَا يُبْرِمُهٗ اِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّيْنَ، اَذِقْنِيْ بَرْدَ عَفْوِکَ، وَ مَغْفِرَتِکَ وَ حَلَاوَۃَ رَحْمَتِکَ.
segments.transliteration: Yaa Man Laa Yashghalohu Sam-U’n A’n Sam-I’n, Yaa Man Laa Yoghalletohus Saa-Eloona, Wa Yaa Man Laa Yubremohu Ilhaahul Molehheena, Aziqnee Barda A’fweka, Wa Maghferateka Wa Halaawata Rahmateka.

translation.en: O He Who is not distracted by a sound from hearing another sound! O He Who is not confused by the beseechers! O He Who is not annoyed by the insistence of those who entreat Him persistently! Make me taste the nice flavor of Your pardon and forgivenessand the sweetness of Your mercy.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَعْتَدِيْ عَلٰي اَهْلِ مَمْلَکَتِهٖ، سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لَا يَاخُذُ اَهْلَ الْاَرْضِ بِاَلْوَانِ الْعَذَابِ، سُبْحَانَ الرَّؤُوْفِ الرَّحِيْمِ، اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِيْ فِيْ قَلْبِيْ نُوْرًا وَ بَصَرًا وَ فَهْمًا وَ عِلْمًا، اِنَّکَ عَلٰي کُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ.
segments.transliteration: Subhaana Man Laa Ya’tadee A’laa Ahle Mamlakatehi, Subhaana Man Laa Yaakhozo Ahlal Arze Be-Alwaanil A’zaabe, Subhaanar Ra-Oofir Raheeme, Allaahummaj A’l Lee Fee Qalbee Nooran Wa Basaran Wa Fahman Wa I’lman, Innaka A’laa Kulle Shay-In Qadeer.

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not treat the people of His realm with transgression! Glory be to Him Who does not inflict on the inhabitants of the earth various sorts of torture! Glory be to the Affectionate, the Merciful! O Allah! Fill my heart with illumination, discernment, (faculty of) understanding, and knowledge. Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لَمْ يُمْسِ احَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu lam yumsi ahadun min khalqika

translation.en: O Allah! Indeed, none of Your creatures

segments.transliteration: anta ilayhi ahsanu saniʿan

translation.en: You have granted more favors,

segments.transliteration: wa la lahu adwamu karamatan

translation.en: longer honors,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿalayhi abyanu fadlan

translation.en: more manifest graces,

segments.transliteration: wa la bihi ashaddu taraffuqan

translation.en: more lenient acts,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿalayhi ashaddu hiyatatan

translation.en: stronger protection,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿalayhi ashaddu taʿattufan

translation.en: and more compassionate treatment

segments.transliteration: minka ʿalayya

translation.en: than I am,

segments.transliteration: wa in kana jamiʿu almakhluqina

translation.en: although all of Your creatures

segments.transliteration: yuʿaddiduna min dhalika mithla taʿdidi

translation.en: can count the same as what I have counted.

segments.transliteration: fashhad ya kafiya alshshahadati

translation.en: So, (please) bear witness, O He Whose witness is sufficient to me

segments.transliteration: bi-anni ushhiduka biniyyati sidqin

translation.en: that I ask You to bear witness to me with honest intention

segments.transliteration: bi-anna laka alfadla walttawla

translation.en: that Yours are all favors and all bounties

segments.transliteration: fi inʿamika ʿalayya

translation.en: that have been done to me

segments.transliteration: maʿa qillati shukri laka fiha

translation.en: although I have shown You very little gratitude for all that.

segments.transliteration: ya faʿila kulli iradatin

translation.en: O Doer of all wills,

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: (please) bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَطَوِّقْنِي امَاناً مِنْ حُلُولِ ٱلسَّخَطِ لِقِلَّةِ ٱلشُّكْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa tawwiqni amanan min hululi alssakhati liqillati alshshukri

translation.en: surround me with security against the befalling of Your wrath on account of my little gratitude,

segments.arabic: وَاوْجِبْ لِي زِيَادَةً مِنْ إِتْمَامِ ٱلنِّعْمَةِ بِسَعَةِ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa awjib li ziyadatan min itmami alnniʿmati bisaʿati almaghfirati

translation.en: decide for me more complete graces through expansive forgiveness of You,

segments.transliteration: amtirni khayraka

translation.en: and pour down upon me Your good turns.

segments.transliteration: fasalli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: So, (please) bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa la tuqayisni bisu'i sarirati

translation.en: and do not treat me according to the amount of my ill intention;

segments.transliteration: wamtahin qalbi liridaka

translation.en: rather, (please) test my heart in order to win Your pleasure

segments.transliteration: wajʿal ma taqarrabtu bihi ilayka

translation.en: and make pure that through which I have sought nearness to You

segments.transliteration: fi dinika laka khalisan

translation.en: with regard to the affairs of Your religion,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْهُ لِلُزُومِ شُبْهَةٍ اوْ فَخْرٍ اوْ رِيَاءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la tajʿalhu liluzumi shubhatin aw fakhrin aw riya'in

translation.en: and do not make it to be accompanied by any suspicion, pride, or ostentation.

segments.transliteration: ya karimu

translation.en: O All-generous!

segments.arabic: اَشْهَدُ اَنْ لا اِلهَ اِلا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريكَ لَهُاِلها واحِدا اَحَدا صَمَدا لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صاحِبَةً وَلا وَلَدا.

translation.en:
I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
One and Only and having no associate with Him (in Godhead);
He is the One God,the Unique, the Besought of all,
and He has taken to Himself neither a wife nor a son.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لى فَرَجا وَمَخْرَجاوَارْزُقْنى مِنْ حَيْثُ اَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لا اَحْتَسِبُ

translation.en:
O Allah, cause all my affairs to arrive at a relief and a way out
and give me sustenance from whence I expect
and from whence I do not expect.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى الْحَىِّ الَّذى لا يَمُوتُ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذى لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صاحِبَةًوَلا وَلَدا وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَريكٌ فِى الْمُلْكِ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِىُّ مِنَ الذُّلِّ وَكَبِّرْهُ تَكْبيرا.

translation.en:
I put my trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.
All praise is due to Allah, Who has not taken a wife or a son
and Who has not a partner in the kingdom,
and Who has not a helper to save Him from disgrace;
and magnify Him with all magnificence.
There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ انْفَعْنا بِالْعِلْمِ وَزَيِّنّا بِالْحِلْمِ وَجَمِّلْنا بِالْعافِيَةِ وَكَرِّمْنا بِالتَّقْوىاِنَّ وَلِيِّىَ اللَّهُ الَّذى نَزَّلَ الْكِتابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصّالِحينَ
segments.transliteration:
O Allah, (please) make us benefit by knowledge,
adorn us with forbearance,
beautify us with wellbeing,
and honor us with piety.
Surely, my guardian is Allah, Who revealed the Book,
and He guards the righteous ones.

translation.en: PdfCard -print2 sides-laminateMorning & Evening duasAll Taqeebat Salat wiseZiaratDesktop

text.en: Salaat GhufailaRecited between Magrib and Isha.
Salat
Benefits

segments.transliteration: wa dha alnnuni idh dhahaba mughadiban

translation.en: And (mention) Dhu'n-Nun (Jonah), when he went off in anger

segments.transliteration: fazanna an lan naqdira ʿalayhi

translation.en: and deemed that We would not suppress his sustenance.

segments.transliteration: fanada fi alzzulumati

translation.en: But he cried out in the darkness,

segments.arabic: انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka

translation.en: "There is no god save You. Be You Glorified!

segments.transliteration: inni kuntu min alzzalimina

translation.en: Lo! I have been a wrongdoer."

segments.transliteration: fastajabna lahu wa najjaynahu min alghammi

translation.en: Then we heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish.

segments.transliteration: wa kadhalika nunji almu'minina

translation.en: Thus do we save the believers.

text.en: In thesecond unit, you should recite, after Surah al-Fatihah, the following verse (6: 59):

segments.transliteration: wa ʿindahu mafatihu alghaybi

translation.en: And with Him are the keys of the Invisible.

segments.transliteration: la yaʿlamuha illa huwa

translation.en: None but He knows them.

segments.transliteration: wa yaʿlamu ma fi albarri walbahri

translation.en: And He knows what is in the land and the sea.

segments.arabic: وَمَا تَسْقُطُ مِنْ وَرَقَةٍ إِلاَّ يَعْلَمُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma tasqutu min waraqatin illa yaʿlamuha

translation.en: Not a leaf falls but He knows it,

segments.transliteration: wa la habbatin fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: not a grain amid the darkness of the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa la ratbin wa la yabisin

translation.en: naught of wet or dry

segments.transliteration: illa fi kitabin mubinin

translation.en: but (it is noted) in a clear record.

text.en: After that, you should raise your both hands for Qunut, saying:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bimafatihi alghaybi

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the Keys of the Invisible (world)

segments.transliteration: allati la yaʿlamuha illa anta

translation.en: that none knows save You;

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَ انْ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa alihi…

translation.en: (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household and...

segments.transliteration: allahumma anta waliyyu niʿmati

translation.en: O Allah, You are the source of the graces that I have,

segments.transliteration: walqadiru ʿala talibati

translation.en: You have the power to respond to my request,

segments.transliteration: taʿlamu hajati

translation.en: and You know my needs;

segments.transliteration: fa-as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: I therefore beseech You in the name of Muhammad and his Household,

segments.transliteration: ʿalayhi wa ʿalayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: peace be upon him and them,

segments.transliteration: lamma qadaytaha li

translation.en: to grant me my needs.

text.en: Importance
Thanksgiving Prostration (Sajdat al-Shukr)MeritsOnce you finish the post-prayer utterances, you may do the thanksgiving prostration.
Recitations

Sahifa Radhvia ch 8

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta subhanaka

translation.en: "There is no god save You. Be You Glorified!

segments.transliteration: inni kuntu min alzzalimina

translation.en: Lo! I have been a wrongdoer."

segments.transliteration: shukran shukran

translation.en: Thanks, thanks.

segments.transliteration: ʿafwan ʿafwan

translation.en: Pardon! Pardon!

segments.transliteration: hamdan lillahi

translation.en: Praise be to Allah.

segments.transliteration: ya rabba al-arbabi

translation.en: O Lord of all lords,

segments.transliteration: wa ya malika almuluki

translation.en: O King of all kings,

segments.transliteration: wa ya sayyida alssadati

translation.en: O master of all masters,

segments.transliteration: wa ya jabbara aljababirati

translation.en: O Omnipotent of all the omnipotent,

segments.transliteration: wa ya ilaha al-alihati

translation.en: and O God of all gods,

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin…

translation.en: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad…

segments.transliteration: fa'inni ʿabduka nasiyati fi qabdatika

translation.en: For I am Your servant and my forelock is in Your grasp.

segments.transliteration: subhanaka allahumma

translation.en: All glory be to You, O Allah.

segments.transliteration: anta rabbi haqqan haqqan

translation.en: You are my Lord, truly, truly.

segments.arabic: سَجَدْتُ لَكَ يَا رَبِّ تَعَبُّداً وَرِقّاً
segments.transliteration: sajadtu laka ya rabbi taʿabbudan wa riqqan

translation.en: I prostrate myself before You, O my Lord, out of my servitude and subjugation to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ عَمَلِي ضَعِيفٌ فَضَاعِفْهُ لِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna ʿamali daʿifun fadaʿifhu li

translation.en: O Allah, my deed is certainly feeble; so, (please do) grant it strength by increasing it many times.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma qini ʿadhabaka yawma tabʿathu ʿibadaka

translation.en: O Allah, (please) save me from Your chastisement on the day when You shall resurrect Your servants,

segments.arabic: وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ انْتَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa tub ʿalayya innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu

translation.en: and (please) accept my repentance. Verily, You are the Oft-Returning, the Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَارٍ حَرُّهَا لاَ يُطْفَىٰ
segments.transliteration: aʿudhu bika min narin harruha la yutfa

translation.en: I pray for Your protection against the fire whose heat is inextinguishable.

segments.arabic: وَاعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَارٍ جَدِيدُهَا لاَ يَبْلىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min narin jadiduha la yabla

translation.en: I pray for Your protection against the fire whose newness never decays.

segments.arabic: وَاعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَارٍ عَطْشَانُهَا لاَ يُرْوىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min narinʿatshanuha la yurwa

translation.en: I pray for Your protection against the fire whose thirsty is never quenched.

segments.arabic: وَاعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَارٍ مَسْلُوبُهَا لاَ يُكْسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿudhu bika min narin maslubuha la yuksa

translation.en: I pray for Your protection against the fire whose disrobed is never clothed.

segments.transliteration: ya ra'ufu ya rahimu

translation.en: O All-kind! O All-merciful!

segments.transliteration: ya rabbi ya sayyidi

translation.en: O my Lord! O my Master!

segments.transliteration: as'aluka alrrahata ʿinda almawti

translation.en: I beseech You for rest at death

segments.transliteration: walʿafwa ʿinda alhisabi

translation.en: and pardon at (final) judgment.

segments.transliteration: sajada wajhiya alla'imu liwajhi rabbiya alkarimi

translation.en: My mean face is prostrating before My Lord's Noble Face.

segments.transliteration: inni zalamtu nafsi faghfir li

translation.en: I have wronged myself; so, (please) forgive me.

segments.transliteration: allahumma maghfiratuka awsaʿu min dhunubi

translation.en: O Allah, Your forgiveness is more expansive than my sin

segments.transliteration: wa rahmatuka arja ʿindi min ʿamali

translation.en: and Your mercy is more hopeful for me than my deeds.

segments.arabic: فَٱغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي يَا حَيّاً لاَ يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: faghfir li dhunubi ya hayyan la yamutu

translation.en: So, (please) forgive my sins. O He Who is Ever-living and never dies!

segments.transliteration: ya mudhilla kulli jabbarin

translation.en: O Humiliator of all tyrants!

segments.transliteration: ya muʿizza kulli dhalilin

translation.en: O Dignifier of all humble ones!

segments.transliteration: qad wa haqqika balagha majhudi

translation.en: I, swearing by You, have exerted all efforts;

segments.transliteration: fasalli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: so, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa farrij ʿannai

translation.en: and relieve me.

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَبَّاهُ يَا سَيِّدَاهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rabbahu ya sayyidahu

translation.en: O Allah! O my Lord! O my Master!

segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya sayyidahu

translation.en: O my Lord! O my Master!

segments.transliteration: ya rabbi madha ʿalayka

translation.en: O my Lord, what will harm You

segments.arabic: انْ تُرْضِيَ عَنِّي كُلَّ مَنْ كَانَ لَهُ عِنْدِي تَبِعَةٌ
segments.transliteration: an turdiya ʿanni kulla man kana lahu ʿindi tabiʿatun

translation.en: if You cause all those to whom I am indebted by a claim to be pleased with me,

segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhunubi

translation.en: forgive my sins,

segments.transliteration: wa an tudkhilani aljannata birahmatika

translation.en: and allow me enter Paradise, out of Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: fa'innama ʿafwuka ʿan alzzalimina

translation.en: Verily, Your pardon is for the wrongdoers,

segments.transliteration: wa ana min alzzalimina

translation.en: and I am one of the wrongdoers;

segments.transliteration: faltasaʿni rahmatuka ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: so, (please) let Your mercy include me, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: عَظُمَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ فَلْيُحْسِنِ الْعَفْوُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: ʿAẓuma adh-dhanbu min ʿabdika fa-lyaḥsini al-ʿafwu min ʿindika

translation.en: Great is the sin from Your servant, so let forgiveness be better and good from You.

segments.arabic: إلٰهي عُبَيْدُكَ بِفِنَائِك ، مِسْكِينُكَ بِفِنَائِك ، فَقِيرُكَ بِفِنَائِك
segments.transliteration: “Ilāhī ʿUbayduka bi Finā’ik; Miskīnuka bi Finā’ik, Faqīruka bi Finā’ik

translation.en:
(O Allāh ! Your slave is at Your dooryard; Your wretched one is at Your dooryard, Your
destitute is at Your dooryard)".

text.en: Sajda Shukr from Sahifa Alavia 111-114 Seperate page

segments.transliteration: Ya Rabbi wa'aztani falam atta'idh

translation.en: O my Lord, You advised me, but I did not take heed.

segments.transliteration: Wa zajartani 'an maharimika falam anzajir

translation.en: And You warned me against Your prohibitions, but I did not refrain.

segments.transliteration: Wa ghamaratni ayādīka fā mā shakartu

translation.en: And Your blessings overwhelmed me, but I did not show gratitude.

segments.transliteration: 'Afwuka 'afwuka ya Kareem

translation.en: Your pardon, Your pardon, O Generous One!

segments.transliteration: As’aluka ar-raahata 'indal mawt

translation.en: I ask You for comfort at the time of death.

segments.transliteration: Wa as’aluka al-'afwa 'indal hisab

translation.en: And I ask You for pardon during the reckoning.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَزِيْدُهٗ اِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّيْنَ اِلَّا جُوْدًا وَ کَرَمًا
segments.transliteration: Ya man la yazeeduhu ilhāhu al-mulihheena illa joodan wa karama

translation.en: O One whose generosity and kindness only increase with persistent requests.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهٗ خَزَائِنُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: Ya man lahu khazā’inu as-samāwāti wal-ard

translation.en: O One to whom belong the treasures of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهٗ خَزَائِنُ مَا دَقَّ وَ جَلَّ
segments.transliteration: Ya man lahu khazā’inu ma daqqa wa jalla

translation.en: O One who holds the treasures of all that is small and great.

segments.transliteration: La tamna'uka isā’ati min ihsānika

translation.en: My wrongdoing does not prevent Your goodness.

segments.arabic: اَسْئَلُکَ اَنْ تَفْعَلَ بِيْ مَا اَنْتَ اَهْلَهٗ
segments.transliteration: As’aluka an taf‘ala bee ma anta ahluhu

translation.en: I ask You to treat me as You deserve.

segments.arabic: فَاَنْتَ اَهْلُ الْجُوْدِ وَ الْکَرَمِ وَ الْعَفْوِ
segments.transliteration: Fa anta ahlu al-joodi wal-karami wal-'afwi

translation.en: For You are worthy of generosity, kindness, and forgiveness.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ وَ اَنْتَ قَادِرٌ عَلَي الْعُقُوْبَۃِ
segments.transliteration: Ya Rabbi wa anta qadirun 'ala al-'uqooba

translation.en: O my Lord, You are able to punish.

segments.transliteration: Ya Rabbi wa qad istahaqtuha

translation.en: O my Lord, and indeed I deserve it.

segments.arabic: لَا حُجَّۃَ لِيْ وَ لَا عُذْرَ لِيْ عِنْدَکَ
