segments.transliteration: La hujjata li wa la ‘udhra li ‘indak

translation.en: I have no argument and no excuse before You.

segments.transliteration: Ilayka aljātu umoori kullaha

translation.en: To You, I surrender all my affairs.

segments.transliteration: A’tarifu biha kay ta’fu 'anni

translation.en: I admit them so that You may forgive me.

segments.transliteration: Wa anta a’lamu biha minni

translation.en: And You know them better than I do.

segments.transliteration: Yu'ta ilayka bikulli dhanbin adh-nabtuhu

translation.en: I bring before You every sin I have committed.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi kulli khatee'atin akhta’tuha

translation.en: And every mistake I have made.

segments.transliteration: Wa bi kulli sayyi’atin ‘amiltuha

translation.en: And every bad deed I have done.

segments.arabic: فَاغْفِرْ وَ ارْحَمْ وَ تَجَاوَزْ عَمَّا تَعْلَمُ
segments.transliteration: Faghfir warham wa tajāwaz ‘amma ta‘lam

translation.en: So forgive, have mercy, and overlook what You know.

segments.transliteration: Innaka anta al-‘azzu al-akram

translation.en: Indeed, You are the Most Mighty, the Most Generous.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّي اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ بِجُودِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka bijoodika wa karamika

translation.en: O Allah, I draw near to You through Your generosity and kindness.

segments.transliteration: Wa ataqarrabu ilayka bi-Muhammadin 'abdika wa rasoolika

translation.en: And I draw near to You through Muhammad, Your servant and Messenger.

segments.transliteration: Wa ataqarrabu ilayka bimalā'ikatika al-muqarrabeen

translation.en: And I draw near to You through Your close angels.

segments.transliteration: Wa anbiya'ika al-mursaleen

translation.en: And through Your sent prophets.

segments.transliteration: Wabika Allahumma laka al-ghaniyyu 'anni

translation.en: And through You, O Allah, You are independent of me.

segments.transliteration: Wabiya al-faqatu ilayk

translation.en: And I am in need of You.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ وَ اَنَا الْفَقِيرُ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: Anta al-ghaniyyu wa ana al-faqeeru ilayk

translation.en: You are the Rich, and I am the poor towards You.

segments.transliteration: Aqilni 'athrati

translation.en: Pardon my mistakes.

segments.transliteration: Wasturni 'ala dhunoobi

translation.en: And cover my sins.

segments.transliteration: Waqdi al-yawma hajati

translation.en: And fulfill my needs today.

segments.arabic: وَلَا تُعَذِّبْنِي بِقَبِيحِ مَا تَعْلَمُ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: Wala tu'adh-dhibni bi-qabeehi ma ta'lamu minni

translation.en: And do not punish me for the ugly things You know of me.

segments.transliteration: Bal 'afwuka yasa'uni wa jooduka

translation.en: But rather, let Your pardon and generosity encompass me.

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alfajri wallayali alʿashri

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of the daybreak, the ten nights,

segments.transliteration: walshshafʿi walwatri

translation.en: the even and the odd,

segments.transliteration: wallayli idha yasri

translation.en: and the night when it departs!

segments.transliteration: wa rabba kulli shay'in

translation.en: O Lord of all things!

segments.transliteration: wa ilaha kulli shay'in

translation.en: O Lord of all things!

segments.transliteration: wa khaliqa kulli shay'in

translation.en: O Creator of all things!

segments.transliteration: wa malika kulli shay'in

translation.en: O King of all things!

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: (Please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَٱفْعَلْ بِي وَبِـ… مَا انْتَ اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wafʿal bi wa bi… ma anta ahluhu

translation.en: do to me and to so-and-so that which befits You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِنَا مَا نَحْنُ اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la tafʿal bina ma nahnu ahluhu

translation.en: but do not do to us that which we deserve,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: for You are verily worthy to be feared and worthy to forgive.

segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You;

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: there is no god save You;

segments.transliteration: ʿalimu alghaybi walshshahadati

translation.en: (You are) the Knower of all the unseen and the seen

segments.transliteration: alrrahmanu alrrahimu

translation.en: and You are the All-beneficent and All-merciful.

segments.transliteration: allahumma adhhib ʿanniya alhamma walhazana

translation.en: O Allah, (please) put away from me distress, grief,

segments.transliteration: walghiyara walfitana

translation.en: vicissitudes (of time), and seditious matters;

segments.transliteration: ma zahara minha wa ma batana

translation.en: both the explicit and the implicit.

segments.arabic:
اَللّهُم اِلَيْكَ تَوَ جّهْتُ وَ بِكَ اعْتَصَمْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَ كَلْتُ،اَللّهُم اَنْتَ ثِقَتِىْ وَ رَجَائِىْ،فَاکْفِنِىْ مَا اَهَمّنِىْ وَ مَا لَمْ يُهِمّنِىْ وَ مَا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنّىْ،
عَزّ جَارُكَ وَ جَلّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَ لَ اِلٰهَ غَيْرُكَ،صَلّ عَلٰي مُحَمّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمّدٍ وَ
عَجّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ...

أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي اُشْهِدُكَ ، وَاُشْهِدُ مَلائِكَتَكَ وَأَنْبِياءَكَ وَرُسُلَكَ وَجَميعَ خَلْقِكَ بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ رَبّي ،وَالْإِسْلامُ ديني ، وَمُحَمَّدٌ نَبِيّي ، وَعَلِيٌّ وَلِيّي ، وَالْحَسَنُ وَالْحُسَيْنُ وَعَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَجَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ وَمُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ وَعَلِيُّ بْنُ مُوسى وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَعَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ وَالْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَالْخَلَفُ الصَّالِحُ صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَئِمَّتي ،بِهِمْ أَتَوَلَّى ، وَمِنْ عَدُوِّهِمْ أَتَبَرَّءُ .أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي اُنْشِدُكَ دَمَ الْمَظْلُومِ .

translation.en: "O' Allah, I hold You witness, and I hold all Your angels and Prophets and Messengers and the entire creation witness on the fact that certainly You are Allah, My Lord, and my religion is Islam, and Mohammad is my Prophet, and Ali is my Guardian, and Hasan, Husain, Ali bn Husain, Mohamad bin Ali, Jafar bin Mohammad, Musa bin Jafar, Ali bin Musa, Mohammad bin Ali, Ali bin Mohammad, Hasan bin Ali, and their noble successor, peace be upon them, my Imams, I express my devotion towards them, and my dislike towards their enemies. O' Allah, I adjure You for the blood of the oppressed.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي اُنْشِدُكَ بِوَأْيِكَ عَلى نَفْسِكَ لِأَوْلِيائِكَ ، لَتُظْهِرَنَّهُمْ عَلى عَدُوِّكَ وَعَدُوِّهِمْ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى الْمُسْتَحْفَظينَ مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ .
segments.transliteration: O’ Allah, I adjure You by the promise You made to Your friends that You will make them victorious over Your enemies and their enemies, I adjure You to bless Mohammad and the protectors from his household.

translation.en: And repeat three times:

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي اُنْشِدُكَ بِإيوائِكَ عَلى نَفْسِكَ لِأَعْدائِكَ ، لَتُهْلِكَنَّهُمْ وَلَتُخْزِيَنَّهُمْ بَأَيْديهِمْ وَأَيْدِى الْمُؤْمِنينَ ، أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى الْمُسْتَحْفَظينَ مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O' Allah, indeed I adjure You by the pledge You made to yourself regarding Your enemies that You will destroy them, and will humiliate them by their own hands and by the hands of the believers, I adjure You to bless Mohammad and the Protectors from Mohammad's household.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْيُسْرَ بَعْدَ الْعُسْرِ

translation.en: O' Allah, I ask You for ease and relief after difficulties and hardships. [1]

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ حَقّاً حَقّاًلَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ إِيمَاناً وَ تَصْدِيقاًلَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ عُبُودِيَّةً وَ رِقّاًسَجَدْتُ لَكَ يَا رَبِّ تَعَبُّداًوَ رِقّاً لَا مُسْتَنْكِفاً وَ لَا مُسْتَكْبِراًبَلْ أَنَا عَبْدٌ ذَلِيلٌ خَائِفٌ مُسْتَجِير
segments.transliteration: La ilaha illal lahu haqqan haqqa; La ilaha illal lahu imanan wa tasdiqa; la ilaha illal lahu 'ubudiyyatan wa riqqa; Sajadtu laka ya Rabbi ta'abbudan wa riqqa la mustankifan wa la mustak biran bal ana 'abdun zalilun za'ifun kha'ifun mustajir.

translation.en: Sajda from Sahifa Radhvia Ch8

segments.transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA KHIR LEE.

translation.en: O Allah! Choose me (for goodness).

segments.transliteration: Yā ahla at-taqwā wa-l-maghfirah,

translation.en: O Worthy of being feared and Lord of forgiveness,

segments.transliteration: Yā arḥama ar-rāḥimīn,

translation.en: O Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.transliteration: Anta mawlāya wa sayyidī,

translation.en: You are my Master and my Lord,

segments.transliteration: Farzuqnī,

translation.en: So grant me sustenance and grace.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ خَيْرٌ لِي مِنْ أَبِي وَأُمِّي،
segments.transliteration: Anta khayrun lī min abī wa ummī,

translation.en: You are better for me than my father and my mother,

segments.transliteration: Wa mina an-nāsi ajmaʿīn,

translation.en: And better than all people together.

segments.transliteration: Bī ilayka faqr wa fāqah,

translation.en: From me to You is poverty and need,

segments.transliteration: Wa anta ghanīyun ʿannī,

translation.en: And You are free of any need from me.

segments.transliteration: As’aluka bi-wajhika al-karīm,

translation.en: I beseech You by Your Noble and Generous Face,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa as’aluka an tuṣalliya ʿalā Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad,

translation.en: And I ask You to send blessings upon Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,

segments.transliteration: Wa ʿalā ikhwanihi an-nabiyyīn wa al-a’immati aṭ-ṭāhirīn,

translation.en: And upon his brothers — the Prophets — and the pure, immaculate Imams.

segments.transliteration: Wa tastajība duʿā’ī,

translation.en: And that You answer my supplication,

segments.transliteration: Wa tarḥama taḍarruʿī,

translation.en: Have mercy on my humble plea,

segments.transliteration: Wa aṣrif ʿannī anwāʿa al-balā’,

translation.en: And turn away from me every kind of trial and affliction,

segments.transliteration: Yā Raḥmān,

translation.en: O Most Compassionate,

segments.transliteration: SHUKRAN LILLAAH

translation.en: Thanks to Allah

segments.transliteration: A’FWAN A’FWAN

translation.en: Forgive, forgive.0

segments.arabic: لَكَ الْـحَمْدُ اِنْ اَطَعْتُكَ وَ لَا حُـجَّةَ لِيْ اِنْ عَصَيْتُكَ وَ لَا صُنْعَ لِيْ وَ لَا لِغَيْرِيْ فِيْ اِحْسَانِكَ وَ لَا عُذْرَ لِيْ اِنْ اَسَاْتُ مَا اَصَابَنِيْ مِنْ حَسَنَةٍ فَمِنْكَ يَا كَرِيْمُ اِغْفِرْ لِمَنْ فِيْ مَشَارِقِ الْاَرْضِ وَ مَغَارِبِهَا مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: Lakal Hamdo In A-Ta’toka Wa Laa Hujjata Lee In A’saytoka Wa Laa Sun-A’ Lee Wa Laa Le-Ghayree Fee Ehsaaneka Wa Laa U’zra Lee In Asaato Maa Asaabanee Min Hasanatin Fa-Minka Yaa Kareemo Ighfir Leman Fee Mashaareqil Arze Wa Maghaarebehaa Menal Moameneena Wal Moamenaat.

translation.en: Praise belongs to You, if I obey You. I have no reasons nor any excuses should I disobey You. Neither me nor others can do anything in return for Your Kindness. I have no excuse for any bad deeds. Whatever good I receive is all from You. O the Gracious! Please forgive all the believing men and women in the East and the West of the Earth.0

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَ بِكَ اٰمَنْتُ وَ لَكَ اَسْلَمْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ اَنْتَ رَبِّيْ سَـجَدَ لَكَ وَجْهِيْ وَ شَعْرِيْ وَ بَشَرِيْ وَ مُـخِّيْ وَ لَـحْمِيْ وَ دَمِيْ وَ عَصَبِيْ وَ عِظَامِيْ سَـجَدَ وَجْهِيَ الْبَالِي الْفَانِيَ الذَّلِيْلُ الْمَهِيْنُ لِلَّذِيْ خَلَقَهٗ وَ صَوَّرَهٗ وَ شَقَّ سَمْعَهٗ وَ بَصَرَهٗ تَبَارَكَ اللهُ اَحْسَنُ الْـخَالِقِيْنَ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْاَعْلٰى وَ بِـحَمْدِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Laka Sajadto Wa Beka Aamanto Wa Laka Aslamto Wa A’layka Tawakkalto Anta Rabbee Sajada Laka Wajhee Wa Sha’ree Wa Basharee Wa Mukhkhee Wa Lahmee Wa Damee Wa A’sabee Wa E’zaamee Sajada Wajheyal Baalil Faaniz Zaleelul Maheeno Lil-Lazee Khalaqahu Wa Sawwarahu Wa Shaqqa Sam-A’hu Wa Basarahu Tabaarakal Laaho Ahsanul Khaaleqeena Subhaana Rabbeyal A-A’laa Wa Be-Hamdeh.

translation.en: O Allah! For You I prostrate, and on You I believe, and to You I submit, and on You I rely, You are my Lord, prostrated for You my face, and my hair, and my skin, and my brain, and my flesh, and my blood and my nerve, and my bones, prostrated my wretched face, the mortal, the humble, the humiliated, for the One Who has created it and shaped it, and split its hearing and sight, blessed be Allah, the most excellent of all creators, All glory be to Allah, the All-High, and in praise of Him.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَ بِاللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَ رَحْمَۃُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: Bismil Laahe Wa Billaahe Assalaamo A’layka Ayyohan Nabiyyo Wa Rahmatul Laahe Wa Barakaatoh.

translation.en: In the name of Allah and by Allah. O Prophet! Allah's peace, blessings and grace be upon you!0

segments.arabic: يَا مُذِلَّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ يَا مُعِزَّ كُلِّ ذَلِيْلٍ قَدْ وَ حَقِّكَ بَلَغَ مَـجْهُوْدِيْ فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ فَرِّجْ عَنِّيْ.
segments.transliteration: Yaa Mozilla Kulle Jabbaarin A’needin Yaa O-I’zza Kulle Zaleelin Qad Wa Haqqeqa Balagha Majhoodee Fa-Salle A’laa Mohammadin Wa Aalehi Wa Farrij A’nnee.

translation.en: O Humiliator of all tyrants! O Dignifier of all humble ones! I, swearing by You, have exerted all efforts; so, send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household and relieve me.0

text.en: Importance
AHADEETH ON SALATUL LAYLHadith 1Salatul Layl In the Words of Allah (swt)Imam as-Sadiq (AS) has said:"The reward of every good action that a person with true faith performs has been mentioned in the
Method
Before
After each 2 rakat
After 4th
After 8 Raka'at
After Shifa
In Witr
On Completion

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْحَلِيْمُ الْكَرِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul Halimul Karim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is Forbearing and Generous

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul ‘Aliyyul ‘Azim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is Most High and Great

segments.transliteration: Subhaanallaahi Rabbis Samaawaatis Sab'

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who is the Sustainer of the seven heavens and of the seven earth

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbil ‘Arzinas Sab'

translation.en: And Who is the Sustainer of all the things

segments.arabic: وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa maa fihinna wa maa baynahunna

translation.en: in them, and between them,

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbul 'Arshil ‘Azim

translation.en: And Who is the Lord of the great 'Arsh (Divine Center of Authority & Power)

segments.transliteration: Wal Hamdul lillaahi Rabbil 'Aalamin

translation.en: And all praise for Allah, the Sustainer of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: Allaahummagh Firli… (Name)

translation.en: O Allah, forgive (Name)…

segments.arabic: اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّهَ رَبِّي وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Astaghfirullah Rabbi wa Atuubu Ilayh

translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah my Lord and I turn to Him

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ الْعَآئِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: Haadhaa Maqaamul 'Aaidhi Bika Minannaar

translation.en: This is the position of one who seeks refuge in You from the fire [of Hell]

segments.transliteration: Al-'Afwa

translation.en: (I ask for) forgiveness

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَ ارْحَمْنِي وَ تُبْ عَلَيَّ اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: rabbighfirli warhamni wa tub alayya ,innaka antat-tawwabur-rahim

translation.en: Lord, forgive me and have mercy on me, and turn to me, Surely You are the Oft-returning, the Merciful

segments.transliteration: Subbohon, Qoddoson, Rabbul Mala’ekati Wal-Rooh

translation.en: All Glorious, All Holy, Lord of the Angels and the Spirit.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ لَا تُؤْمِنِّي مَكْرَكَ وَلَا تُنْسِنِي ذِكْرَكَ وَلَا تَجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma lā tu'minnī makraka wa lā tunsinī dhikraka wa lā taj'alnī min al-ghāfilīn

translation.en: O Allah, do not let me feel secure from Your plan, and do not make me forget Your remembrance, and do not make me among the heedless.

segments.arabic: أَقُومُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ سَاعَةَ كذا وكذا
segments.transliteration: ʾaqūmu in shāʾa allāhu sāʿata kadhā wa kadhā

translation.en: I will get up, God willing, at such and such an hour...

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي رَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحي لِأَحْمَدَهُ وَأَعْبُدَهُ
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi al-ladhī radda ʿalayya rūḥī li-ʾaḥmadahu wa-ʾaʿbudahu

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who has returned my soul to me so that I may praise Him and worship Him.

segments.transliteration: Subbūḥun Quddūsun Rabbu al-malāʾikati wa-al-Rūḥ

translation.en: All-Glorious, All-Holy, Lord of the angels and the Spirit.

segments.transliteration: Sabaqat raḥmatuka ghaḍabaka

translation.en: Your mercy has preceded Your wrath.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلَه إِلاَّ أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ وَبِحَمْدِكَ عَمِلْتُ سُوءاً
segments.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā anta subḥānaka wa bi-ḥamdika ʿamiltu sūʾan

translation.en: There is no god but You, glory and praise be to You, I have done evil.

segments.arabic: وَظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: Wa ẓalamtu nafsī faghfir lī innahu lā yaghfiru al-dhunūba illā anta

translation.en: And I have wronged myself, so forgive me, for indeed none forgives sins except You.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لاَ يُوَارِي مِنْكَ لَيْلٌ دَاجٍ وَلاَ سَمَاءٌ ذَاتُ أَبْرَاجٍ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innahu lā yuwārī minka laylun dājin wa lā samā'un dhātu abrājin

translation.en: O Allah, indeed no dark night is hidden from You, nor a sky with constellations,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَرْضٌ ذَاتُ مِهَادٍ وَلاَ ظَلَمَاتٌ بَعْضُهَا فَوْقَ بَعْضٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa lā arḍun dhātu mihādin wa lā ẓulumātun ba'ḍuhā fawqa ba'ḍin

translation.en: Nor an earth with a foundation, nor darknesses, some above others,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ بَحْرٌ لُجّيٌّ تُدْلِجُ بِيْنَ يَدَيْ الْمُدْلِجِ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lā baḥrun lujjiyyun tudliju bayna yaday al-mudliji min khalqika

translation.en: Nor a deep sea that travels between the hands of the traveler of Your creation.

segments.arabic: تَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ الأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي الصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: Ta'lamu khā'inata al-a'yuni wa mā tukhfī al-ṣudūr

translation.en: You know the treachery of the eyes and what the hearts conceal.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اِنِّي اَتَوَجَّهُ اِلَيْكَ بِنَبِيِّكَ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ آلِهِ

translation.en: O Allah I turn to You through Your Prophet the Prophet of mercy and (through) his family and I place them in front of my needs

segments.arabic: وَ اُقَدِّمُهُمْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ حَوَ ائِجِي
segments.transliteration: so make me through them,

segments.arabic: فَاجْعَلْنِي بِهِمْ وَجِيْهًا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الآخِرَةِ

translation.en: respected, in the world and in the hereafter and from the near ones
O Allah have mercy on me through them

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي بِهِمْ وَ لاَ تُعَذِّبْنِي بِهِمْ

translation.en: and do not punish me through them

segments.arabic: وَ اهْدِنِي بِهِمْ وَ لاَ تُضِلَّنِي بِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: and guide me through them

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِي بِهِمْ وَ لاَ تَحْرِمْنِي بِهِمْ

translation.en: and do not lead me astray through them

segments.arabic: وَ اقْضِ لِي حَوَائِجَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الآَخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: and grant me sustenance through them

translation.en: and do not deny me through them
and fulfill my needs of the world & the hereafter

segments.arabic: اِﻟﻬِﻲ ﻏَﺎرَتْ نُجُومُ ﺳَﻤَﺎءِكَ وَ ﻧَﺎمَتْ ﻋُﻴُﻮْنُ اَﻧَﺎﻣِﻚَ وَ هَدَاَتْ اَصْوَاتُ ﻋِﺒَﺎدِكَ وَ اَﻧْﻌَﺎﻣِﻚَ
segments.transliteration: ilaahi ghaarat nujoomu samaaika wa naamat ‘uyoonu anaamika wa hada-at aswaatuibaaduka wa an’aamika

translation.en: My God, the stars of Your sky have sunk and the eyes of Your people are sleeping and the voices of Your servants and Your animals have become silent

segments.arabic: وَ غَلَّقَتِ اﻟْﻤُﻠُﻮْكُ ﻋَﻠَﻴْﻬَﺎ اَﺑْﻮَاﺑَﻬَﺎ وَ ﻃَﺎفَ ﻋَﻠَﻴْﻬَﺎ حُرَّاسُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ghallaqatil mulooku ‘alayha abwaabaha wa taafa ‘alayha hurraa-suhaa

translation.en: and the kings have locked their doors and its guards are moving around it

segments.arabic: وَ اﺣْﺘَﺠَﺒُﻮا عَمَّنْ ﻳَﺴْﺌَﻠُﻬُﻢْ ﺣَﺎﺟَﺔً اَوْ ﻳَﻨْﺘَﺠِﻊُ ﻣِﻨْﻬُﻢْ ﻓَﺎﺋِﺪَةً
segments.transliteration: wah-tajaboo ‘amman yasaluhum haajatan aw yantaji’u minhum faa-ida

translation.en: and they are covered from he who wishes to ask them for a need or to get a benefit from them

segments.arabic: وَ اَﻧْﺖَ اِﻟﻬِﻲ حَيٌّ قَيُّوْمٌ ﻻَ ﺗَﺎْﺧُﺬُكَ ﺳِﻨَﺔٌ وَ ﻻ ﻧَﻮْمٌ وَ ﻻَ ﻳَﺸْﻐَﻠُﻚَ ﺷَﻴْﺊٌ ﻋَﻦْ ﺷَﻴْﺊٍ
segments.transliteration: wa anta ilaahi hayyun qayyoomun laa ta-khudhuka sinatun wa laa nawmun wa la yashghaluka shayun ‘an shayin

translation.en: but You my God, are Ever Living, Subsistent, slumber or sleep does not overtake you (2: 255) and one thing does not occupy You from another

segments.arabic: اَﺑْﻮَابُ ﺳَﻤَﺎﺋِﻚَ ﻟِﻤَﻦْ دَﻋَﺎكَ مُفَتَّحَاتٌ وَ ﺧَﺰَاﺋِﻨُﻚَ ﻏَﻴْﺮُ مُغَلَّقَاتٍ
segments.transliteration: abwaabu samaaika liman da’aaka mufattahaatun wa khazaainuka ghairu mughallaqaatin

translation.en: the doors of Your sky are open for he who asks You and Your treasures are never locked

segments.arabic: وَ اَﺑْﻮَابُ رَﺣْﻤَﺘِﻚَ ﻏَﻴْﺮُ ﻣَﺤْﺠُﻮْﺑَﺎتٍ وَ ﻓَﻮَاﺋِﺪُكَ ﻟِﻤَﻦْ ﺳَﺄَﻟَﻚَ ﻏَﻴْﺮُ ﻣَﺤْﻈُﻮْرَاتٍ ﺑَﻞْ هِيَ ﻣَﺒْﺬُوْﻻَتٌ
segments.transliteration: wa abwaabu rahmatika ghairu mahjoobaatin wa fawaaiduka liman sa-a-laka ghairu mahdhooraatin, bal he-ya mabdhoolatun

translation.en: and the doors of Your mercy are never covered and Your benefits are never forbidden for he who asks You rather they are given generously.

segments.arabic: اَﻧْﺖَ اِﻟﻬِﻲ اَﻟْﻜَﺮِﻳْﻢُ الَّذِي ﻻَ تَرُدُّ ﺳَﺎﺋِﻼً ﻣِﻦَ اﻟْﻤُﺆْﻣِﻨِﻴْﻦَ ﺳَﺄَﻟَﻚَ
segments.transliteration: anta ilaahee al-karremul-ladhee laa taruddu saailan min-al momineena sa-a-lak

translation.en: You are my God, the Generous who does not turn away a beseecher who asks from You

segments.arabic: وَ ﻻَ ﺗَﺤْﺘَﺠِﺐُ ﻋَﻦْ اَﺣَﺪٍ ﻣِﻨْﻬُﻢْ اَرَادَكَ. ﻻَ وَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ ﺟَﻼَﻟِﻚَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tahtajibu ‘an ahadin minhum araadak, laa wa ‘izzatika wa jalaalika

translation.en: and You do not conceal Yourself from anyone of the believers who intends You. No, by Your Honor and Your Majesty

segments.arabic: وَ ﻻَ ﺗُﺨْﺘَﺰَلُ ﺣَﻮَاﺋِﺠَﻬُﻢْ دُوْﻧَﻚَ وَ ﻻَ ﻳَﻘْﻀِﻴْﻬَﺎ اَﺣَﺪٌ ﻏَﻴْﺮُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tukhtazaloo hawaaijahum doonaka wa laa yaqdheeha ahadun ghairuk

translation.en: no one removes their needs other than You and no one fulfills their needs apart from You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَ ﻗَﺪْ ﺗَﺮَاﻧِﻲ وَ وُﻗُﻮْﻓِﻲ وَ ذُلَّ ﻣَﻘَﺎﻣِﻲ ﺑَﻴْﻦَ ﻳَﺪَﻳْﻚَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa qad taraane wa wuqoofu wa dhulla maqaamee bayna yadayka

translation.en: O Allah You see me, and my standing (before You) and my humble position in front of You

segments.arabic: وَ ﺗَﻌْﻠَﻢُ ﺳَﺮِﻳْﺮَﺗِﻲ وَ تَطَّلِعُ ﻋَﻠﻰ ﻣَﺎ ﻓِﻲ ﻗَﻠْﺒِﻲ وَ ﻣَﺎ ﻳَﺼْﻠِﺢُ ﺑِﻪِ اَﻣْﺮُ آﺧِﺮَﺗِﻲ وَ دُﻧْﻴَﺎيَ
segments.transliteration: wa ta’lamu sareeratee wa tat=tali’u ‘alaa maa fee qalbee wa maa yaslihu bihi amru aakhiratee wa dunyaaya

translation.en: and You know my secrets and are aware of what is in my heart and of what will improve my affairs of the Hereafter and the world.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اِنَّ ذِكْرَ اﻟْﻤَﻮْتِ وَ اَهْوَالِ الْمُطَّلِعِ وَاﻟْﻮُﻗُﻮْفَ ﺑَﻴْﻦَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna dhikral mawti wa ahwaalil muttali’i wal wuqoofa bayna yadayka

translation.en: O Allah, the remembrance of death and the frightening conditions of the observer and standing before You

segments.arabic: نَغَّصَنِي ﻣَﻄْﻌَﻤِﻲ وَﻣَﺸْﺮَﺑِﻲ وَ اَغَصَّنِي ﺑِﺮِﻳْﻘِﻲ اَﻗْﻠَﻘَﻨِﻲ ﻋَﻦْ وِﺳَﺎدِي وَ ﻣَﻨَﻌَﻨِﻲ رُﻗَﺎدِي
segments.transliteration: nagh-ghasanee mat’amee wa mashrabee wa aghassanee bee-reeqee aqlaqanee ‘an wisaadee wa mana’anee ruqaadee

translation.en: makes me stay away from my food and drink and makes me choke, keeps me away from my pillow and prevents me from sleeping.

segments.arabic: كَيْفَ ﻳَﻨَﺎمُ ﻣَﻦْ ﻳَﺨَﺎفُ ﻣَﻠَﻚَ اﻟْﻤَﻮْتِ ﻓِﻲ ﻃَﻮَارِقِ اللَّيْلِ وَ ﻃَﻮَارِقِ النَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: kayfa yanaamu man yakhaafu malakal mawtu fee tawaariqil-layli wa tawaariqin-nahaari

translation.en: How can one sleep who fears the angel of death? in the calamities of the night and the calamities of the day

segments.arabic: ﺑَﻞْ كَيْفَ ﻳَﻨَﺎمُ اﻟْﻌَﺎﻗِﻞُ وَ ﻣَﻠَﻚُ اﻟْﻤَﻮْتِ ﻻَ ﻳَﻨَﺎمُ ﻻَ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ ﻻَ بِالنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: bal kayfa yanaamul ‘aaqilu wa malakul mawti laa yanamu laa bil-layli wa laa binnahaari

translation.en: rather how can an intelligent person sleep while the angel of death does not sleep neither at night nor in the day

segments.arabic: وَ ﻳَﻄْﻠُﺐُ رُوْﺣَﻪُ ﺑِﺎﻟْﺒَﻴَﺎتِ وَ ﻓِﻲ آﻧَﺎءِ السَّاعَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa yatlubu ruhahu bil bayaati wa fee aaanaais-sa’aati

translation.en: and seeks his soul in the state of sleep and in the middle of the hours

segments.arabic: اَﺳْﺄَﻟُﻚَ الرَّوحَ وَ الرَّاحةَ ﻋِﻨْﺪَ اﻟْﻤَﻮْتِ وَ اﻟْﻌَﻔْﻮَ عَنِّي ﺣِﻴْﻦَ اَﻟْﻘَﺎك
segments.transliteration: asalukar-rawha war-raahata ‘indal mawti wal ‘afwa ‘annee heena alqaak

translation.en: I beseech You to give me ease and comfort at the time of death and forgiveness when I meet You

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ کَمْ مِنْ مُوْبِقَۃٍ حَلُمْتَ عَنْ مُقَابِلَتِهَا بِنِقْمَتِکَ
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī kam min mūbiqatin ḥalumta ʿan muqābalatihā biniqmatik

translation.en: My God, how many destructive deeds have You forborne from meeting with Your vengeance,

segments.arabic: وَکَمْ مِنْ جَرِيْرَۃٍ تَکَرَّمْتَ عَنْ کَشْفِهَا بِکَرَمِکَ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min jarīratin takarramta ʿan kashfihā bikaramik

translation.en: And how many offenses have You graciously overlooked by Your generosity!

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ اِنْ طَالَ فِيْ عِصْيَانِکَ عُمْرِيْ، وَ عَظُمَ فيِ الصُّحُفِ ذَنْبِيْ
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī in ṭāla fī ʿiṣyānika ʿumrī, wa ʿaẓuma fī al-ṣuḥufi dhanbī

translation.en: My God, if my life is prolonged in disobedience to You, and my sin is great in the records,

segments.arabic: فَمَا اَنَا مُؤَمِّلٌ غَيْرَ غُفْرَانِکَ، وَ لَا اَنَا بِرَاجٍ غَيْرَ رِضْوَانِکَ
segments.transliteration: famā anā muʾammilun ghayra ghufrānika, wa lā anā birājin ghayra riḍwānik

translation.en: Then I have no hope except in Your forgiveness, and I have no expectation except in Your pleasure.

segments.arabic: اِلٰهِيْ اُفَکِّرُ فِيْ عَفْوِکَ فَتَهُوْنُ عَلَيَّ خَطِيْئَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: Ilāhī uffakiru fī ʿafwika fatahūnu ʿalayya khaṭīʾatī

translation.en: My God, I think of Your pardon, and my sin becomes easy for me,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ اَذْکُرُ الْعَظِيْمَ مِنْ اَخْذِکَ فَتَعْظُمُ عَلَيَّ بَلِيَّتِيْ
segments.transliteration: thumma adhkuru al-ʿaẓīma min akhdhika fataʿẓumu ʿalayya baliyyatī

translation.en: Then I remember the severity of Your seizure, and my affliction becomes great for me.

segments.arabic: اٰهٍ اِنْ اَنَا قَرَاْتُ فِيْ الصُّحُفِ سَيِّئَۃً اَنَا نَاسِيْهَا وَ اَنْتَ مُحْصِيْهَا
segments.transliteration: āhin in anā qaraʾtu fī al-ṣuḥufi sayyiʾatan anā nāsīhā wa anta muḥṣīhā

translation.en: Ah, if I read in the records an evil deed that I have forgotten, and You have recorded,

segments.arabic: فَتَقُوْلُ: خُذُوْهُ، فَيَا لَهٗ مِنْ مَاْخُوْذٍ لَا تُنْجِيْهِ عَشِيْرَتُهٗ
segments.transliteration: fataqūlu khudhūhu fayā lahu min mākhūdh lā tunjīhi ʿashīratuhu

translation.en: Then You say, "Seize him!" So woe to him who is seized, whom his clan will not save,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَنْفَعُهٗ قَبِيْلَتُهٗ يَرْحَمُهُ الْمَلَأُ اِذَا اُذِنَ فِيْهِ بِالنِّدَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa lā tanfaʿuhu qabīlatuhu yarḥamuhu al-malaʾu idhā udhina fīhi bil-nidāʾ

translation.en: And his tribe will not benefit him. The angels will have mercy on him when the call is authorized for him.

segments.arabic: اٰهٍ مِنْ نَارٍ تُنْضِجُ الْاَکْبَادَ وَ الْکُلٰي،
segments.transliteration: āhin min nārin tunḍiju al-ʾakbāda wa al-kulá

translation.en: Ah, from a fire that ripens the livers and the kidneys,

segments.transliteration: āhin min nārin nazzāʿatin lil-shawá

translation.en: Ah, from a fire that snatches away the extremities,

segments.arabic: اٰهٍ مِنْ غَمْرَۃٍ مِنْ لَهَبَاتٍ لَظٰي
segments.transliteration: āhin min ghamratin min lahabātin laẓá

translation.en: Ah, from an immersion in the flames of Hellfire!
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اَنْتَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّوْمُ اَلْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيْمُ

translation.en: O Allah You are the Ever Living, the Eternal the Elevated, the Mighty
the Creator, the Sustainer the One who gives life and the One who causes to die
the Beginner, the Unique
For You is nobility and for You is generosity

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْمَنُّ وَ لَكَ الاَمْرُ

translation.en: and for You is grace and for You is the command
You are One there is no partner for You

segments.transliteration: O Creator, O Sustainer

translation.en: O the One who gives life and the One who causes to die
O the Unique, the Sublime

segments.arabic: اَسْأَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: I ask you to bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تَرْحَمَ ذُلِّ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ وَ تَضَرُّعِي اِلَيْكَ

translation.en: and to have mercy on my lowliness before You and my beseeching You

segments.arabic: وَحْشَتِي مِنَ النَّاسِ وَ اُنْسِي بِك

translation.en: and my loneliness from people and my intimacy with You

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْئَلُکَ بِحُرْمَۃِ مَنْ عَاذَ بِکَ مِنْکَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī ʾasʾaluka biḥurmati man ʿādha bika minka

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by the sanctity of whoever seeks refuge in You from You,

segments.arabic: وَ لَجَأَ اِلٰي عِزِّکَ وَ اسْتَظَلَّ بِفَيْئِکَ وَ اعْتَصَمَ بِحَبْلِکَ
segments.transliteration: wa lajaʾa ʾilá ʿizzika wastaẓalla bifayʾika waʾʿtaṣama biḥablik

translation.en: And seeks shelter in Your might, and shade in Your shadow, and holds fast to Your rope,

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ يَثِقْ اِلاَّ بِکَ يَا مُطْلِقَ الْاُسَارٰي
segments.transliteration: wa lam yathiq illā bika yā muṭliqa al-ʾusārā

translation.en: And trusts none but You, O Reliever of captives.

segments.arabic: يَامَنْ سَمّٰي نَفْسَهٗ مِنْ جُوْدِهٖ وَهَّابًا وَ هَا اَنَا اَدْعُوْکَ
segments.transliteration: Yā man sammā nafsahū min jūdihī wahhāban wa hā anā ʾadʿūka

translation.en: O You who named Yourself, out of Your generosity, "The Giver," and here I am calling upon You,

segments.arabic: رَغَبًا وَ رَهَبًا وَخَوْفًا وَ طَمَعًا وَ اِنْجَاحًا وَ اِلْحَاحًا
segments.transliteration: raghaban wa rahban wa khawfan wa ṭamaʿan wa ʾinjāḥan wa ʾilhāḥan

translation.en: With desire and awe, and fear and hope, and earnestly and insistently,

segments.arabic: وَ تَضَرُّعًا وَ تَمَلُّقًا وَ قَائِمًا وَ قَاعِدًا وَّرَاکِعًا
segments.transliteration: wa taḍarruʿan wa tamalluqan wa qāʾiman wa qāʿidan wa rākiʿan

translation.en: And beseechingly and entreatingly, and standing and sitting and bowing

segments.arabic: وَ سَاجِدًا وَ رَاکِبًا وَمَا شِيًا وَ ذَاهِبًا وَ جَآئِيًا
segments.transliteration: wa sājidan wa rākiban wa māshiyan wa dhāhiban wa jāʾiyan

translation.en: And prostrating, and riding and walking and going and coming,

segments.arabic: وَ فِيْ کُلِّ حَالاَتِيْ اَسْئَلُکَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa fī kulli ḥālātī ʾasʾaluka ʾan tuṣalliya ʿalā Muḥammadin

translation.en: And in all my states, I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَّ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ (’’وَاَنْ تَفْعَلْ بِيْ کَذَا وَکَذَا وَ تَذْکُرُ حَاجَتَکَ‘‘)
segments.transliteration: wa āli Muḥammadin (wa ʾan tafʿal bī kadhā wa kadhā wa tadhkuru ḥājataka)

translation.en: And the family of Muhammad (and that You do for me such and such, and mention your need).
In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اِلهِي تَعَرَّضَ لَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ الْمُتَعَرِّضُوْنَ

translation.en: O Allah, on this night the seekers have sought You
and the aspirers have aspired for You

segments.arabic: وَ اَمَّلَ فَضْلَكَ وَ مَعْرُوْفَكَ الطَّالِبُوْنَ

translation.en: and the searchers have hoped for Your blessings and grace

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ نَفَحَاتٌ

translation.en: For You have in this night, hidden bounties

segments.arabic: وَ جَوَائِزُ وَ عَطَايَا وَ مَوَاهِبُ
segments.transliteration: and rewards and presents and gifts

segments.arabic: تَمُنُّ بِهَا عَلى مَنْ تَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ

translation.en: which You bestow upon whom you please from Your servants

segments.arabic: وَ تَمْنَعُهَا مَنْ لَمْ تَسْبِقُ لَهُ الْعِنَايَةُ مِنْكَ

translation.en: and You deny them to one who has not reached Your regard

segments.arabic: وَ هَا اَنَا ذَا عُبَيْدُكَ الْفَقِيْرُ اِلَيْكَ

translation.en: Here I am,Your abject servant in need of You
hopeful of Your blessings and grace

segments.arabic: فَاِنْ كُنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ تَفَضَّلْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ

translation.en: So, O my Master if You have bestowed blessings on this night
on anyone of Your creatures

segments.arabic: وَ عُدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بِعَائِدَةٍ مِنْ عَطْفِكَ
segments.transliteration: and turned to him with affection

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: then bless Muhammad and his family the pure, the purified,

segments.transliteration: the virtuous onesthe excellent ones

segments.arabic: وَ جُدْ عَلَيَّ بِطَوْلِكَ وَ مَعْرُوْفِكَ

translation.en: and favor me with Your grace and bounty

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ وَ صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Lord of the worlds And send blessings on Muhammad

segments.arabic: خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيْمًا

translation.en: the seal of the Prophets and his family, the Purified and salute them witha perfect salutation
Surely Allah is praiseworthy, Glorious

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اِنِّي اَدْعُوْكَ كَمَا اَمَرْتَ فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَ

translation.en: O Allah I have supplicated to You'as You have commanded.then answer me as You have promised.
Surely You do not break Your promises.

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْحَلِيْمُ الْكَرِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul Halimul Karim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is Forbearing and Generous

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul ‘Aliyyul ‘Azim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is Most High and Great

segments.transliteration: Subhaanallaahi Rabbis Samaawaatis Sab'

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who is the Sustainer of the seven heavens and of the seven earth

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbil ‘Arzinas Sab'

translation.en: And Who is the Sustainer of all the things

segments.arabic: وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa maa fihinna wa maa baynahunna

translation.en: in them, and between them,

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbul 'Arshil ‘Azim

translation.en: And Who is the Lord of the great 'Arsh (Divine Center of Authority & Power)

segments.transliteration: Wal Hamdul lillaahi Rabbil 'Aalamin

translation.en: And all praise for Allah, the Sustainer of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَمَا فَوْقَهُنَّ وَمَا تَحْتَهُنَّ وَ رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ

translation.en: and what is above them and what is under them Rabb of the Mighty throne

segments.arabic: اَلَّلهُمَّ اَنْتَ اللهُ نُوْرُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ

translation.en: O Allah , You are Allah,the Light of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ زَيْنُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ

translation.en: You are Allah, the Ornament of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: وَ انت اللهُ جَمَالُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ

translation.en: You are Allah, the Beauty of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ اللهُ عِمَادُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ

translation.en: You are Allah, the Pillar of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ قِوَامُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ

translation.en: You are Allah, the Support of the heavens and the earth
You are Allah, the Object of those who call out for help
You are Allah, the Helper of those who seek help

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ المُفَرَّجُ عَنِ الْمَكْرُوْبِيْنَ

translation.en: You are Allah, the Reliever of those in distress

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ الْمُرَوِّحُ عَنِ الْمُغْمُومِيْنَ

translation.en: You are Allah , the one who gives happiness to the grieved

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ مُجِيْبُ دَعْوَةُ الْمُضْطَرِيْنَ

translation.en: You are Allah, the one who answers the call of the distressed

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ اِلهُ العَالَمِيْنَ وَ اَنْتَ اللهُ الرَّحْمَنُ الرَّحِيْمْ

translation.en: You are Allah, God of the worlds You are Allah, the most merciful

segments.transliteration: Allaahummagh Firli… (Name)

translation.en: O Allah, forgive (Name)…

segments.arabic: اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّهَ رَبِّي وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Astaghfirullah Rabbi wa Atuubu Ilayh

translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah my Lord and I turn to Him

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ الْعَآئِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: Haadhaa Maqaamul 'Aaidhi Bika Minannaar

translation.en: This is the position of one who seeks refuge in You from the fire [of Hell]

segments.transliteration: Al-'Afwa

translation.en: (I ask for) forgiveness

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَ ارْحَمْنِي وَ تُبْ عَلَيَّ اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: rabbighfirli warhamni wa tub alayya ,innaka antat-tawwabur-rahim

translation.en: Lord, forgive me and have mercy on me, and turn to me, Surely You are the Oft-returning, the Merciful

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ الْعَائِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ.
segments.transliteration: haazaa maqaamul a’a-eze beka menan naar.

translation.en: This is the position of the seeker of protection with You from the hell fire

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اهْدِنِيْ فِيْمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَ عَافِنِيْ فِيْمَنْ عَافَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ihdinī fīman hadayt, wa ‘āfinī fīman ‘āfayt

translation.en: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, and grant me health among those You have granted health,

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَلَّنِيْ فِيْمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ وَ بَارِكْ لِيْ فِيْمَا اَعْطَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa tawallanī fīman tawallayt, wa bārik lī fīmā a‘ṭayt

translation.en: And take me as a protector among those You have taken as protectors, and bless me in what You have given,

segments.arabic: وَ قِنِيْ شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ اِنَّكَ تَقْضِيْ وَ لَا يُقْضٰى عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qinī sharra mā qaḍayt, innaka taqḍī wa lā yuqḍā ‘alayk

translation.en: And protect me from the evil of what You have decreed, for indeed You decree and none can decree over You.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: Subḥānaka rabba al-bayti, astaghfiruka wa atūbu ilayk

translation.en: Glory be to You, Lord of the House, I seek Your forgiveness and I repent to You,

segments.arabic: وَ اُوْمِنُ بِكَ وَ اَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَيْكَ وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ūminu bika wa atawakkalu ‘alayk, wa lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā bik

translation.en: And I believe in You and I place my trust in You, and there is no might nor power except with You,

segments.transliteration: yā Raḥīm

translation.en: O Most Merciful.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اَسَاْتُ وَ ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى وَ بِئْسَ مَا صَنَعْتُ

translation.en: O Allah! I am a sinner, I have done oppression on my self, and whatever I have done is wrong,

segments.arabic: فَهَذِهِ يَدَايَ يَا رَبِّ جَزَآءَ بِمَا کَسَبْتُ وَ هَاذِهِ

translation.en: now both these hands are presented for punishment,

segments.arabic: رَقَبَتِى خَاضِعَةً لِّمَا اَتَيْتُ وَهَا اَنَا ذَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ

translation.en: and the neck is bowed down due to my sins and now I have presented myself in Your presence.

segments.arabic: فَخُذْ لِنَنفْسِي مِنْ نَفْسِى الرِّضَا حَتَّى تَرْضَى لَكَ

translation.en: So take for me my satisfaction from myself until it is satisfied with you.
so that You love my actions and then I never repeat such deeds again.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ اصْدُرُ عَنْ بَابِكَ بِخَيْبَةٍ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa asduru ʿan babika bikhaybatin minka

translation.en: O my God, how can it be that I return from Your door carrying disappointment of You

segments.transliteration: wa qad qasadtuhu ʿala thiqatin bika

translation.en: after I have come to it putting my trust in You?

segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa tu'yisuni min ʿata'ika

translation.en: O my God, how can it be that You make me despair of Your gifts

segments.transliteration: wa qad amartani biduʿa'ika

translation.en: after You have ordered me to pray You?

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (Please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: warhamni idha ishtadda al-aninu

translation.en: and have mercy upon me when moaning will intensify,

segments.transliteration: wa huzira ʿalayya alʿamalu

translation.en: when action will be banned,

segments.transliteration: wanqataʿa minni al-amalu

translation.en: when hope will be cut off,

segments.transliteration: wa afdaytu ila almanuni

translation.en: when I will be led to death,

segments.transliteration: wa bakat ʿalayya alʿuyunu

translation.en: when eyes will weep for me,

segments.transliteration: wa waddaʿani al-ahlu wal-ahbabu

translation.en: when my family members and dear ones will bid farewell to me,

segments.transliteration: wa huthiya ʿalayya altturabu

translation.en: when dust will be poured upon me,

segments.transliteration: wa nusiya ismi

translation.en: when my name will be forgotten,

segments.transliteration: wa baliya jismi

translation.en: when my body will be rotten,

segments.transliteration: wantamasa dhikri

translation.en: when my remembrance will be wiped out,

segments.transliteration: wa hujira qabri

translation.en: when my grave will be deserted;

segments.transliteration: falam yazurni za'irun

translation.en: so, no one will ever visit me

segments.transliteration: wa lam yadhkurni dhakirun

translation.en: and no one will ever remember me,

segments.transliteration: wa zaharat minni alma'athimu

translation.en: when the responsibilities of my sins will appear,

segments.transliteration: wastawlat ʿalayya almazalimu

translation.en: when my violations of the others' rights will overtake me,

segments.transliteration: wa talat shikayatu alkhusumi

translation.en: when the complaints of my rivals will be admitted,

segments.transliteration: wa ittasalat daʿwatu almazlumi

translation.en: and when the prayer of the oppressed ones against me will be responded.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ ٱللَّهُمَّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: salli allahumma ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa ardi khusumi ʿanni

translation.en: make my rivals be pleased with me

segments.transliteration: bifadlika wa ihsanika

translation.en: out of Your favoring and Your good turns,

segments.transliteration: wa jud ʿalayya biʿafwika wa ridwanika

translation.en: and treat me magnanimously out of Your pardon and pleasure.

segments.transliteration: ilahi dhahabat ayyamu ladhdhati

translation.en: O Allah, the days of my pleasures have gone away

segments.transliteration: wa baqiyat ma'athimi wa tabiʿati

translation.en: and nothing remained but my sins and the liabilities of my wrongdoings.

segments.transliteration: wa qad ataytuka muniban ta'iban

translation.en: I have thus come to You repentant and penitent.

segments.transliteration: fala taruddani mahruman wa la kha'iban

translation.en: So, (please) do not reject me deprived and disappointed.

segments.transliteration: allahumma amin rawʿati

translation.en: O Allah, (please) secure my fear,

segments.transliteration: waghfir zallati

translation.en: forgive my slips,

segments.transliteration: wa tub ʿalayya

translation.en: and accept my repentance.

segments.transliteration: innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu

translation.en: Verily, You are the Oft-Returning, the All-merciful.
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَلَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلىَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي سَيِّدِي هذِهِ يَدَايَ قَدْ مَدَدْن.تُهُمَا اِلَيْكَ بِاذُنُوْبِ مَمْلُوْءَةً

translation.en: My Master, My Master, I have stretched out these hands to You full of sins

segments.arabic: وَ عَيْنَايَ بِالرَّجَاءِ مَمْدُوْدَةً وَحَقٌّ يِمَنْ دَعَاكَ بِالْكَرَمِ تَفَضُّلاَ

translation.en: and my eyes stretched out with hope and it is the right of the one who calls You with regret and humility that You answer him with Generosity and Grace

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي آمِنْ اَهْلِ الشَّقَاءِ خَلُقْتَنِي قَاَطِيْلُ بُكَائِي

translation.en: My master,have You created me from the unfortunate ones so I should lengthen my weeping?
or have You created me from the fortunate ones
so I should give glad tidings to my hopes?

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي لَوْ اَنَّ عَبْدًا اِسْتَطَاعَ الْهَرَبَ مِنْ مَوْلاَهُ

translation.en: My master, if a servant was able to escape from his Master

segments.arabic: لَكُنْتُ اَوَّلَ الْهَارِبِيْنَ مِنْكَ لكِنِّي اَعْلَمُ اَنِّي لاَ اَفُوْتُكَ

translation.en: then I would be the first of those who escape from You but I know that I cannot escape You

segments.arabic: اِلَهِي وَ سَيِّدِي اِرْحَمْنِي مَصْرُوْعًا عَلى الْفِرَاشِ

translation.en: My God and my master, have mercy on me when I am lying on my bed[dead]

segments.arabic: تُقَلِّبُنِي اَيْدِي اَحِبَّتِي وَارْحَمْنِي مَصطْرُوحًا عَلى الْمُغْتَسَلِ يُغَسِّلَنِي صَالِحُ جِيْرَتِي

translation.en: Have mercy on me when the hands of my loved ones turn me when I am placed on the place of ghusl and the virtuous near ones wash me

segments.arabic: وَاَرْحَمْنِي مَحْمُولاَ قَدْ تَنَاوَلَ اَلاَقْرِبَاءُ اَطْرَافَ جَنَازَتِي

translation.en: Have mercy on me when I am being carried, and my relatives have surrounded my coffin

segments.arabic: وَ ارْحَمْ فِي ذَلِكَ الْبَيْتِ الْمُظْلِمِ وَحْشَتِي وَ غُرْبَتِي وَ وَحْدَتِي

translation.en: Have mercy on me in that dark house on my fear, my separation, and my loneliness have mercy on me

segments.transliteration: Subbohon, Qoddoson, Rabbul Mala’ekati Wal-Rooh

translation.en: All Glorious, All Holy, Lord of the Angels and the Spirit.

segments.transliteration: bismillahir rahmanir raheem

translation.en: In the name of Allah, The Beneficent, the Merciful

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ‘alaa muhammadin wa ali muhammad

translation.en: O Allah bless Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: اُنَاجِيْکَ يَا مَوْجُوْدًا فِيْ کُلِّ مَکَانٍ
segments.transliteration: unaajika ya mawjoodan fi kulli makaan

translation.en: I whisper unto You O One Who is present in every place

segments.arabic: لَعَلَّکَ تَسْمَعُ نِدَآئِيْ فَقَدْ عَظُمَ جُرْمِيْ وَ قَلَّ حَيَآئِيْ
segments.transliteration: la’allaka tasma’oo nidaaee faqad ‘adhuma jurmi wa qalla hayaaee

translation.en: So that you may hear my call for surely my sin is excessive and my shame is less

segments.arabic: مَوْلَايَ يَا مَوْلَايَ اَيَّ الْاَهْوَالِ اَتَذَکَّرُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya ayyal ahwali atadhakkar

translation.en: My Master, O my Master which of the terrifying states shall I remember

segments.arabic: وَ اَيَّهَا اَنْسٰي وَ لَوْ لَمْ يَکُنْ اِلاَّ الْمَوْتُ لَکَفٰي
segments.transliteration: wa ayyahaa ansaa wa law lam yakun illal maawtu lakafaa

translation.en: and which of them shall I forget for if there was nothing except death it would be enough

segments.arabic: کَيْفَ وَمَا بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ اَعْظَمُ وَ اَدْهَي
segments.transliteration: kayfaa wa maa b’adal mawti a‘adhamoo wa ad-haa

translation.en: then what about after death greater and much worse?

segments.arabic: مَولاَيَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ حَتّٰي مَتٰي وَ اِلٰي مَتٰي اَقُوْلُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya hatta mata wa ilaa mata aqulu

translation.en: My master O my Master up to when and till when will I say,

segments.arabic: لَکَ الْعُتْبٰي مَرَّةً بَعْدَ اُخْرٰي ثُمَّ لاَ تَجِدُ عِنْدِيْ صِدْقًا وَ لاَ وَفَآءً
segments.transliteration: lakal ‘utbaa marratan b’ada ukhraa thumma laa tajidu ‘indee sidqan wa laa wafaa-an

translation.en: I am to blame, again and again, but then You do not find any truth or loyalty in me?

segments.transliteration: fa yaa ghawthaa-hu thumma wa ghaw'thaahu bika

translation.en: I call for help and I call for help,

segments.arabic: يَا اَللّٰهُ مِنْ هَوًي قَدْ غَلَبَنِيْ وَ مِنْ عَدُوٍّ قَدِ اسْتَکْلَبَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu min hawaa qad ghalabanee wa min ‘aduwwin qad-istaklaba ‘alayya

translation.en: O Allah from desires which have overpowered me and from the enemy which has pounced on me

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ دُنْيَا قَدْ تَزَيَّنَتْ لِيْ وَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ اَمَّارَةٍ بِالسُّوٓءِ اِلاَّ مَا رَحِمَ رَبِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wa min dunyaa qad-tazayyanat lee wa min nafsin ammaaratin bis-suui illa ma rahima rabbee

translation.en: and from the world which attracts me and from the soul that leads towards evil except that on which my Lord has mercy (12: 53)

segments.arabic: مَوْلاَيَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ اِنْ کُنْتَ رَحِمْتَ مِثْلِي فَارْحَمْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: mawlaya ya mawlaya in kunta rahimta mithlee farhamnee

translation.en: My master O my master if You have had mercy on the likes of me then have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَ اِنْ کُنْتَ قَبِلْتَ مِثْلِيْ فَاقْبَلْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa inkuntaa qabilta mithlee faqbalnee

translation.en: and if You have accepted from the likes of me then accept from me

segments.arabic: يَا قَبِلَ السَّحَرَةِ اِقْبَلْنِيْ يَا مَنْ لَمْ اَزَلْ اَتَعَرَّفُ مِنْهُ الْحُسْنٰي
segments.transliteration: ya qabilas-saharati iqbalnee ya man lam azal at’arrafu min hul husna

translation.en: O One Who accepts the early morning prayer accept me, O One who, I still know only good from Him

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُغَذِّيْنِيْ بِالنِّعَمِ صَبَاحًا وَ مَسَآءً اِرْحَمْنِيْ يَوْمَ اٰتِيْکَ فَرْدًا شَاخِصًا اِلَيْکَ
segments.transliteration: ya man yughadh-dhinee bin-n’eami sabaahan wa masaa-an irhamnee yawma aateeka fardan shakhisan ilayka

translation.en: O One who nourishes me with blessings morning and evening have mercy on me when I come to You alone,

segments.arabic: بَصَرِيْ مُقَلَّدًا عَمَلِيْ قَدْ تَبَرَّءَ جَمِيْعُ الْخَلْقِ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: basari muqaliddan ‘amali qad ta barra-a jamee'ul khalqi minni

translation.en: my glance fixed on You my actions carried on my neck When all of creation will withdraw away from me

segments.arabic: نَعَمْ وَ اَبِيْ وَ اُمِّيْ وَ مَنْ کَانَ لَهُ کَدِّيْ وَ سَعْيِيْ
segments.transliteration: na'am wa abi wa ummi wa man kana lahoo kaddee wa sa’ayi

translation.en: yes, even my father and mother and those for whom I worked and struggled

segments.transliteration: fa in -am tarhamni fa man yarhamuni

translation.en: then if You will not have mercy on me who will have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ يُوْنِسُ فِيْ الْقَبْرِ وَحْشَتِيْ وَ مَنْ يُنْطِقُ لِسَانِيْ اِذَا خَلَوْتُ بِعَمَلِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa man yunisu fil qabri wahshati wa man yuntiqoo lisanee idha khalawtu bi ‘amali

translation.en: who will give me solace from the loneliness of the grave and who will make me speak when I am alone with my deeds

segments.arabic: وَ سَاءَلْتَنِيْ عَمَّا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wa saa-altanee ‘amma anta a’alamu bihi minni

translation.en: and when You will ask me about what You know better than me?

segments.arabic: فَاِنْ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ فَاَيْنَ الْمَحْرَبُ مِنْ عَدْلِکَ
segments.transliteration: fa-in qultu na’am fa aynal mahraboo min ‘adlik

translation.en: Then if I say yes (to my sins) where will be the escape from Your Justice?

segments.arabic: وَ اِنْ قُلْتُ لَمْ اَفْعَلْ قُلْتَ اَلَمْ اَکُنِ الشَّاهِدَ عَلَيْکَ
segments.transliteration: wa in qulta lam af’al qulta alam akunish-shahida ‘alayka

translation.en: And if I say I did not commit it You will say was I not a witness over you?

segments.arabic: فَعَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ قَبْلَ سَرَابِيْلِ الْقَطِرَانِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla saraabeelil qatiraan

translation.en: So (I beseech) Your Forgiveness Your Pardon O my master before the wearing of the clothes of Hell

segments.arabic: عَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ قَبْلَ جَهَنَّمَ وَ النِّيْرَانِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla jahannama wan-neeraan

translation.en: Your Forgiveness Your Pardon O my Master before the Hell and the Fire

segments.arabic: عَفْوُکَ عَفْوُکَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ قَبْلَ اَنْ تُغَلَّ الْاَيْدِيْ اِلٰي الْاَعْنَاقِ
segments.transliteration: fa ‘awfuka ‘awfuka ya mawlaaya qabla an tughallal aydee ilal a’anaaq

translation.en: Your Forgiveness Your Forgiveness O my Master before the hands are tied to the necks

segments.arabic: يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ وَ خَيْرَ الْغَافِرِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: ya arhamar-rahimeen, wa khayral ghaafireen

translation.en: O the most Merciful and the best of Forgivers

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيْمِ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ وَاَسْألَهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him. I seek protection of Allah and I beseech Him to give me His bounties generously.

segments.arabic: فَ صَلّ عَل يٰ مُحَمّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: fa ṣalli ʿalā muḥammadin wa āli muḥammad,

translation.en: So send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لِىْ فِيْ مَا تَشَاءُ اَنْ تُعَجّلَ فَرَجَ آلِ
segments.transliteration: wajʿal lī fī mā tashāʾu an tuʿajjila faraja āli

translation.en: And grant me, in what You will, that You hasten the relief of the family

segments.arabic: مُحَمّدٍ صَلّي الُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ سَلّمَ،
segments.transliteration: muḥammadin ṣallá allāhu ʿalayhi wa ālihi wa sallam,

translation.en: Of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his family and grant them peace,

segments.arabic: وَ عَجّلْ فَرَجِىْ وَ فَرَجَ اِخْوَ انِىْ مَقْرُوْناً بِفَرَجِهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa ʿajjil farajī wa faraja ʾikhwānī maqrūnan bifarajihim,

translation.en: And hasten my relief and the relief of my brothers, joined with their relief,

segments.arabic: وَ تَفْعَلَ بِىْ مَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa tafʿala bī mā anta ʾahluh.

translation.en: And do with me what You are worthy of.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ وَلَمْ يُسْأَلْ مِثْلُكَ ، أَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ مَسْأَلَةِ السَّائِلينَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka wa lam yus'al mithluka, anta mawḍi'u mas'alati al-ssā'ilīn,

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You, and none like You has been asked. You are the place where those who ask direct their questions,

segments.arabic: وَمُنْتَهى رَغْبَةِ الرَّاغِبينَ ، أَدْعُوكَ وَلَمْ يُدْعَ مِثْلُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa muntahā raghbati al-rrāghibīn, ad'ūka wa lam yud'a mithluka

translation.en: And the ultimate desire of those who yearn. I call upon You, and none like You has been called upon.

segments.arabic: وَأَرْغَبُ إِلَيْكَ وَلَمْ يُرْغَبْ إِلى مِثْلِكَ ، أَنْتَ مُجيبُ دَعْوَةِ الْمُضْطَرّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa arghabu ilayka wa lam yurghab ilā mithlika, anta mujību da'wati al-muḍṭarrīn

translation.en: And I yearn to You, and none like You is yearned to. You are the responder to the prayer of those in distress,

segments.transliteration: wa arḥamu al-rrāḥimīn.

translation.en: And the Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَفْضَلِ الْمَسائِلِ وَأَنْجَحِها وَأَعْظَمِها ، يا اَللَّهُ يا رَحْمانُ يا رَحيمُ
segments.transliteration: As'aluka bi-afḍali al-masā'ili wa anjaḥihā wa a'ẓamihā, yā Allāhu yā Raḥmānu yā Raḥīm

translation.en: I ask You by the best of requests, and the most successful, and the greatest, O Allah, O Most Gracious, O Most Merciful,

segments.arabic: وَبِأَسْمائِكَ الْحُسْنى ، وَأَمْثالِكَ الْعُلْيا ، وَنِعَمِكَ الَّتي لاتُحْصى
segments.transliteration: wa bi-asmā'ika al-ḥusná, wa amthālika al-'ulyā, wa ni'amika allatī lā tuḥṣā

translation.en: And by Your most beautiful names, and Your highest attributes, and Your blessings that cannot be counted,

segments.arabic: وَبِأَكْرَمِ أَسْمائِكَ عَلَيْكَ ، وَأَحَبِّها إِلَيْكَ ، وَأَقْرَبِها مِنْكَ وَسيلَةً
segments.transliteration: wa bi-akrami asmā'ika 'alayka, wa aḥabbiha ilayka, wa aqrabiha minka wasīlatan

translation.en: And by the most honorable of Your names to You, and the most beloved of them to You, and the closest of them to You as a means,

segments.arabic: وَأَشْرَفِها عِنْدَكَ مَنْزِلَةً ، وأَجْزَلِها لَدَيْكَ ثَواباً ، وَأَسْرَعِها فِي الْاُمُورِ إِجابَةً
segments.transliteration: wa ashrafiha 'indaka manzila, wa ajzaliha ladayka thawāba, wa asra'iha fī al-umūri ʾijābatan

translation.en: And the most noble of them in status with You, and the most abundant of them in reward with You, and the swiftest of them in answering matters,

segments.arabic: وَبِاسْمِكَ الْمَكْنُونِ الْأَكْبَرِ الْأَعَزِّ الْأَجَلِّ الْأَعْظَمِ الْأَكْرَمِ
segments.transliteration: wa bi-ismika al-maknūni al-akbari al-a'azzi al-ajalli al-a'ẓami al-akrami

translation.en: And by Your hidden name, the Greatest, the Mightiest, the Most Sublime, the Most Magnificent, the Most Honorable,

segments.arabic: اَلَّذي تُحِبُّهُ وَتَهْواهُ ، وَتَرْضى بِهِ عَمَّنْ دَعاكَ ،
segments.transliteration: alladhī tuḥibbuhu wa tahwāhu, wa tarḍá bihi 'amman da'āka

translation.en: Which You love and desire, and You are pleased with it from whoever calls upon You,

segments.arabic: فَاسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ دُعاءَهُ ، وَحَقٌّ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ لاتَحْرِمَ سائِلَكَ وَلاتَرُدَّهُ .
segments.transliteration: fasta jabta lahu du'ā'ahu, wa ḥaqqun 'alayka an lā taḥrima sā'ilaka wa lā taruddah.

translation.en: So You answer his prayer, and it is incumbent upon You not to deprive Your asker and not to turn him away.

segments.arabic: وَبِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي التَّوْراةِ وَالْإِنْجيلِ وَالزَّبُورِ وَالْقُرْآنِ الْعَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-kulli ismin huwa laka fī al-Tawrāt wa al-Injīl wa al-Zabūr wa al-Qur'ān al-'aẓīm

translation.en: And by every name that is Yours in the Torah and the Gospel and the Psalms and the Great Quran,

segments.arabic: وَبِكُلِّ اسْمٍ دَعاكَ بِهِ حَمَلَةُ عَرْشِكَ وَمَلائِكَتُكَ ، وَأَنْبِياؤُكَ وَرُسُلُكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi-kulli ismin da'āka bihi ḥamalat 'arshika wa malā'ikatuka, wa anbiyā'uka wa rusuluka

translation.en: And by every name that the bearers of Your Throne and Your angels called You by, and Your prophets and Your messengers,

segments.arabic: وَأَهْلُ طاعَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ، أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa ahlu ṭā'atika min khalqika, an tuṣalliya 'alá Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad

translation.en: And those who obey You from Your creation, that You send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُعَجِّلَ فَرَجَ وَلِيِّكَ وَابْنِ وَلِيِّكَ ، وَتُعَجِّلَ خِزْيَ أَعْدائِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa an tu'ajjila faraja waliyyika wabni waliyyika, wa tu'ajjila khizya a'dā'ih

translation.en: And that You hasten the relief of Your Wali and the son of Your Wali, and hasten the disgrace of his enemies.

text.en: Recitations after Adhaan/During Salah.
After Adhan 1
Post Adhan 2
During Salah
Qunoot
Recite Ad'han

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاِقْبَالِ نَهَارِكَ وَ اِدْبَارِ لَيْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka be-iqbaale nahaareka wa idbaare layleka

translation.en: O Allah! I ask You on behalf of Your morning and Your night,

segments.arabic: وَ حُضُوْرِ صَلَوَاتِكَ وَ اَصْوَاتِ دُعَآئِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hozoore salawaateka wa aswaate do-a’aa-eka

translation.en: and the voice of Your callers

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: that You send Blessings upon Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تَتُوْبَ عَلَيَّ اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيْمُ.
segments.transliteration: wa an tatooba a’layya innaka antat tawwaabur raheem

translation.en: and that You forgive me as You are the Forgiver, the Merciful.

text.en: 2.In between the Adhan and Iqamah make one sijdah and say :

segments.transliteration: Sajadto laka Khazein Khashia Zaleel

translation.en: I prostrate to you in humility & abjectness

segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal qalbi barran

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make my heart dutiful,

segments.transliteration: wa amali sar'ran

translation.en: my actions pleasing

segments.transliteration: wa ʿayshi qarran

translation.en: my livelihood delightful,

segments.transliteration: wa rizqi darran

translation.en: my sustenance profuse,

segments.transliteration: wa awladi bar'ran

translation.en: my children righteous

segments.transliteration: wajʿal li ʿinda qabri nabiak

translation.en: and make for me at the tomb of Your Messenger,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: may Allah bless him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: mustaqarran wa qararan

translation.en: an abode and a dwelling.

segments.transliteration: be rahmateka ya arrahemeen

translation.en: By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.transliteration: allahumma ilayka tawajjahtu

translation.en: O Allah, to You have I turned my face,

segments.transliteration: wa mardataka talabtu

translation.en: Your pleasure have I sought,

segments.transliteration: wa thawabaka ibtaghaytu

translation.en: for Your reward have I desired,

segments.transliteration: wa bika amantu

translation.en: in You do I believe,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿalayka tawakkaltu

translation.en: and on You do I rely.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: waftah masamiʿa qalbi lidhikrika

translation.en: open the ears of my hearts to remembering You,

segments.transliteration: wa thabbitni ʿala dinika wa dini nabiyyika

translation.en: make me stand firmly on the religion of You and Your Prophet,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qalbi baʿda idh hadaytani

translation.en: make not my hearts to deviate after You have guided me aright,

segments.transliteration: wa hab li min ladunka rahmatan

translation.en: and grant me from You mercy.

segments.transliteration: innaka anta alwahhabu

translation.en: Surely, You are the most liberal Giver.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّآمَّةِ وَ الصَّلَاةِ الْقَآئِمَةِ بَلِّغْ مُحَمَّدًا صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ اٰلِهِ الدَّرَجَةَ وَ الْوَسِيْلَةَ وَ الْفَضْلَ وَ الْفَضِيلَةَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma rabba haazehid da’watit taam-mate was salaatil qaaa-emate balligh mohammadan sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehid darajata wal waseelata wal fazla wal fazeelata

translation.en: O Allah! Lord of this perfect supplication and established prayer, assign to Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his progeny, the rank, right of mediation, excellence, and advantage.

segments.arabic: بِاللهِ اَسْتَفْتِحُ وَ بِاللهِ اَسْتَنْجِحُ وَ بِـمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ اَتَوَجَّهُ.
segments.transliteration: bil-laahe astafteho wa bil-laahe astanjeho wa be-mohammadin rasoolil laahe wa aale mohammadin atawajjaho.

translation.en: With Allah do I commence, from Allah do I seek success, and in the name of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his progeny, do I turn my face (towards Allah).

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اجْعَلْنِي بِهِمْ عِنْدَكَ وَجِيْهًا فِيْ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ وَ مِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin waj a’lnee behim i’ndaka wajeehan fid dunyaa wal aakherate wa menal moqarrabeen.

translation.en: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, and, in their names, make me worthy of regard in this world and in the Hereafter, and of those drawn near to You.0

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni uqaddimu ilayka muhammadan

translation.en: O Allah, I submit Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: may Allah bless him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: bayna yaday hajati

translation.en: to You before mentioning my needs,

segments.transliteration: wa atawajjahu bihi ilayka

translation.en: and I turn to You in his name;

segments.transliteration: fajʿalni bihi wajihan ʿindaka

translation.en: so, (please) make me of high regard with You

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: in this world and the Hereafter,

segments.transliteration: wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: and of those drawn near to You,

segments.transliteration: wajʿal salati bihi maqbulatan

translation.en: and (please) decide, in his name, my prayer to be admitted,

segments.transliteration: wa dhanbi bihi maghfuran

translation.en: my sin to be forgiven,

segments.transliteration: wa duʿa'i bihi mustajaban

translation.en: and my supplication to be responded.

segments.transliteration: innaka anta alghafuru alrrahimu

translation.en: You are verily the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي تَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni atawajjahu ilayka bimuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I turn my face towards You in the name of Muhammad and Muhammad's Household,

segments.transliteration: wa uqaddimuhum bayna yaday salawati

translation.en: present them before You before I begin my prayers,

segments.transliteration: wa ataqarrabu bihim ilayka

translation.en: and seek nearness to You in their names.

segments.transliteration: fajʿalni bihim wajihan

translation.en: So, in their names, (please) make me of high regard with You

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: in this world and the Hereafter

segments.transliteration: wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: and of those drawn near to You.

segments.transliteration: mananta ʿalayya bimaʿrifatihim

translation.en: You have endued me with the great favor of making me know them;

segments.transliteration: fakhtim li bitaʿatihim

translation.en: so, (please) seal my life with obedience to them,

segments.transliteration: wa maʿrifatihim wa wilayatihim

translation.en: recognition of them, and loyalty to them,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaha alssaʿadatu

translation.en: because this is the true happiness.

segments.transliteration: wakhtim li biha

translation.en: Therefore, (please) seal my life with these things,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: for You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿalni maʿa muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me with Muhammad and Muhammad's Household

segments.transliteration: fi kulli ʿafiyatin wa bala'in

translation.en: in every item of wellbeing and tribulation

segments.transliteration: wajʿalni maʿa muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and make me with Muhammad and Muhammad's Household

segments.transliteration: fi kulli mathwan wa munqalabin

translation.en: in every place of returning and place of rest.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal mahyaya mahyahum

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me live their lives

segments.transliteration: wa mamati mamatahum

translation.en: and die their death,

segments.transliteration: wajʿalni maʿahum fi almawatini kulliha

translation.en: include me with them in all situations,

segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum

translation.en: and do not depart me from them.

segments.transliteration: innaka ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.transliteration: allahumma la tu'yisni min rawhika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not make me despair of Your soothing mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa la tuqannitni min rahmatika

translation.en: do not make me lose hope of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa la tu'minni makraka

translation.en: and do not make me feel secure against Your plans,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَامَنُ مَكْرَ ٱللَّهِ إِلاَّ ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلْخَاسِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la ya'manu makra allahi illa alqawmu alkhasiruna

translation.en: for none feels secure against Allah's plans except the losing people.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَ بِاللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ السَّمِيعِ الْعَلِيمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
segments.transliteration: bismi l-lahi wa bi l-lahi, tawa kaltu ʿala l-lahi, aʿūdhu bi l-lahi s-samīʿi l-ʿalīmi mina sh-shayṭāni ālrrajīmi

translation.en: In the Name of God and by God, I put my trust in God, I seek refuge in God, the All-hearing, the All-knowing from Satan, the Stoned One. You will exorcize him and drive him away.

segments.transliteration: allahumma anta almaliku alhaqqu almubinu

translation.en: O Allah, You are verily the King and the Manifest Truth.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta subhanaka

translation.en: There is no god save You. All glory be to You.

segments.transliteration: inni zalamtu nafsi

translation.en: I have wronged myself;

segments.transliteration: faghfir li dhanbi

translation.en: so, (please) forgive my sin.

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ إِلاََّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba illa anta

translation.en: Verily, none can forgive sins save You.

segments.transliteration: labbayka wa saʿdayka

translation.en: Here I am responding to You and here I am trying to please You.

segments.transliteration: walkhayru fi yadayka

translation.en: All goodness is at Your Hand.

segments.transliteration: walshsharru laysa ilayka

translation.en: Evil is never ascribed to You.

segments.transliteration: walmahdiyyu man hadayta

translation.en: A true guided is he whom You guide.

segments.transliteration: ʿabduka wabnu ʿabdayka

translation.en: I, Your servant and the son of Your two servants,

segments.transliteration: dhalilun bayna yadayka

translation.en: am standing in submission before You,

segments.transliteration: minka wa bika wa laka wa ilayka

translation.en: and I am from You, through You, to You, and for You.

segments.transliteration: la malja'a wa la manja

translation.en: There is neither haven nor shelter

segments.transliteration: wa la mafarra minka illa ilayka

translation.en: nor escape from You except with You.

segments.transliteration: subhanaka wa hananayka

translation.en: All glory be to You; I am seeking Your kindness.

segments.transliteration: tabarakta wa taʿalayta

translation.en: Blessed You are and Exalted You are.

segments.transliteration: subhanaka rabba albayti alharami

translation.en: All glory be to You, O Lord of the Sacred House.

segments.arabic: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضَ
segments.transliteration: wajjahtu wajhiya lilladhi fatara alssamawati wal-arda

translation.en: I have turned myself to Him Who originated the heavens and the earth,

segments.transliteration: ʿalimi alghaybi walshshahadati

translation.en: the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed,

segments.transliteration: hanifan musliman

translation.en: [and I am] upright and Muslim

segments.transliteration: wa ma ana min almushrikina

translation.en: and I am not of the polytheists.

segments.transliteration: inna salati wa nusuki

translation.en: Surely, my prayer, my sacrifice,

segments.transliteration: wa mahyaya wa mamati

translation.en: my life, and my death

segments.transliteration: lillahi rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: are (all) for Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: la sharika lahu

translation.en: No associate has He;

segments.transliteration: wa bidhalika umirtu

translation.en: and this am I commanded,

segments.transliteration: wa ana min almuslimina

translation.en: and I am of those who submit.

segments.arabic: (إيماني بأمة إبراهيم ودين محمد ومسار علي بن أبي طالب ، وأصلي صلاتي بقبول قيادة ذرية محمد ، وأنا أعبد وأستسلم لله دون أن أنسب له شريكاً).
segments.transliteration: ('iimani bi'umat 'iibrahim wadin muhamad wamasar ealii bn 'abi talib , wa'usaliy salaati biqabul qiadat dhariyat muhamad , wa'ana 'aebud wa'astaslim lilah dun 'an 'unsib lah shrykaan).

translation.en: (I have faith upon the nation of Ibrahim and the religion of Mohammad and the path of Ali bin Abi Talib, and I offer my prayers accepting the leadership of Mohammad's Progeny, while I worship and surrender before Allah, without ascribing any partner to Him).

segments.arabic: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذي فَطَرَ السَّماواتِ وَالْأَرْضَ حَنيفاً مُسْلِماً عَلى مِلَّةِ إِبْراهيمَ وَدينِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَهُدى أَميرِالْمُؤْمِنينَ وَما أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكينَ ،
segments.transliteration: wa jahtu wajhiya li l-ladhī faṭara s-samāwāti wa l-arḍa ḥanīfāan muslimāan ʿala millati ibrāhīma wa dīni Muḥammadin wa hud amīriālmu'minīna wa mā anā mina l-mushrikīna ,

translation.en: I have directed my face towards the one who created the Heavens and the Earth while I am a worshipper who surrenders before Him, I have faith upon the nation of Ibrahim and the religion of Mohammad and the guidance of the Commander of the faithful,

segments.arabic: إِنَّ صَلاتي وَنُسُكي وَمَحْيايَ وَمَماتي للَّهِ رَبِّ الْعالَمينَ،
segments.transliteration: inna ṣalātī wa nusukī wa maḥīāya wa mamātī l-lahī rabbi l-ʿālamīna,

translation.en: indeed my prayer, my rites of sacrifice, my living and my death are for Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: لا شَريكَ لَهُ وَبِذلِكَ اُمِرْتُ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمينَ .
segments.transliteration: lā sharīka lahu wa bi dhlika umirtu wa anā mina l-muslimīn.

translation.en: No partner has He, and this I have been commanded, and I am the first (among You) of the Muslims.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْني مِنَ الْمُسْلِمينَ ، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ السَّميعِ الْعَليمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطانِ الرَّجيمِ ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحيمِ .
segments.transliteration: al-lahumma ajʿalnī mina l-muslimīna , aʿūdhu bi l-lahi s-samīʿi l-ʿalīmi mina sh-shayṭāni r-rajīmi , bi smi l-lahi r-raḥmni r-raḥīm .

translation.en: O' Allah, regard me among the Muslims, I seek refuge in Allah, the Hearer, the Knower, from Satan, the expelled, in the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful."

text.en: --Duas during Salah--

segments.transliteration: aʿudhu bilalshshaytani alrrajimi

translation.en: I pray Allah's protection from Satan, the accursed.

segments.transliteration: alḥamdu lillāhi rabbil ʿālamīn

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: kadhālikal lāhu rabbi

translation.en: Such is Allah my Lord,or.

segments.transliteration: kadhālikal lāhu rabbunā

translation.en: Such is Allah our Lord.

segments.transliteration: subhana rabbiya alʿazimi wa bihamdihi

translation.en: All glory be to my Lord, the All-great, and in praise of Him.

segments.transliteration: samiʿa allahu liman hamidahu

translation.en: May Allah listen to him who praises Him.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allahu rabbi wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I implore Allah, my Lord, for forgiveness and I repent to Him.

segments.transliteration: bihawli allah wa quwwatihi aqumu wa aqʿudu

translation.en: With the might of Allah and with His power, I stand up and sit down.

segments.transliteration: kadhalika allahu rabbi

translation.en: Such is Allah, my Lord.

segments.transliteration: alḥamdu lillāh

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَ بِاللهِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ وَ خَيْـرُ الْأَسْمَاءِ لِلّٰهِ
segments.transliteration: bismil lāhi wa billāhi wal ḥamdu lillāhi wa khayrul asmāʾi lillāh

translation.en: In the name of Allah and by Allah. All praise is for Allah and the best names belong to Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ تَـقَبَّلْ شَفَاعَتَهُ وَ ارْفَعْ دَرَجَتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal shafāʿatahu war faʿ darajatah<

translation.en: And accept his intercession and elevate his rank (referring the Holy Prophet)

segments.arabic: اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّهَ رَبِّي وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْهِ.
segments.transliteration: Astaghfirullah Rabbi wa Atuubu Ilayh.

translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah my Lord and I turn to Him

segments.transliteration: allāhummagh fir lī

translation.en: O Allah! Forgive me.

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْـرَ الْمَسْـــــــئُولِينَ وَ يَا خـَـــيْـرَ الْمُعْطِينَ، اُرْزُقْنِي وَ ارْزُقْ عِيَاِلي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ، فَإِنَّكَ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: yā khayral masʾūlīn wa yā khayral muʿṭīn, urzuqnī war zuq ʿiyālī min faḍlik, faʾinnaka dhūl faḍlil ʿaẓīm

translation.en: O the Best of those who are Asked, and O the Best Giver! Grant me sustenance and grant my family sustenance with Your grace, for indeed, You are the Possessor of Great Grace;

segments.transliteration: bismillahi wa billahi

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin) and in Allah (I trust).

segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa khayru al-asma'i lillahi

translation.en: The most excellent names be to Allah.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah.

segments.transliteration: allahumma laka rakaʿtu

translation.en: O Allah, to You alone have I genuflected,

segments.transliteration: wa laka aslamtu

translation.en: to You alone have I submitted,

segments.transliteration: wa bika amantu

translation.en: in You have I believed,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿalayka tawakkaltu

translation.en: and in You have I put my trust.

segments.transliteration: wa anta rabbi

translation.en: And You are my Lord.

segments.transliteration: khashaʿa laka samʿi wa basari

translation.en: Revering to You are my hearing, my sight,

segments.transliteration: wa shaʿri wa bashari

translation.en: my hair, my skin,

segments.transliteration: wa lahmi wa dami

translation.en: my flesh, my blood,
