segments.transliteration: wa mukhkhi wa ʿasabi wa ʿizami

translation.en: my brain, my nerve, my bones,

segments.transliteration: wa ma aqallat-hu qadamaya

translation.en: and whatever is borne by my two feet.

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ مُسْتَنْكِفٍ وَلاَ مُسْتَكْبِرٍ وَلاَ مُسْتَحْسِرٍ
segments.transliteration: ghayra mustankifin wa la mustakbirin wa la mustahsir

translation.en: I am neither disdaining, nor arrogant, nor regretful.

segments.transliteration: allahumma laka sajadtu

translation.en: O Allah, to You (alone) do I prostrate,

segments.transliteration: wa bika amantu

translation.en: in You do I have faith,

segments.transliteration: wa laka aslamtu

translation.en: to You do I submit,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿalayka tawakkaltu

translation.en: in You do I put trust,

segments.transliteration: wa anta rabbi

translation.en: and You are my Lord.

segments.transliteration: sajada wajhi lilladhi khalaqahu

translation.en: My face is prostrating the One Who has created it

segments.transliteration: wa shaqqa samʿahu wa basarahu

translation.en: and split its hearing and sight.

segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi rabbi alʿalamina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the Worlds.

segments.transliteration: tabaraka allahu ahsanu alkhaliqina

translation.en: Blessed be Allah, the most excellent of all creators.

text.en: Qunoot

segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir lana warhamna

translation.en: O Allah, (please) forgive us, have mercy upon us,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿafina waʿfu ʿanna

translation.en: endue us with wellbeing, and pardon us

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.transliteration: innaka ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ كَانَ اصْبَحَ وَلَهُ ثِقَةٌ اوْ رَجَاءٌ غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma man kana asbaha wa lahu thiqatun aw raja'un ghayruka

translation.en: O Allah, if there is any one who begins his day by putting his trust and his hope in any one other than

segments.transliteration: فfa'anta thiqati wa raja'i

translation.en: then You (alone) is my trust and my hope.

segments.transliteration: ya ajwada man su'ila

translation.en: O most magnanimous of all those who may be besought!

segments.transliteration: wa ya arhama man isturhima

translation.en: O most merciful of all those whose mercy may be prayed!

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (Please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: warham daʿfi wa maskanati

translation.en: have mercy upon my weakness, neediness,

segments.transliteration: wa qillata hilati

translation.en: and lack of solution,

segments.transliteration: wamnun ʿalayya biljannati tawlan minka

translation.en: bestow upon me with Paradise out of Your favoring,

segments.transliteration: wa fukka raqabati min alnnari

translation.en: set my neck free from Hellfire,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿafini fi nafsi

translation.en: and endue me with wellbeing in my self

segments.transliteration: wa fi jamiʿi umuri

translation.en: and in all of my affairs,

segments.transliteration: birahmatika ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْحَلِيْمُ الْكَرِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul Halimul Karim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is Forbearing and Generous

segments.arabic: لآ اِلَهَ اِلاَّ اللّهُ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: Laa ilaaha illallaahul ‘Aliyyul ‘Azim

translation.en: There is none worth worshipping but Allah Who is MostHigh and

segments.transliteration: Subhaanallaahi Rabbis Samaawaatis Sab'

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, Who is the Sustainer of the seven heavens and of the seven earth

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbil ‘Arzinas Sab'

translation.en: And Who is the Sustainer of all the things

segments.arabic: وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa maa fihinna wa maa baynahunna

translation.en: in them, and between them,

segments.transliteration: wa Rabbul 'Arshil ‘Azim

translation.en: And Who is the Lord of the great 'Arsh

segments.transliteration: Wal Hamdul lillaahi Rabbil 'Aalamin

translation.en: And all praise for Allah, the Sustainer of the worlds.
